name: Fire Shield
description: Envelop yourself in a fiery shield that burns foes and grants might each time you are struck (cooldown of 1 second per attacker).

name: Flame Burst
description: Burn foes at the target location.

name: Burning Retreat
description: Quickly roll backward, leaving behind a line of fire that burns.

name: Geyser
description: Create a geyser to heal nearby allies.

name: Windborne Speed
description: You and nearby allies gain swiftness, while curing crippled, immobilized, and chilled.

name: Unsteady Ground
description: Create unsteady ground that foes cannot cross.

name: Magnetic Aura
description: Reflect projectiles with magnetic energy.

name: Shock Wave
description: Create a shock wave that bleeds and immobilizes your target.

name: Updraft
description: Gain swiftness from a gust of wind that launches nearby foes.

name: Earthquake
description: Trigger a quake at your location, knocking down foes and dealing massive damage.

name: Ring of Fire
description: Damage nearby foes with a ring of fire, burning foes that pass through it.

name: Dragon's Tooth
description: Drop an explosive dragon's tooth on your foe.

name: Ice Shards
description: Fire three ice shards at your foe.

name: Blinding Flash
description: Blind your foes with a flash of light. Vulnerable foes are also weakened.

name: Rock Barrier
description: Envelop yourself in a stony barrier that improves toughness.

name: Dust Devil
description: Create a dust storm that inflicts cripple to bleeding foes. The first strike of the storm blinds foes.

name: Fiery Whirl
description: Advance forward, slashing foes in your way.

name: Burning Retreat
description: Quickly roll backward, leaving behind a line of fire that burns.

name: Ring of Fire
description: Damage nearby foes with a ring of fire, burning foes that pass through it.

name: Flame Leap
description: Leap at your foe with a flaming attack that causes burning.

name: Frost Volley
description: Rapidly fire at your foe, making them vulnerable with each hit. Damage is increased per stack of Water Arrow.

name: Deep Freeze
description: Encase your target in a block of solid ice. Duration is increased per stack of Water Arrow.

name: Frost Storm
description:
Call down an ice storm on the targeted area. The number of final ice shards are increased for each stack of Water Arrow.
Damage is reduced per target each time foes are struck by this skill.

name: Invoke Lightning
description:
Randomly strike the surrounding area with lightning.
Damage is reduced per target each time foes are struck by this skill.

name: Lightning Swing
description: Chain. Bash your foe.

name: Static Swing
description: Chain. Strike your foe again.

name: Thunderclap
description: Smash the ground and damage nearby foes.

name: Static Field
description: Manifest an electrical field that stuns foes crossing it.

name: Wind Blast
description: Launch your foe with a banishing smash.

name: Glyph of Storms
description: Glyph. Create a storm based on your attunement.

name: Ice Storm
description:
Glyph. Create an ice storm at the targeted area.
Damage is reduced per target each time foes are struck by this skill.

name: Firestorm
description: Glyph. Create a firestorm at the target area.

name: Lightning Storm
description:
Glyph. Create a lightning storm at the targeted area.
Damage is reduced per target each time foes are struck by this skill.

name: Sandstorm
description: Glyph. Create a sandstorm at the target area.

name: Crippling Shield
description: Throw your shield in a line, crippling struck foes. This attack deals bonus damage if you have barrier.

name: Magnetic Shield
description: Pull nearby foes to you with a magnetic force, gaining protection and Tectonic Shift for each foe pulled.

name: Undercurrent
description: Release a current of water to damage foes and regenerate allies.

name: Electrified Tornado
description: Electrify your tornado form and make it shoot lightning.

name: Dust Tornado
description: Gather up dust into your tornado form, making it shoot out dust devils that blind foes.

name: Debris Tornado
description: Gather up debris into your tornado form and send it flying.

name: Renewal of Air
description: Glyph. Revive and teleport an ally to your location.

name: Renewal of Earth
description: Glyph. Revive allies around you.

name: Renewal of Fire
description: Glyph. Revive an ally; you're revived the next time you're downed.

name: Renewal of Water
description: Glyph. Revive an ally with full health.

name: Hurl
description: Hurl the rocks from your barrier at your foe.

name: Geyser
description: Create a geyser to heal nearby allies.

name: Blinding Flash
description: Blind nearby foes.

name: Cleansing Wave
description: Heal yourself and nearby allies, curing a condition.

name: Flame Burst
description: Burn nearby foes.

name: Shock Wave
description: Create a shock wave that bleeds and cripples nearby foes.

name: Med Kit
description: Engineering Kit. Equip a kit that replaces your weapon with healing skills.

name: Grenade Kit
description: Engineering Kit. Equip a kit that replaces your weapon with grenade skills.

name: Poison Grenade
description: Throw several grenades that explode in poisonous blasts.

name: Shrapnel Grenade
description: Throw grenades that explode in a hail of shrapnel, causing bleeding.

name: Flash Grenade
description: Throw grenades that explode in blinding flashes.

name: Freeze Grenade
description: Throw grenades that chill foes with frigid blasts.

name: Grenade Barrage
description: Throw several grenades at once.

name: Personal Battering Ram
description: Gadget. Launch a target foe with a concealed ram head.

name: Bomb Kit
description: Engineering Kit. Equip a kit that replaces your weapon with bomb skills.

name: Big Ol' Bomb
description: Set a timed charge with a big blast that knocks down nearby foes. This skill blast finishes twice.

name: Rifle Turret
description: Turret. Build a rifle turret that shoots at foes. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first placed, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Throw Junk
description: Throw a bit of junk and inflict a random condition on your foe.

name: Elixir B
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir B to gain fury, might, resolution, and swiftness, then extend the duration of boons on yourself.

name: Galvanic Bomb
description: Set an explosive that electrocutes nearby foes, dazing them.

name: Fire Bomb
description: Set an explosive that burns nearby foes.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Set a timed charge that creates a cloud of smoke, blinding nearby foes.

name: Slick Shoes
description: Gadget. Spray oil behind you, knocking down foes. If underwater, foes entering the field are blinded and slowed.

name: Fragmentation Shot
description: Fire a shot that bleeds the impacted target and then shatters, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Poison Dart Volley
description: Fire a volley of darts that poison foes.

name: Static Shot
description: Discharge a lightning shot that bounces between multiple foes, blinding and confusing them.

name: Glue Shot
description: Coat the target area with a glue puddle that immobilizes foes on impact, then cripples foes that remain within.

name: Blowtorch
description: Unleash flames from your pistol to burn foes. Deals more damage the closer you are.

name: Elixir X
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir X to become a rampaging brute, whirling tornado, or powerful lich. Underwater, become either a withering plague or a whirlpool.

name: Elixir H
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir H to heal yourself and gain protection, regeneration, and swiftness.

name: Flame Turret
description: Turret. Deploy a turret that burns foes. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first placed, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Net Turret
description: Turret. Build a net turret that immobilizes nearby foes. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first placed, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Thumper Turret
description: Turret. Build a high-health thumper turret that damages nearby foes. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first placed, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Bomb
description: Set an explosive that damages nearby foes.

name: Healing Turret
description: Turret. Deploy a turret that heals you briefly, then regenerates you and your allies. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first dropped, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Elixir C
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir C, converting all conditions into boons, then heal yourself per boon on you.

name: Elixir S
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir S to shrink yourself, recover from stun, and evade attacks.

name: Elixir U
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir U, gaining quickness, stability, and vigor.

name: Utility Goggles
description: Gadget. Break out of stun, gaining resistance, clearing blindness, and removing damaging conditions.

name: Toss Elixir R
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir R to revive allies at a location.

name: Supply Crate
description: Turret. Request a supply drop of turrets. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first dropped, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Automatic Fire
description: Overcharge your rifle turret to fire piercing shots that inflict vulnerability.

name: Grenade
description: Throw several grenades that explode.

name: Thump
description: Overcharge your thumper turret to launch nearby foes.

name: Electrified Net
description: Overcharge your turret to fire an electrified net that immobilizes and stuns.

name: Smoke Screen
description: Overcharge your flame turret, releasing a smoke screen that blinds nearby foes.

name: Tool Kit
description: Engineering Kit. Equip a kit that gives you a variety of tools.

name: Pry Bar
description: Confuse your foe by smacking them with a pry bar.

name: Rocket Boots
description:
Gadget. Fly forward, removing movement-impairing conditions and damaging foes with your rocket exhaust. 
Movement-impairing conditions include cripple, chill, and immobilize.

name: Rocket Turret
description: Turret. Build a turret that fires rockets. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first placed, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Explosive Rockets
description: Overcharge your turret to fire explosive rockets.

name: Floating Mine
description: Throw out a mine that explodes on contact.

name: Anchor
description: Sink your foe.

name: Buoy
description: Inflate a buoy, floating more quickly to the surface.

name: Flamethrower
description: Engineering Kit. Arm yourself with a flamethrower that replaces your weapon skills.

name: Flame Jet
description: Spray fire in a cone pattern while moving, burning foes on the final attack. Deals 10% bonus damage to burning targets.

name: Napalm
description: Immolate enemies in front of you with a cone of intense fire.

name: Air Blast
description: Push back foes and projectiles with a hot-air blast, burning foes that are already on fire.

name: Flame Blast
description: Fire a napalm ball that explodes on impact.

name: Elixir Gun
description: Engineering Kit. Arm yourself with an elixir gun that replaces your weapon skills.

name: Tranquilizer Dart
description: Fire a dart that bleeds and weakens foes.

name: Glob Shot
description: Fire a bouncing glob that cripples foes and grants swiftness to you and your allies. The first enemy struck is immobilized.

name: Acid Bomb
description: Elixir. Leap backward, spraying an acidic elixir on the ground that damages nearby foes.

name: Super Elixir
description: Elixir. Launch an elixir orb, healing allies on impact and creating an area of continual healing.

name: Detonate Rifle Turret
description: Detonate your rifle turret.

name: Detonate Thumper Turret
description: Detonate your thumper turret.

name: Detonate Healing Turret
description: Detonate your healing turret.

name: Grappling Line
description: Throw out a grappling line to pull your foe to you.

name: Booby Trap
description: Set off an explosive booby trap, launching nearby foes with a powerful blast.

name: Fumigate
description: Spray a cone of elixir fumes, inflicting poison and vulnerability to foes and curing conditions on allies with every strike.

name: Healing Mist
description: Elixir. Vent a healing mist, granting regeneration to yourself and allies.

name: Toss Elixir B
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir B at a location, granting stability and one of the following boons to allies: fury, might, or resolution.

name: Elixir R
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir R to refill your endurance and remove immobilizing effects.

name: Toss Elixir C
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir C, converting conditions into boons for allies.

name: Toss Elixir U
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir U, breaking stuns on allies and granting them superspeed.

name: Toss Elixir S
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir S, granting stealth to allies in the target area.

name: Superspeed
description: Activate your slick shoes, enabling you to move at superior speeds.

name: Toss Elixir H
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir H to grant protection, regeneration, and vigor to allies.

name: Cleansing Burst
description: Overcharge your healing turret to cure conditions and grant a burst of healing.

name: Launch Personal Battering Ram
description: Shoot a ram's head in front of you, impairing any struck foes.

name: Rocket Kick
description: Use your rocket boots to do an explosive kick that burns foes.

name: Detonate Net Turret
description: Detonate your net turret.

name: Detonate Flame Turret
description: Detonate your flame turret.

name: Flame Turret
description: Turret. Deploy a turret that burns foes.

name: Net Turret
description: Turret. Build a net turret that immobilizes nearby foes.

name: Rifle Turret
description: Turret. Build a rifle turret that shoots at foes.

name: Thumper Turret
description: Turret. Build a high-health thumper turret that damages nearby foes.

name: Rocket Turret
description: Turret. Build a turret that fires rockets.

name: Smack
description: Chain. Smack your foe. Repair turrets.

name: Whack
description: Chain. Whack your foe. Repairs turrets.

name: Thwack
description: Thwack your foe. Repairs turrets.

name: Box of Nails
description: Scatter nails that bleed and cripple foes. The first pulse of this skill will immobilize foes.

name: Magnet
description: Pull your target to you.

name: Gear Shield
description: Block attacks.

name: Throw Wrench
description: Throw a wrench that returns to you, striking foes each way.

name: Rifle Burst
description: Deliver a quick burst of fire that pierces targets, followed by an explosive grenade.

name: Net Shot
description: Immobilize foes with a net shot.

name: Jump Shot
description: Blast the ground, damaging nearby foes and leaping to your target.

name: Grenade Kit
description: Equip a kit that gives you grenade skills.

name: Super Elixir
description: Elixir. Launch an elixir orb, healing allies on impact and creating an area of continual healing.

name: Elixir F
description: Elixir. Fire a bouncing glob of Elixir F that cripples foes and grants swiftness to you and allies.

name: Tranquilizer Dart
description: Fire a dart that bleeds and weakens foes.

name: Lesser Grenade Barrage
description: Throw several grenades at once.

name: Magnetic Shield
description: Create a magnetic field that reflects projectiles and can be released to knock back foes.

name: Static Shield
description: Electrify your shield, preparing to throw it at foes. Stun nearby enemies that attack you while blocking.

name: Throw Shield
description: Throw your charged shield. Dazes foes it hits on the way out and back.

name: Toss Elixir C
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir C, converting conditions into boons for allies.

name: Detonate Elixir C
description: Elixir. Burst the bottle, converting conditions into boons for allies in your area.

name: Detonate Elixir B
description: Burst the bottle to grant stability and one of the following boons to allies: fury, might, resolution, or swiftness.

name: Detonate Elixir S
description: Elixir. Burst the bottle, granting allies stealth.

name: Detonate Elixir R
description: Elixir. Burst the bottle, reviving allies.

name: Detonate Elixir U
description: Elixir. Detonate Elixir U, causing it to grant allies superspeed and break them out of stun.

name: Toss Elixir U
description: Toss Elixir U out in front of you.

name: Toss Elixir S
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir S, granting stealth to allies in the area.

name: Toss Elixir R
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir R to revive allies at a point.

name: Toss Elixir B
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir B at a location, granting stability and one of the following boons to allies: fury, might, resolution, or swiftness.

name: Harpoon Turret
description: Turret. Build a harpoon turret that shoots at foes. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first placed, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Detonate Harpoon Turret
description: Detonate your harpoon turret.

name: Automatic Fire
description: Overcharge your harpoon turret to fire a burst of automated shots.

name: Super Elixir
description: Elixir. Shoot an elixir orb, healing allies when it bursts and creating an area of continual healing.

name: Super Elixir
description: Elixir. Burst the orb, instantly healing your allies and creating an area of continual healing.

name: Stow Med Kit
description: Stow your med kit.

name: Stow Grenade Kit
description: Stow your grenade kit.

name: Stow Bomb Kit
description: Stow your bomb kit.

name: Stow Tool Kit
description: Stow your tool kit.

name: Stow Flamethrower
description: Stow your flamethrower.

name: Stow Elixir Gun
description: Stow your elixir gun.

name: Toss Elixir H
description: Elixir. Toss Elixir H to grant protection, regeneration, and vigor to allies.

name: Detonate Elixir H
description: Burst a bottle of Elixir H, granting protection, regeneration, and swiftness to allies.

name: Magnetic Inversion
description: Release the magnetic field to knock back nearby foes.

name: Detonate Rocket Turret
description: Detonate your rocket turret.

name: Healing Turret
description: Turret. Deploy a turret that heals you briefly, then regenerates you and your allies.

name: Net Wall
description: Launch a deployable net wall to immobilize foes caught within.

name: Scatter Mines
description: Fire out a spread of explosive mines at your enemy.

name: Homing Torpedo
description: Fire a shot that homes in on your foe and detonates an area around them.

name: Timed Charge
description: Fire a timed charge at your target, damaging and burning nearby foes when it detonates.

name: Blunderbuss
description: Fire several shards of shrapnel that inflict more damage the closer you are to foes. You and nearby allies gain might.

name: Overcharged Shot
description: Fire a blast so strong that it launches your foe as the recoil frees you from any movement-impairing conditions.

name: Smoke Vent
description: Vent smoke from your flamethrower, blinding nearby foes.

name: Throw Mine
description: Gadget. Throw out a remote-controlled land mine that damages, knocks back, and removes a boon from nearby foes.

name: Detonate
description: Detonate your mine to damage foes and remove a boon from them.

name: Deploy Mine
description: Deploy a remote-controlled mine that damages nearby foes and removes a boon.

name: Mine Field
description: Plant five mines around yourself.

name: Detonate Mine Field
description: Detonate your mine, damaging nearby foes.

name: Poison Grenade
description: Throw several grenades that explode in poisonous blasts.

name: Freeze Grenade
description: Throw grenades that chill foes with frigid blasts.

name: Flash Grenade
description: Throw grenades that explode in blinding flashes.

name: Shrapnel Grenade
description: Throw grenades that explode in a hail of shrapnel, causing bleeding.

name: Grenade
description: Throw several grenades that explode.

name: Grenade Barrage
description: Throw several grenades at once.

name: Box of Piranhas
description: Release piranhas that bleed and cripple foes. The first pulse of this skill will immobilize foes who are movement impaired or disabled. Disables include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

name: Regenerating Mist
description: Release a mist of healing liquid to regenerate nearby allies.

name: Rocket
description: Fire a rocket out of your belt that explodes on impact.

name: Surprise Shot
description: Fire a bullet out of your belt.

name: Net Attack
description: Fire a net from your belt to immobilize your foe.

name: Rumble
description: Release a shock wave of inertial force to damage nearby foes.

name: Throw Napalm
description: Throw a ball of napalm that explodes on impact, burning foes around target location.

name: Harpoon
description: Launch a harpoon from your belt.

name: Supply Crate
description: Turret. Request a supply drop of turrets. Turrets automatically overcharge when they are first dropped, and they can be overcharged manually as long as they stay active.

name: Leap of Faith
description: Leap at your foe. Inflicts blindness and heals you for each foe hit. Heal for a lesser amount for each target struck beyond the first.

name: Whirling Wrath
description: Spin in place and swing your greatsword while hurling powerful projectiles.

name: Shield of Wrath
description: Create a shield to block the next three attacks. If the shield is not destroyed, it explodes and damages nearby foes.

name: "Receive the Light!"
description: Shout. Heal yourself and allies in a cone in front of you.

name: "Advance!"
description: Shout. Grant aegis and swiftness to up to five nearby allies.

name: "Save Yourselves!"
description: Shout. Draw conditions from nearby allies to yourself. Gain multiple boons for a short duration.

name: Protector's Strike
description: Protect allies from the next incoming attack against them, and lash out when attacked, granting boons to nearby allies and fully charging the passive burning effect.

name: Shield of Judgment
description: Create a shielding wave in front of you that damages foes while giving protection and aegis to you and up to five allies.

name: Cleansing Flame
description: Remove conditions from yourself then breathe magical flames that damage foes and cure conditions on allies. Inflicts burning on the final attack.

name: Zealot's Fire
description: Throw your Zealot's Flame to damage the targeted foe.

name: Symbol of Punishment
description: Symbol. Create a symbol on the ground that strikes foes and grants might to nearby allies.

name: Shield of Absorption
description: Create a dome around you that pushes foes back and absorbs projectiles.

name: Bane Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Improved Power
Signet Active: Knock down and damage your foe.

name: Symbol of Judgment
description: Draw a symbol on the ground that heals allies and damages foes.

name: Wave of Light
description: Push nearby foes back.

name: Symbol of Blades
description: Symbol. Teleport to your target, and blind nearby foes. Create a symbol at your feet that damages nearby enemies and benefits allies.

name: Orb of Wrath
description: Fire a slow-moving orb at your foe.

name: Chains of Light
description: Immobilize and make your foe vulnerable with ethereal chains.

name: Lesser Smite Condition
description: Meditation. Cure conditions and damage nearby foes. Deal more damage if a condition is cured.

name: Shelter
description: Block attacks while healing.

name: Zealot's Flame
description: Set yourself alight, periodically burning up to three nearby foes. The final pulse applies additional burning.

name: Sword of Wrath
description: Chain. Slash your foe once.

name: Sword Arc
description: Chain. Slash your foe again.

name: Zealot's Defense
description: Block ranged attacks while casting magical projectiles.

name: Faithful Strike
description: Hit your foe with a final strike and heal nearby allies.

name: True Strike
description: Chain. Smash your foe.

name: Pure Strike
description: Chain. Bash your foe.

name: Symbol of Faith
description: Symbol. Smash the ground to heal allies and create a mystic symbol that damages foes and regenerates allies.

name: Ray of Judgment
description: Purge the target area in a ray of light. Allies are healed and cleansed of a condition, while enemies are infused with blinding light, taking damage each interval if they are initially struck.

name: Virtue of Justice
description:
Virtue: Burn foes every few attacks.
Activate: You and your allies inflict burning on the next attack.

name: Virtue of Courage
description:
Virtue: Gain aegis periodically.
Activate: Grant aegis to yourself and nearby allies.

name: Virtue of Resolve
description:
Virtue: Regenerates health.
Activate: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Bolt of Wrath
description: Fire a bolt that damages foes.

name: Banish
description: Launch your foe with a powerful smash. Striking a foe refreshes Mighty Blow and allows your next Mighty Blow to teleport to that foe.

name: Hammer of Wisdom
description: Spirit Weapon. Order the Hammer of Wisdom to knock down your foe.

name: Sanctuary
description: Consecration. Form a protective healing shelter for allies. Block foes and their missiles from entering.

name: Strike
description: Chain. Strike your foe.

name: Vengeful Strike
description: Chain. Strike your foe again.

name: Wrathful Strike
description: Attack with a final, powerful strike that applies might for each foe you strike.

name: Holy Strike
description: Mark an area for judgment, rapidly healing allies and then blasting foes in the area.

name: Symbol of Swiftness
description: Symbol. Sear a mystic symbol into the target area, damaging foes and granting swiftness to allies. Allies in the area gain a burst of speed when the symbol is created.

name: Line of Warding
description: Ward. Create a line in front of you that foes cannot cross.

name: Symbol of Resolution
description: Symbol. Pierce the ground with a mystic symbol that damages foes while granting resolution to allies.

name: Binding Blade
description: Throw blades at your foes, causing damage over time. Bound foes can be pulled to you. The effect ends when a foe moves out of range.

name: Wrath
description: Focus a wrathful light ray on your foe.

name: Signet of Judgment
description:
Signet Passive: Reduces all incoming damage.
Signet Active: Grant resolution and protection to nearby allies while debilitating nearby enemies.

name: Signet of Wrath
description:
Signet Passive: Grants you increased condition damage.
Signet Active: Immobilize and burn your target.

name: "Hold the Line!"
description: Shout. Grant protection and regeneration to allies.

name: "Stand Your Ground!"
description: Shout. Grant stability to yourself and allies.

name: Renewed Focus
description: Meditation. Focus, making yourself invulnerable and recharging your virtues.

name: Signet of Resolve
description:
Signet Passive: Remove a condition from yourself every few seconds.
Signet Active: Heal yourself and remove conditions.

name: Hammer Swing
description: Chain. Strike your foe.

name: Hammer Bash
description: Chain. Bash your foe.

name: Symbol of Protection
description: Symbol. Smash a mystic symbol onto the ground that gives protection to you and your allies.

name: Signet of Mercy
description:
Signet Passive: Improves concentration.
Signet Active: Revive a nearby downed ally.

name: Sword of Justice
description: Spirit Weapon. Will the Sword of Justice to appear beside your enemy and attack nearby foes.

name: Bow of Truth
description: Spirit Weapon. Command the Bow of Truth to barrage a location with healing arrows.

name: Shield of the Avenger
description: Spirit Weapon. Command the Shield of the Avenger to form a protective dome, and then shatter, flying out to weaken nearby foes.

name: Purging Flames
description: Consecration. Create a ring of fire. With each pulse, burn foes while removing conditions from allies inside the area of effect.

name: Spear of Light
description: Throw a spear that makes your foe vulnerable, dealing bonus damage at closer range.

name: Zealot's Flurry
description: Strike foes in front of you with a storm of jabs.

name: Brilliance
description: Blind all nearby foes.

name: Symbol of Spears
description: Symbol. Create a spear wall in front of you that damages foes that remain in its area.

name: Wrathful Grasp
description: Throw a spear and pull your foe to you, burning them.

name: Mighty Blow
description: Damage nearby foes with a mighty ground slam. If your target has been struck by Banish, teleport to them.

name: Ring of Warding
description: Ward. Create a ring around you that foes cannot cross. Trapped foes cannot exit the ring while it is active.

name: Light Ball
description: Fire a sundering ball of light that damages foes.

name: Weight of Justice
description:
Sink your foe with the weight of justice, inflicting damage continuously. 
Damage ceases if the stun is broken.

name: Purify
description: Release an orb of cleansing light that cures conditions on allies it passes through and detonates on enemies struck. Burns foes and cures conditions on allies within the blast radius.

name: Symbol of Light
description: Symbol. Create a pillar of light that does damage every second at your foe's location.

name: Refraction
description: Create a bubble that blocks enemy missiles and grants resolution to allies.

name: Renewing Current
description: Escape toward the surface and heal.

name: Reveal the Depths
description: Damage foes in an area that grows larger.

name: Shackle
description: Cripple your foe with shackles.

name: Shield of Absorption
description: Detonate the dome to heal nearby allies.

name: Pull
description: Pull your foes to you.

name: Sword Wave
description: Send out waves of attacks that strike multiple targets.

name: Purifying Blast
description: Detonate the orb to burn foes and cure conditions on allies in the blast radius.

name: Smite Condition
description: Meditation. Cure conditions and damage nearby foes. Deal more damage if a condition is cured.

name: Merciful Intervention
description: Meditation. Shadowstep to an ally in the targeted area and heal around them. If no ally is present in the targeted area, this ability will not shadowstep.

name: Judge's Intervention
description: Meditation. Teleport to your target and burn nearby foes.

name: Contemplation of Purity
description: Meditation. Convert the conditions you are suffering from into boons.

name: Virtue of Resolve
description:
Virtue: Regenerates health.
Activate: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Wall of Reflection
description: Consecration. Summon a barrier of mystic power that reflects projectiles.

name: Hallowed Ground
description: Consecration. Consecrate the target area, granting stability to allies inside.

name: Zealot's Embrace
description: Send a wave toward your foe that immobilizes foes in a line. Gain barrier for each target struck. Barrier is reduced for each target struck beyond the first.

name: Empower
description: Channel healing and might to nearby allies. Completing this channel grants more health to your allies.

name: Virtue of Courage
description:
Virtue: Gain aegis periodically.
Activate: Grant aegis to yourself and nearby allies.

name: Confusing Images
description: Channel a beam of energy that damages and confuses your foe.

name: Chaos Storm
description: Create a magical storm at the target location that applies random conditions to foes and boons to allies. The first strike of the storm dazes foes.

name: Mind Slash
description: Chain. Slash your foe to make them vulnerable.

name: Mind Gash
description: Chain. Gash your foe to make them vulnerable.

name: Mind Spike
description: Stab your foe and rip a boon off of them. Does additional damage when the target has no boons.

name: Illusionary Leap
description: Clone. Summon an illusion that leaps at your target, crippling them. After the initial leap, the clone will execute the Mind Slash sword chain.

name: Phantasmal Swordsman
description: Phantasm. Perform a sword strike and create an illusion that attacks your foe. If the sword strike hits, you gain might.

name: Phantasmal Duelist
description: Phantasm. Fire multiple crippling bullets at your target and summon an illusion that unloads its pistols on your target.

name: Ether Feast
description: Heal yourself and remove conditions. Gain additional health and remove additional conditions for each active clone.

name: Mirror
description: Manipulation. Reflect projectiles, and heal yourself.

name: Kick
description: Kick your foe.

name: Peck
description: Peck your foe.

name: Screech
description: Let out a moa screech.

name: Claw
description: Scratch your foe.

name: Arcane Thievery
description: Manipulation. Send conditions you have to your foe and steal their boons. Successfully hitting your target inflicts slow on them while granting you quickness.

name: Temporal Curtain
description: Create a wall of energy that grants swiftness to allies who cross it and cripples foes who touch it. Allies may cross the wall more than once but receive less swiftness after the first crossing.

name: Veil
description: Glamour. Create a wall that grants stealth to you and your allies.

name: Phantasmal Mage
description: Phantasm. Strike and burn nearby foes. Create an illusion that releases a massive wave of fire that burns, confuses, and interrupts foes.

name: Cry of Frustration
description: Shatter. Destroy all your clones, confusing nearby foes. The shatter effect also occurs at your location.

name: Mind Wrack
description: Shatter. Destroy all your clones, damaging nearby foes. The shatter effect also occurs at your location.

name: Distortion
description: Shatter. Gain distortion and destroy all your clones, gaining additional distortion for each one shattered.

name: Mind Blast
description: Create an explosion of magical energy, confusing your foe.

name: Portal Entre
description:
Glamour. Create an entry portal at your location that teleports allies to your exit portal.
(Creating a new entrance portal while you have an active portal will destroy the active portal.)

name: Portal Exeunt
description: Glamour. Create an exit portal.

name: Blink
description: Manipulation. Teleport to a target location.

name: Decoy
description: Clone. Gain stealth and summon an illusion to attack your foe.

name: Mirror Images
description: Clone. Summon two clones to attack your foe.

name: Null Field
description: Glamour. Create a field of energy that rips boons from foes and cures conditions on allies.

name: Mantra of Distraction
description: Mantra. Meditate, charging a spell that will daze your target. Shatter skill 3's recharge time is partially refunded when this spell fully charges.

name: Power Lock
description: Daze your target and nearby foes.

name: Mantra of Resolve
description: Mantra. Meditate, charging a spell that will cure conditions for you and nearby allies. Cure conditions on yourself and nearby allies when this spell is fully charged.

name: Power Cleanse
description: Remove conditions from you and nearby allies.

name: Mantra of Pain
description: Mantra. Meditate, charging a spell that will damage your target. Grant might to nearby allies when this spell is fully charged.

name: Power Spike
description: Damage your target and nearby foes. Inflict vulnerability on foes whose skills aren't active.

name: Mantra of Recovery
description: Mantra. Meditate, charging a spell that will instantly heal you when activated. Heal yourself and nearby allies when this spell fully charges.

name: Power Return
description: Instantly heal yourself. Receive increased healing if you are below the health threshold.

name: Phantasmal Warlock
description: Phantasm. Summon illusions that deal damage and inflict conditions.

name: Mind Stab
description: Stab an illusionary greatsword through the ground to cripple foes at your targeted location. This skill deals increased damage against vulnerable foes.

name: Spatial Surge
description: Shoot a beam at your foe. The farther away they are, the more damage you deal.

name: Illusionary Wave
description: Knock back foes with a wave of magical energy.

name: Phantasmal Berserker
description: Phantasm. Throw an illusionary greatsword at your foe, removing boons from struck enemies. Create a phantasm that whirls through foes.

name: Phantasmal Rogue
description: Phantasm. Summon a phantasmal rogue that deals increased damage from behind. If the rogue hits, the recharge of this skill is reduced.

name: Magic Bullet
description: Hit up to four foes with a single shot, inflicting confusion on each foe. In addition, the first target is stunned, the second is dazed, and the third is blinded.

name: Signet of Domination
description:
Signet Passive: Improved condition damage.
Signet Active: Stun your foe.

name: Signet of Midnight
description:
Signet Passive: Improves expertise.
Signet Active: Blind nearby foes and stealth yourself.

name: Signet of Inspiration
description:
Signet Passive: Grant swiftness and an additional random boon every ten seconds.
Signet Active: Extends the duration of all boons on yourself.

name: Mantra of Concentration
description: Mantra. Meditate, charging a spell that will break stuns and grant stability to nearby allies. Grant boons to nearby allies when this spell fully charges.

name: Power Break
description: Break stuns on yourself and grant stability to nearby allies.

name: Illusion of Life
description: Manipulation. Give allies Illusion of Life at the target location, allowing them to get up from downed state and keep fighting. Fully revives allies if they kill a foe.

name: Mass Invisibility
description: Manipulation. You and all your allies gain stealth for a short time.

name: Signet of Illusions
description:
Signet Passive: Creates a clone every few seconds.
Signet Active: Recharges shatter skills.

name: Phantasmal Mariner
description: Phantasm. Perform an evasive strike and create an illusion that evades while attacking your foe in a flurry.

name: Vortex
description: Create a vortex at your location, pulling nearby foes toward you.

name: Siren's Call
description: Unleash sonic energy that bounces between multiple foes, damaging and bleeding them. When it hits allies, it applies might, vigor, or swiftness.

name: Blinding Tide
description: Expose your enemies, inflicting vulnerability in an area.

name: Illusion of Drowning
description: Sink enemies around your target with an illusionary anchor.

name: Phantasmal Disenchanter
description: Phantasm. Summon an illusion that removes boons from targets it hits. This attack deals increased damage against foes without boons.

name: Winds of Chaos
description: Bounce an orb of energy between foes and allies. The first hit applies torment, while subsequent hits to enemies apply confusion. Allies that the orb bounces to gain fury and might.

name: Illusionary Counter
description: Clone. Block the next attack, and counter by inflicting torment and creating clones that cast Ether Bolt.

name: Illusionary Riposte
description: Clone. Block your foe and create an illusion when attacked.

name: Phantasmal Warden
description: Phantasm. Create a phantasm that throws axes at nearby targets and creates a defensive bubble, protecting itself and allies from projectiles.

name: The Prestige
description: Disappear in a cloud of smoke, blinding nearby foes and losing conditions. Reappear three seconds later, burning nearby foes.

name: Diversion
description: Shatter. Destroy all your clones, dazing their targets. The shatter effect also occurs at your location.

name: Ether Bolt
description: Chain. Shoot a bolt of energy at your target.

name: Ether Blast
description: Chain. Shoot a second bolt of energy at your target.

name: Ether Clone
description: Clone. Deliver a damaging attack directly to your target. Summon a clone that casts Ether Bolt. Inflict torment instead if you have the maximum number of illusions.

name: Feedback
description: Glamour. Create a dome around your foes that reflects projectiles.

name: Phase Retreat
description: Clone. Teleport away from your target, summoning a clone that casts Winds of Chaos.

name: Time Warp
description: Glamour. Create an area that warps time, granting you and your allies quickness while slowing enemies.

name: Counterspell
description: Shoot out a bolt that blinds enemies in a line and summons a clone to attack the first foe it strikes.

name: Stab
description: Chain. Stab your foe.

name: Jab
description: Chain. Jab your foe.

name: Evasive Strike
description: Evade while delivering a powerful final attack.

name: Feigned Surge
description: Clone. Surge toward your foe, striking enemies on the way and creating a clone upon reaching your initial target.

name: Slipstream
description: Create a current at your location that immobilizes enemies entering it and grants superspeed to allies passing through it.

name: Imminent Voyage
description: Clone. Retreat back, summoning a clone to attack your foe while granting chaos armor to nearby allies.

name: Phantasmal Whaler
description: Phantasm. Cast Siren's Call on nearby foes and create an illusion that confuses foes with a harpoon gun.

name: Chaos Armor
description: Blind and confuse nearby foes while you gain chaos aura. Chaos aura grants you a random boon and inflicts your foe with a random condition whenever you are struck.

name: Mirror Blade
description: Throw an illusionary blade that creates a clone at its first target and then bounces to enemies and allies, dealing less damage to foes per bounce and granting might to allies.

name: Blurred Frenzy
description: Strike your foe with a flurry of strikes, distorting the space around you, making you evade attacks.

name: Swap
description: Swap places with your clone. Immobilize nearby foes.

name: Phantasmal Defender
description: Phantasm. Summon an illusion that taunts your target and all nearby targets while blocking. When it finishes blocking, the illusion explodes, dealing increased damage for each attack it blocked.

name: Feedback
description: Glamour. Create a dome around you that reflects projectiles.

name: Counter Blade
description: Shoot out a bolt that dazes foes in a line.

name: Into the Void
description: Shatter your Temporal Curtain, pulling nearby enemies toward its position.

name: Deception
description: Clone. Shadowstep and create a downed clone of yourself to attack foes in range.

name: Bite
description: Bite your foe.

name: Chomp
description: Chomp your foe.

name: Frenzy
description: Attack nearby foes.

name: Flee
description: Flee from your enemies.

name: Spit
description: Spit at your foe to confuse them.

name: Time Warp
description: Glamour. Create an area that warps time, granting you and your allies quickness. Enemies in the field are slowed.

name: Well of Blood
description: Well. Conjure a well of blood to heal allies.

name: Ghastly Claws
description: Summon spectral claws to slash your foe in a quick flurry of strikes, gaining life force per strike. This attack deals increased damage per stack of vulnerability on your target.

name: Dark Pact
description: Bleed yourself. Immobilize your foe and remove their boons. Gain life force for each boon removed.

name: Grasping Dead
description: Summon skeletal hands to cripple foes in the target area.

name: Summon Bone Fiend
description: Minion. Summon a bone fiend that attacks foes at range. Delivers a crippling attack once every ten seconds.

name: Putrid Explosion
description: Explode a bone minion.

name: Summon Bone Minions
description: Minion. Summon two bone minions.

name: Summon Flesh Wurm
description: Minion. Summon an immobile flesh wurm to attack foes.

name: Blood Is Power
description: Corruption. Bleed yourself to grant might to allies around you and bleed your target.

name: Well of Corruption
description: Well. Target area pulses, converting boons on foes into conditions.

name: Well of Suffering
description: Well. Target area pulses, damaging foes and inflicting vulnerability.

name: Summon Blood Fiend
description: Minion. Summon a blood fiend that transfers health to you on each attack.

name: Consume Conditions
description: Corruption. Feast on your conditions, gaining health for each one consumed. You become vulnerable.

name: Plaguelands
description: Corruption. Create a virulent cloud that inflicts conditions on foes in its area. This plague inflicts additional conditions every second it persists. Inflict bleeding on yourself.

name: Lich Form
description:
Spectral. Assume the form of a lich for a brief time, improving your precision and vitality. Gain life force when this skill ends.
Entering this form removes other spectral effects.

name: Putrid Curse
description: Chain. Poison and bleed your foe.

name: Life Blast
description: Shroud. Blast your foe with life force.

name: Spinal Shivers
description: Chill your target and remove up to three boons, dealing extra damage based on the number of boons removed.

name: Wail of Doom
description: Screech a wail of doom in a cone pattern, inflicting fear on foes. (Does bonus defiance-bar damage to defiant foes.)

name: Locust Swarm
description: Grant swiftness to allies and summon a swarm of locusts that siphons health to you and your allies from nearby foes.

name: Fetid Ground
description: Create fetid ground that damages and poisons foes.

name: Life Leech
description: Leech a foe's health to heal yourself.

name: Rending Claws
description: Slash your foe twice with ghostly claws to make them vulnerable. Vulnerability applied increases against foes below the health threshold.

name: Plague Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Reduce incoming condition damage.
Signet Active: Send your conditions to a foe.

name: Rigor Mortis
description: Immobilize your bone fiend, and it will immobilize foes.

name: Death Shroud
description: Assume a spectral form and gain new skills, turning your life force into health.

name: Taste of Death
description: Sacrifice your blood fiend's health to heal yourself.

name: Spectral Armor
description: Spectral. Gain life force as you take damage.

name: End Death Shroud
description: Leave Death Shroud and return to your normal form.

name: Locked
description: You cannot use skills while transformed.

name: Doom
description: Shroud. Inflict fear on your foe.

name: Summon Shadow Fiend
description: Minion. Summon a shadow fiend to attack foes.

name: Haunt
description: Command your shadow fiend to teleport to a foe and attack all nearby foes, inflicting conditions.

name: Life Transfer
description: Shroud. Damage nearby foes and steal their life force.

name: Necrotic Grasp
description: Send out a grasping hand that damages foes in a line and grants you life force.

name: Necrotic Traversal
description: Sacrifice your flesh wurm, teleport to it, and poison foes.

name: Corrupt Boon
description: Corruption. Poison yourself. Transform boons on your foe into negative conditions.

name: Dark Path
description: Shroud. Send out a claw. If it hits a foe, it inflicts bleeding and chill on nearby foes and you may cast Dark Pursuit to shadowstep to the initial target.

name: Chillblains
description: Mark. Inscribe a mark that inflicts chill and poison on foes when triggered.

name: Epidemic
description:
Corruption. Apply vulnerability to yourself. Spread conditions on a target foe to all nearby foes at a reduced duration.
WvW only: does not affect structures or targets with resistance.

name: Well of Darkness
description: Well. Target area pulses, blinding foes with each pulse.

name: Spectral Ring
description:
Spectral. Create a spectral ring that protects allies and inflicts fear on foes. Gain life force when a foe is inflicted by fear from this skill.
This skill can only inflict fear on the same foe once per interval.

name: Well of Power
description: Well. Target area pulses, converting conditions on allies into boons and granting might.

name: Signet of Undeath
description:
Signet Passive: Generates life force while in combat.
Signet Active: Sacrifice health to revive one downed ally in a target area.

name: Signet of the Locust
description:
Signet Passive: Your movement speed is increased.
Signet Active:Strike and remove boons from nearby foes. Heal for each foe you strike and for each boon removed.

name: Dark Spear
description: Throw your spear and shadowstep to the first target it hits, delivering a rending strike in the area around you.

name: Reaper's Scythe
description: Reap life force from nearby foes.

name: Deadly Feast
description: Gain swiftness and summon a swarm of vampiric shrimp that siphon health from nearby foes.

name: Spectral Grasp
description: Spectral. Pull target foe and all nearby foes to you, chill them, and gain life force.

name: Signet of Spite
description:
Signet Passive: Improves power.
Signet Active: Inflict bleeding, blindness, crippled, poison, vulnerability, and weakness on your foe.

name: Crimson Tide
description: Send a devouring surge toward your enemy.

name: Feast
description: Weaken and damage foes around you. Gain life force per foe struck. Fire a Crimson Tide at each enemy in the area.

name: Foul Current
description: Dart at your foe and strike them with tremendous force, inflicting poison based on distance traveled. You constantly release Crimson Tide toward your target as you travel.

name: Sinking Tomb
description: Entomb your foe, making them sink. Fire Crimson Tide at your target multiple times.

name: Frozen Abyss
description: Create a continually expanding field near you that applies chill and vulnerability to enemies and deals damage when it ends. Fire Crimson Tide on each pulse at enemies within the maximum range.

name: Grim Specter
description:
Siphon health from nearby enemies over time, gaining vitality each time you hit an enemy.
Players struck by this ability lose equivalent vitality.

name: Ripple of Horror
description: Launch a wave that terrorizes foes it hits. You may activate March of Undeath to shadowstep to the wave.

name: Deathly Claws
description: Send out grasping claws to damage your foes.

name: Lich's Gaze
description: Fire a debilitating projectile at your target to corrupt their boons.

name: Summon Madness
description: Minion. Repeatedly summon minions that explode after a period of time if they are not killed.

name: Life Leech
description: Leech health from a foe to heal yourself.

name: Death Curse
description: Poison your foe and make them flee in fear.

name: Feeding Frenzy
description: Summon a school of undead fish to swarm your foe.

name: Gathering Plague
description: Draw conditions from nearby allies to yourself, and inflict weakness on yourself.

name: Dark Water
description: Blind and poison foes near your target with a dark cloud.

name: Wave of Fear
description: Terrify all foes in front of you with a wave of fear.

name: Summon Flesh Golem
description: Minion. Summon a flesh golem to attack foes with crippling claws.

name: Charge
description: Command your flesh golem to gain stability and charge a foe, knocking down or launching enemies in its path.

name: Fear
description: Make your foe flee in fear.

name: Withering Plague
description: Add bleeding to your plague.

name: Plague of Darkness
description: Add blindness to your plague.

name: Plague of Pestilence
description: Add cripple and weakness to your plague and increase its damage dealt.

name: Well of Blood
description: Well. Conjure a well of blood to heal allies.

name: Well of Corruption
description: Well. Target area pulses, converting boons on foes into conditions.

name: Well of Darkness
description: Well. Target area pulses, blinding foes with each pulse.

name: Well of Power
description: Well. Target area pulses, converting conditions on allies into boons.

name: Well of Suffering
description: Well. Target area pulses, damaging foes and inflicting vulnerability.

name: Spectral Walk
description: Spectral. Create a shadowy tether and become spectral, consuming conditions for life force. You may return to your initial position by using Spectral Recall.

name: Spectral Recall
description: Return to the point where Spectral Walk began.

name: Corrosive Poison Cloud
description: Corruption. Weaken yourself and envelope the target area in a noxious cloud that blocks enemy missiles and poisons foes and leaves them weakened.

name: Plague Blast
description: Blast a foe with a plague that transfers one condition to them.

name: Cruel Strike
description: Chain. Stab your foe.

name: Wicked Strike
description: Chain. Strike your foe again.

name: Wicked Spiral
description: Spin multiple times, dealing damage and applying vulnerability to each foe struck.

name: Deadly Catch
description: Whirl around, throwing spears that cripple foes and pull them to you.

name: Blood Curse
description: Chain. Bleed your foe.

name: Rending Curse
description: Chain. Bleed your foe.

name: Unholy Feast
description: Cripple nearby foes and remove their boons. Release an Unholy Burst on foes below the health threshold.

name: Necrotic Slash
description: Chain. Slash your foe twice.

name: Necrotic Stab
description: Chain. Strike your foe again.

name: Necrotic Bite
description: Strike your foe and gain life force.

name: Deathly Swarm
description: Unleash an insect swarm to blind and transfer conditions to your enemies.

name: Enfeebling Blood
description: Inflict weakness and bleeding on foes in the target area.

name: Feast of Corruption
description: Strike your target, gain life force, and corrupt boons on your foe. For each condition on your target up to the condition threshold, gain additional life force and inflict torment.

name: Mistfire Wolf
description: Summon a Mistfire Wolf to fight at your side.

name: Rending Lunge
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Technobabble
description: Daze target foe.

name: Radiation Field
description: Create a Radiation Field at target location, inflicting poison and weakness on foes.

name: Pain Inverter
description: Apply confusion to nearby foes. You gain resolution.

name: Summon 7-Series Golem
description: Summon a 7-Series attacking golem to fight for you.

name: Summon D-Series Golem
description: Summon a D-Series defensive golem.

name: Summon Power Suit
description: Summon a Power Suit which you or your allies can enter and use to combat foes.

name: Confusing Speech
description: Confuse nearby foes with complex calculations.

name: Pain Transference
description: Send out a bolt that steals a boon from your foe and gives them one condition from you.

name: Vent Radiation
description: Vent radioactive gas to poison nearby foes.

name: Shrapnel Mine
description: Throw a shrapnel mine that bleeds and cripples foes.

name: Battle Roar
description: Let out a battle roar, giving might and fury to nearby allies.

name: Hidden Pistol
description: Shoot target foe with a hidden pistol while evading backward.

name: Warband Support
description: Call in members of your warband to assist you.

name: Artillery Barrage
description: Call down an artillery barrage at target location, damaging foes.

name: Charrzooka
description: Pull out a powerful charrzooka that shoots rockets.

name: Fire Rocket
description: Shoot a rocket at your foe, setting them on fire.

name: Fire Rocket Barrage
description: Fire a barrage of rockets at the target location.

name: Rocket Jump
description: Blast the ground, damaging and knocking down nearby foes and leaping backward.

name: Rocket Spray
description: Knockback foes with a spread of rockets.

name: Heat Seeker
description: Fire a super-powered heat-seeking rocket.

name: Invigorating Roar
description: Let out an inspiring roar, removing weakness and vulnerability from allies and granting vigor.

name: Booby Trap
description: Place an explosive charge on yourself that is triggered by a melee attack.

name: Hidden Pistols
description: Draw both hidden pistols and unload a volley of bullets on your foe.

name: Prayer to Dwayna
description: Beseech Dwayna to restore your health.

name: Prayer to Kormir
description: Beseech Kormir to remove 3 conditions from you.

name: Prayer to Lyssa
description: Pray to Lyssa, granting a random boon to yourself and a random condition to target foe.

name: Hounds of Balthazar
description: Summon two Hounds of Balthazar to fight at your side.

name: Reaper of Grenth
description: Become a Reaper of Grenth, chilling and poisoning nearby foes.

name: Oakheart Swipe
description: Strike a nearby foe with a massive swipe.

name: Binding Roots
description: Entangle all nearby foes with binding roots, preventing them from moving until the roots have been destroyed.

name: Remove Avatar of Melandru
description: Remove the Avatar of Melandru, returning to your normal form.

name: Avatar of Melandru
description: Transform into an Avatar of Melandru.

name: Cleansing Leaves
description: Shake, removing conditions from nearby allies.

name: Summon Healing Spring
description: Slam your fist on the ground creating a healing area that heals allies.

name: Roar of the Forest
description: Embue allies with protection.

name: Blessing of Dwayna
description: Beseech Dwayna to restore health and grant regeneration to allies at target location.

name: Blessing of Kormir
description: Beseech Kormir to remove one condition from your allies at the target location.

name: Blessing of Lyssa
description: Pray to Lyssa, granting a random boon to allies and a random condition to foes at target location.

name: Charge
description: Hold down to charge at foes.

name: Become the Bear
description: Shape-shift into norn bear form.

name: Release the Bear
description: Shape-shift back from norn bear form.

name: Call Owl
description: Call upon an owl to attack and bleed your foe.

name: Leap
description: Leap onto foe, knocking them down.

name: Howl
description: Howl wildly, giving allies fury and regeneration.

name: Become the Wolf
description: Shape-shift into norn wolf form.

name: Release the Wolf
description: Shape-shift back from norn wolf form.

name: Prowl
description: Use Snow Leopard's grace to be unseen by your foes

name: Become the Snow Leopard
description: Shape-shift into norn snow leopard form.

name: Release the Snow Leopard
description: Shape-shift back from norn snow leopard form.

name: Become the Raven
description: Shape-shift into norn raven form.

name: Release the Raven
description: Shape-shift back from norn raven form.

name: Wind Blast
description: Blast foes with wind.

name: Rending Talons
description: Slash repeatedly at foe, inflicting bleeding.

name: Shriek
description: Let out a wild shriek, dazing nearby foes.

name: Swoop
description: Swoop at a target.

name: Swipe
description: Lash out with raven wings, damaging your target.

name: Call Wurm
description: Summon a wurm to fight for you.

name: Crippling Swipe
description: Lash out with raven wings, damaging and crippling your target.

name: Rending Swipe
description: Slash at your target, bleeding them twice.

name: Rending Slash
description: Slash at your target, bleeding them four times.

name: Blood Frenzy
description: Slash repeatedly at foe, stealing life.

name: Snarl
description: Let out a snarl, striking fear into your foes.

name: Dash
description: Dash at foes. Hold down to increase the length of the dash.

name: Frenzy
description: Slash repeatedly at foe.

name: Growl
description: Let out a growl, weakening foes.

name: Pounce
description: Leap onto foe, crippling them.

name: Swipe
description: Lash out with bear claws, damaging foes in front of you.

name: Brutal Swipe
description: Strike foes in front of you with bear claws, making them vulnerable.

name: Heavy Swipe
description: Swipe at your foe, knocking them back.

name: Roar
description: Roar, giving allies might.

name: Maul
description: Slash repeatedly at foe.

name: Eat Wurm Egg
description: Eat a wurm's egg to gain vigor and regeneration.

name: Eat Owl Egg
description: Eat an owl's egg to gain swiftnesss and regeneration.

name: Healing Seed
description: Create a healing seed at targeted location which periodically gives nearby allies regeneration.

name: Summon Druid Spirit
description: Summon a Druid Spirit to fight at your side.

name: Summon Sylvan Hound
description: Summon a sylvan hound to fight at your side.

name: Grasping Vines
description: Target foe becomes entangled by vines, and is unable to move until they have been destroyed.

name: Seed Turret
description: Create a Seed Turret at targeted location which will attack nearby foes.

name: Take Root
description: Take root at your current location, becoming immobile, but causing several turrets to grow nearby.

name: Throw Vine
description: Throw a vine and trip your foe.

name: Vine Shield
description: Block incoming attacks.

name: Leafy Bandage
description: Use natural bandages to heal yourself and remove bleeding, burning, and poison.

name: Ricochet
description: Bounce your axe between multiple foes, gaining might for each enemy struck.

name: Poison Volley
description: Fire a spread of five poison arrows. Poison lasts longer if you are flanking or behind the target or if you strike a defiant foe.

name: Barrage
description: Barrage the target area with a hail of arrows that cripple.

name: Crossfire
description: Fire an arrow that inflicts bleeding on your target. Attacks are stronger from behind or from the side or against defiant foes.

name: Slash
description: Chain. Slash your foe.

name: Crippling Thrust
description: Chain. Stab your foe, crippling them for a short time.

name: Precision Swipe
description: Deliver a blow to your foe. Your pet gains might for each foe struck.

name: Slash
description: Chain. Slash your foe.

name: Hilt Bash
description: Daze your foe with a hilt bash. Stun them if you hit from behind or they are defiant, and refresh your Maul skill.

name: Spike Trap
description: Trap. Set a trap that bleeds and launches foes.

name: Crippling Talon
description: Throw a dagger to bleed and cripple your foe.

name: Stalker's Strike
description: Stab and poison your foe while evading attacks. This attack deals increased damage and poison against movement-impaired foes.

name: Splitblade
description: Throw a spread pattern of five whirling axes that bleeds foes.

name: Serpent's Strike
description: Leap to your target and cripple them. If your target is disabled, defiant, or movement impaired, immobilize them instead.

name: Troll Unguent
description: Survival. You and your pet regenerate health over time.

name: Thunderclap
description: Damages your target and dazes foes around that target.

name: Throw Dirt
description: Throw a handful of dirt to bleed your foe.

name: Slice
description: Chain. Slice your foe.

name: Enduring Swing
description: Slash at your foe. This attack restores endurance if it hits.

name: Healing Spring
description: Trap. Heals you and your pet. Place a trap that grants regeneration and cures conditions on allies.

name: Winter's Bite
description: Throw an axe to chill the area around your foe. Your pet's next attack inflicts weakness.

name: Signet of the Wild
description:
Signet Passive: Increases the ferocity of you and your pet. 
Signet Active: Tap into the land to root foes around you.

name: Frost Trap
description: Trap. Set a trap that chills foes.

name: Storm Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a storm spirit at a target location and apply vulnerability to nearby enemies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Lightning Reflexes
description: Survival. Evade back with a crack of lightning, dealing damage and gaining vigor.

name: Stone Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a stone spirit at a target location and apply aegis to nearby allies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Viper's Nest
description: Trap. Set a trap that pulses poison on foes when triggered.

name: Frost Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a frost spirit at a target location and apply resistance to nearby allies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Sun Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a sun spirit at a target location and apply blindness to nearby enemies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Flame Trap
description: Trap. Set a trap that burns foes.

name: Signet of Stone
description:
Signet Passive: Improves toughness for you and your pet. 
Signet Active: You and your pet take no damage from attacks. You and your pet are still susceptible to conditions and control effects.

name: Muddy Terrain
description: Survival. Use mud to cripple, slow, and immobilize foes.

name: Signet of Renewal
description:
Signet Passive: You and your pet recover health. 
Signet Active: Grant resistance and resolution to your pet; it pulls conditions from nearby allies to itself.

name: Bonfire
description: Set a fire around you, damaging and burning foes.

name: Crippling Shot
description: Fire an arrow that cripples your target. If you are flanking or behind your target or your target is defiant, immobilize them. Your pet's next three attacks inflict bleeding.

name: Concussion Shot
description: Daze your foe with an arrow. Stun them if you hit from behind or from the side or if your foe is defiant.

name: Rapid Fire
description: Fire multiple arrows at your foe.

name: Long Range Shot
description: Shoot your foe from long range. The farther the arrow flies, the more damage it does.

name: Point-Blank Shot
description: Push back your foe with a point-blank shot. The closer they are, the farther it pushes them back.

name: Lick Wounds
description: Revive your pet at your location to revive you.

name: "Strength of the Pack!"
description: Command. Rampage with your pet, gaining stability, fury, and swiftness. You and your pet also grant might to each other when you attack.

name: Quick Shot
description: Fire a quick shot in an evasive retreat. Gain swiftness. This can be used while retreating.

name: Swoop
description: Run and leap at your foe, hitting them and nearby foes.

name: Counterattack
description: Block incoming attacks. If an attack is blocked, Counterattack Kick can be used.

name: Counterattack Kick
description: Kick your foe, knocking them backward.

name: Maul
description: Attack your foe with the force of a bear. Your pet gains an attack of opportunity.

name: Splinter Shot
description: Shoot a spear that splinters around your target, striking and bleeding multiple foes.

name: Mercy Shot
description: Fire a shot that strikes for more damage the less health your target has.

name: Feeding Frenzy
description: Drive piranhas into a feeding frenzy around your foe. Apply fury to your pet.

name: Coral Shot
description: Shoot a spear that collects sharp coral as it travels, causing more bleeding the farther it goes and cripples.

name: Ink Blast
description: Retreat backward, leaving a blinding trail in your wake.

name: Viper's Nest
description: Trap. Set a trap that pulses poison on foes when triggered.

name: Frost Trap
description: Trap. Set a trap that chills foes.

name: Sharpening Stone
description: Survival. Bleed foes with your next few attacks.

name: Signet of the Hunt
description:
Signet Passive: Grants 25% increased movement speed to you and your pet.
Signet Active: Attacks from you and your pet become unblockable, and you both gain superspeed.

name: Quickening Zephyr
description: Survival. You and your pet gain quickness and superspeed.

name: Man O' War
description: Strike your foe multiple times, then deliver a final immobilizing attack.

name: Stab
description: Chain. Stab your foe.

name: Jab
description: Chain. Jab your foe.

name: Toxic Strike
description: Deliver a final poisonous attack.

name: Surging Maw
description: Dart at your foe, inflicting more bleeding based on the amount of time spent charging.

name: Swirling Strike
description: Attack while reflecting projectiles.

name: Counterstrike
description: Prepare to throw your spear while blocking. If you block, push back your attacker with a kick.

name: Throw Knife
description: Throw a knife at your foe.

name: Spirit of Nature
description: Spirit. Summon a spirit at a target point and convert conditions on allies into boons. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Flame Trap
description: Trap. Set a trap that burns foes.

name: Hunter's Shot
description: Fire an arrow that grants you stealth when it hits an enemy. Your pet gains swiftness.

name: Entangle
description: Survival. Entangle foes around you with vines. Entangled foes bleed and are immobilized until the vines are destroyed.

name: Solar Flare
description: Your sun spirit slams the ground and releases the brilliance of the sun on nearby foes.

name: Call Lightning
description: Your storm spirit slams the ground and generates a powerful blast of electricity.

name: Quake
description: Your stone spirit slams the ground and creates an earthen blast that inhibits enemies.

name: Cold Snap
description: Your frost spirit slams the ground and creates a cold snap that cleanses conditions from nearby allies.

name: Nature's Renewal
description: Your spirit of nature slams the ground and creates a blast of vital energy that revives nearby downed allies.

name: Hunter's Call
description: Call hawks to swarm your foe.

name: Call of the Wild
description: Daze and weaken nearby enemies. Grant fury, might, and swiftness to yourself and nearby allies.

name: Counter Throw
description: Throw your spear at foes.

name: "Protect Me!"
description: Command. Gain protection and barrier while breaking allies out of stuns.

name: "Guard!"
description: Command. Order your pet to guard nearby allies; your pet takes damage on behalf of those allies. Gain might when your pet receives damage.

name: "Sic 'Em!"
description: Command. Your pet rushes at your foe, revealing them and dealing increased damage.

name: Throw Torch
description: Throw your torch and burn your foes in an area.

name: Path of Scars
description: Throw your axe so that it returns to you, striking foes each way.

name: Whirling Defense
description: Spin your axes around you to attack nearby foes.

name: Icy Bite
description: Beast. Bite your foe, chilling them.

name: Mighty Roar
description: Beast. Give extreme might to nearby allies.

name: Rending Maul
description: Beast. Make your foe bleed with a fierce mauling.

name: Shake It Off
description: Beast. Cure a condition on yourself and all nearby allies.

name: Icy Roar
description: Beast. Roar fiercely, freezing nearby foes.

name: Fire Breath
description: Beast. Breathe a cone of fire that burns foes.

name: Poison Barbs
description: Beast. Spray poisonous barbs in an arc in front of you, damaging and poisoning foes.

name: Poisonous Cloud
description: Beast. Spit a ball of venom that covers an area with a poisonous cloud.

name: Twin Darts
description: Fire two shots from your tail that bleed your enemy.

name: Rending Barbs
description: Beast. Rapidly launch projectiles that bleed your target.

name: Rending Pounce
description: Beast. Leap at a foe and make them bleed.

name: Stalk
description:
Beast. Gain stealth and increased critical-strike chance and ferocity for a short duration. Grant your ranger stealth.
This skill will not grant your ranger stealth if they are downed.

name: Enfeebling Roar
description: Beast. Roar fiercely, weakening nearby foes.

name: Poison Cloud
description: Beast. Emit a noxious cloud that poisons and damages foes.

name: Enfeebling Maul
description: Beast. Maul your foe, weakening them.

name: Icy Maul
description: Beast. Maul your foe fiercely and chill them.

name: Poisonous Maul
description: Beast. Maul your foe fiercely and poison them.

name: Purge Conditions
description: Beast. Purge all conditions from yourself.

name: Icy Pounce
description: Beast. Leap at your foe, chilling them.

name: Boil
description: Beast. Boil the water around your foe.

name: Frost Breath
description: Beast. Breathe a cone of frost, damaging and chilling foes.

name: Frost Nova
description: Beast.  Freeze the water around your foe.

name: Lightning Breath
