description: The water is charged with an electrical current.

name: Sonic Shriek
description: Beast. Emit a cone of discordant sonic energy to confuse foes.

name: Sonic Barrier
description: Beast. Create a sonic barrier that reflects projectiles.

name: Cloak and Dagger
description: Stab your foe and vanish in stealth, leaving them vulnerable.

name: Shadow Portal
description: Unleash shadow magic at your prepared location, creating a one-way portal for you and your allies. Allies traveling through the portal gain stealth. Weakens foes around the portal's exit.

name: Spin
description: A spinning area attack.

name: Punch
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Pound
description: A basic melee knockdown.

name: Overload
description: A spinning area attack.

name: Magnetic Leap
description: Pull yourself to your magnetically grasped foe and deliver a strike.

name: Drop Mine
description: Drop a mine that deals damage to enemies that trigger it.

name: Magnetic Bomb
description: Set a timed charge that pulls nearby foes.

name: Superspeed
description: Run at double speed.

name: Fire Shield
description: Activate a fire shield that burns enemies who strike you, granting might for each burn applied.

name: Magnetic Aura
description: Become surrounded in a magnetic shield that reflects projectiles.

name: Glue Trail
description: Leave a trail of glue behind you that hampers enemy movement.

name: Dhuumfire
description: Blast your foe with life force, setting them alight.

name: Reaper's Mark
description: Mark. Inscribe a mark that inflicts fear on foes when triggered.

name: Putrid Mark
description: Mark. Inscribe a mark that damages enemies and transfers your conditions to them when triggered.

name: Mark of Blood
description: Mark. Inscribe a mark that bleeds foes when they trigger it, and grants regeneration to allies.

name: Tainted Shackles
description: Shroud. Begin binding nearby enemies with your life force, pulsing out conditions; they can break this binding if they get far enough away from you. Bound foes are immobilized if the binding finishes.

name: Elixir X
description: Elixir. Drink Elixir X to become a rampaging brute, whirling tornado, or powerful lich. Underwater, become either a withering plague or a whirlpool.

name: Lacerating Slash
description: Beast. Slash your foes and cause them to bleed.

name: Shield Smash
description: Smash your foe with the magnetic shield.

name: Stone Sheath
description: Block the next attack and cause bleeding to foes around you. Gain Tectonic Shift if you successfully block an attack.

name: Arcane Brilliance
description: Arcane. Blast the area, hitting foes with critical damage and healing yourself. Healing effectiveness is increased per target hit. If this skill finishes a combo, you heal an additional amount.

name: A.E.D.
description: Gadget. Activate your A.E.D., enabling the system to heal you after a brief period of time. If you take lethal damage while A.E.D. is active, it ends and heals you for a large amount and removes conditions.

name: Static Shock
description: Use your A.E.D. to stun an enemy.

name: Litany of Wrath
description: Meditation. Heal yourself. For a brief time, heal yourself based on a percentage of damage dealt to enemies.

name: Signet of the Ether
description:
Signet Passive: Heal yourself whenever you summon an illusion.
Signet Active: Heal yourself and reduce the recharge of phantasm skills.

name: Signet of Vampirism
description:
Signet Passive: Steal health from nearby foes while in combat.
Signet Active: Heal yourself and mark a foe. Allied players will siphon life from the marked enemy.

name: Water Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a water spirit at a target location and heal yourself and your pet. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Aqua Surge
description: Your water spirit slams the ground and creates a wave that heals nearby allies.

name: Skelk Venom
description: Venom. Heal yourself. Your next few attacks heal you.

name: Lesser Endure Pain
description: Stance. Take no damage from attacks. You are still susceptible to conditions and control effects.

name: Defiant Stance
description: Stance. Heal yourself. Absorb all incoming strikes for a period of time.

name: Mistlock Instability: Earthquake
description: An earthquake occasionally erupts beneath players and enemies, damaging and knocking them all back.

name: Mystic Rebuke
description: Lash out against nearby foes.

name: Lesser Cleansing Fire
description: Cantrip. Cure conditions and burn foes. Gain might for each condition removed.

name: Arcane Wave
description: Arcane. Blast foes in the target area with an energy wave for critical damage.

name: Rocket
description: Fire a rocket out of your belt that explodes on impact.

name: Rocket Turret
description: Turret. Build a turret that fires rockets. This turret overcharges when it is first placed.

name: Dhuumfire
description: Blast a foe with a plague that transfers one condition to them.

name: Lightning Rod
description: Call down lightning on a disabled foe.

name: Bunker Down
description: Detonates when enemies draw near.

name: Poison Nova
description: Corruption. Release a noxious explosion and leave behind a cloud that poisons foes in the area.

name: Renewal of Fire
description: Glyph. Revive an ally; you're revived the next time you're downed.

name: Renewal of Air
description: Glyph. Revive and teleport an ally to your location.

name: Renewal of Water
description: Glyph. Revive an ally with full health.

name: Renewal of Earth
description: Glyph. Revive allies around you.

name: Signet of Mercy
description:
Signet Passive: Improves concentration.
Signet Active: Revive a nearby downed ally.

name: Signet of Undeath
description:
Signet Passive: Generates life force while in combat.
Signet Active: Sacrifice health to revive one nearby downed ally.

name: Thousand Cuts
description: Psionic. Open a portal that devastates targets in a line in front of you with a flurry of blades.

name: Shocking Bolt
description: Command your air elemental to fire a stunning bolt at its target.

name: Glyph of Lesser Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon a lesser fire elemental.

name: Glyph of Lesser Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon a lesser water elemental.

name: Glyph of Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon an elemental based on your attunement.

name: Glyph of Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon an elemental based on your attunement.

name: Glyph of Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon an elemental based on your attunement.

name: Glyph of Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon an elemental based on your attunement.

name: Crashing Waves
description: Command your ice elemental to knock back its target and then release a wave of water that heals allies and removes a condition.

name: Glyph of Lesser Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon a lesser air elemental.

name: Glyph of Lesser Elementals
description: Glyph. Summon a lesser earth elemental.

name: Stomp
description: Command your earth elemental to stomp the ground, granting protection to allies and crippling foes.

name: Flame Barrage
description: Command your fire elemental to bombard its target and surrounding foes with burning bolts and then release a burst of fire around itself.

name: Phantasmal Blade
description: Shoots a blade at the phantasm's current target.

name: Illusion of Life
description: Manipulation. Give allies Illusion of Life at the target location, allowing them to get up from downed state and keep fighting. Fully revives allies if they kill a foe.

name: Lesser Arcane Shield
description: Arcane. Block attacks with an energy shield. If it blocks three attacks, it explodes.

name: Vengeful Hammers
description: Legendary Dwarf. Invoke hammers to circle around you, damaging foes.

name: Facet of Strength
description: Legendary Dragon. Facet. Place the Facet of Strength on yourself to grant nearby allies might every few seconds.

name: Manifest Toxin
description: Deliver a crushing blow that sends toxic energy chaining to enemies behind each target.

name: Forced Engagement
description: Legendary Dwarf. Launch a chain at your target. When the chain connects with a foe, it slows and taunts them. You take less damage from taunted foes.

name: Resist the Darkness
description: Legendary Demon. End Embrace the Darkness early.

name: Unrelenting Assault
description: Shadowstep and unleash fierce attacks on nearby foes. Gain might each time you damage a foe.

name: Anguish Swipe
description: Sweep your mace back for a second blow.

name: Protective Solace
description:
Legendary Centaur. Summon a protective barrier around the tablet that blocks enemy projectiles. 

If this skill is empowered, it also grants protection to allies around the tablet.

name: Enchanted Daggers
description: Legendary Assassin. Summon enchanted daggers that will attack as you attack, siphoning life from targets hit.

name: Release Hammers
description: Legendary Dwarf. Release the hammers to end Vengeful Hammers.

name: Facet of Elements
description: Legendary Dragon. Facet. Place the Facet of Elements on yourself to grant nearby allies swiftness every few seconds.

name: Natural Harmony
description:
Legendary Centaur. Collect energy, pulling it into the tablet to build up its power. After a short delay the energy will be released, healing nearby allies. 

If this skill is empowered, healing is increased and endurance is granted to affected allies.

name: Forceful Displacement
description: Displace your foe through the Mists, forcing them away from you.

name: Misery Swipe
description: Swing your mace at your foe.

name: Deathstrike
description: Shadowstep to your foe and deliver a quick attack, then deliver a second devastating blow if it hits.

name: Gaze of Darkness
description: Legendary Dragon. Consume. Consume Facet of Darkness to reveal the area around you, pulling foes out of stealth and blinding them.

name: Impossible Odds
description: Legendary Assassin. Empower yourself with Shiro's incredible speed and destructive prowess, gaining great movement speed and striking foes an additional time when you hit them. This effect can occur once per interval.

name: Elemental Blast
description: Legendary Dragon. Consume. Consume Facet of Elements to cover the target area in magical dragon breath.

name: Dome of the Mists
description: Create an area that blocks projectiles and weakens foes.

name: Facet of Light
description: Legendary Dragon. Facet. Place the Facet of Light on yourself to grant nearby allies regeneration every few seconds.

name: Infuse Light
description: Legendary Dragon. Consume. Consume Facet of Light to heal yourself and convert all incoming strikes to heals for a short duration.

name: Leaping Slice
description: A lunging melee attack.

name: Pain Absorption
description: Legendary Demon. Grant resistance to yourself and nearby allies. Absorb conditions from those allies, gaining resolution and additional resistance per condition.

name: Energy Expulsion
description:
Legendary Centaur. Force energy to erupt from the tablet, knocking down nearby foes and healing nearby allies. 

If this skill is empowered, grant stability to allies near the tablet.

name: Soothing Stone
description: Legendary Dwarf. Remove conditions and heal yourself. Gain resolution.

name: Banish Enchantment
description: Legendary Demon. Deal damage, apply chill, and remove boons from your foe.

name: Slash
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Diminish Solace
description: Collapse the protective barrier that formed around the tablet.

name: Field of the Mists
description: Create a field from the Mists that blocks incoming projectiles in front of you, then fire bolts at foes around your target.

name: Purifying Essence
description:
Legendary Centaur. Remove conditions from allies near the tablet, and heal them for a small amount per condition removed. 

If this skill is empowered, remove additional conditions from allies.

name: Facet of Chaos
description: Legendary Dragon. Facet. Place the Facet of Chaos on yourself to grant nearby allies protection every few seconds.

name: Vengeful Blast
description: Pull energy towards you from the Mists, damaging nearby foes. The damage is increased as the energy is drawn inwards.

name: Call to Anguish
description: Legendary Demon. Leap toward the targeted area and pull foes toward your landing point.

name: Echoing Eruption
description: Leap at your foe and deliver a massive attack that cascades outward.

name: Rite of the Great Dwarf
description: Legendary Dwarf. Channel the power of the Rite of the Great Dwarf to turn yourself and nearby allies to stone to reduce incoming damage.

name: Phase Smash
description: Leap through the Mists to the target area. When you land, damage and chill foes in an area, then teleport back to your previous location.

name: Frigid Blitz
description: Hurl your axe at your target, damaging and chilling the foes the axe passes through. When the axe reaches your target, shadowstep to it and deliver a large blow.

name: Chaotic Release
description: Legendary Dragon. Consume. Consume Facet of Chaos, releasing chaotic winds damaging and knocking back foes while granting superspeed to allies. Facet of Chaos will be disabled while this skill is recharging.

name: Legendary Dragon Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary dragon Glint.

name: Drop the Hammer
description: Summon a massive hammer from the Mists to strike the ground. Recharge Coalescence of Ruin if you strike an enemy.

name: Burst of Strength
description: Legendary Dragon. Consume. Consume Facet of Strength, granting increased damage for successful hits. Facet of Strength will be disabled while this skill is recharging.

name: Legendary Assassin Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary assassin Shiro Tagachi.

name: Essence Sap
description: Throw energy at your target, slowing them.

name: Legendary Centaur Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary centaur Ventari.

name: Empowering Misery
description: Legendary Demon. Heal yourself. Gain might and heal more for each condition currently applied to you.

name: Phase Traversal
description: Legendary Assassin. Step through the Mists to your target. Your next few attacks can't be blocked.

name: Coalescence of Ruin
description: Slam the ground with your hammer, creating a cascading eruption of energy.

name: Crystal Hibernation
description: Channel a shield from the Mists to protect you, blocking attacks and regenerating the health of nearby allies.

name: Embrace the Darkness
description: Legendary Demon. Summon the power of the legendary demon to transform into a powerful avatar. Pulse torment to nearby foes. Using skills that cost energy increases the torment applied on the next pulse.

name: Searing Fissure
description: Smash your mace into the ground, causing flames to erupt from the Mists. The first strike of this attack is more powerful.

name: Facet of Darkness
description: Legendary Dragon. Facet. Place the Facet of Darkness on yourself to grant nearby allies fury every few seconds.

name: Relinquish Power
description: Legendary Assassin. End the Impossible Odds skill.

name: Maul
description: A series of melee attacks.

name: Jade Winds
description: Legendary Assassin. Call upon the Jade Wind to turn nearby enemies into jade, stunning them for a short duration.

name: Temporal Rift
description: Slice into the Mists, creating an unstable rift. After a short duration, this rift will collapse in on itself, pulling in enemies.

name: Legendary Dwarf Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary dwarf King Jalis Ironhammer.

name: Ventari's Will
description: Legendary Centaur. Will the tablet toward the target location.

name: Shackling Wave
description: Slice through the air, sending a wave of energy from the Mists toward your foe and dealing rapid strikes. Immobilize duration is increased per target you strike.

name: Legendary Demon Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary demon Mallyx the Unyielding.

name: Inspiring Reinforcement
description: Legendary Dwarf. Create a stone road that damages and weakens foes as it's created. Once it's created it will pulse, granting stability to allies.

name: Hammer Bolt
description: Hurl your weapon at enemies, striking foes in its path.

name: Duelist's Preparation
description: Assume a defensive stance, blocking incoming attacks.

name: Deathstrike
description: Deliver a second devastating blow.

name: Igniting Brand
description: Throw your spear at your foe. Upon impact, damage your foe and connect to them through the Mists. While the connection is active it will apply burning.

name: Spear of Anguish
description: Throw a mist spear toward your foe, inflicting increasing durations of torment the closer the foe is to you.

name: Frigid Discharge
description: Detonate the sphere to cause it to explode, damaging and chilling foes.

name: Devour Brand
description: Step through the Mists toward the branded foe, dealing damage in an area to nearby foes.

name: Venomous Sphere
description: Launch a sphere outward from the Mists. The sphere will attack nearby foes as it travels, poisoning them.

name: Rapid Assault
description: Rapidly strike foes in front of you, inflicting vulnerability.

name: Rift Containment
description: Create two rifts, one above and one below your target. After a short delay, these rifts will create a barrier from the Mists, preventing foes from crossing.

name: Rift Slash
description: Slash foes, creating a rift on them that explodes for additional damage after a short delay.

name: Surge of the Mists
description: Charge forward, knocking back enemies that cross your path.

name: Rejuvenating Assault
description: Cleave foes around you with your staff, healing nearby allies.

name: Preparation Thrust
description: Stab your foe with your sword, inflicting vulnerability.

name: Natural Harmony
description:
Legendary Centaur. Collect energy, pulling it into the tablet to build up its power. After a short delay the energy will be released, healing nearby allies. 

If this skill is empowered, healing is increased and endurance is granted to affected allies.

name: Energy Expulsion
description:
Legendary Centaur. Force energy to erupt from the tablet, knocking down nearby foes and healing nearby allies. 

If this skill is empowered, grant stability to allies near the tablet.

name: Mender's Rebuke
description: Smash the ground in front of you to damage foes. After a delay, allies in the area are healed. Heals for more if an enemy was struck.

name: Project Tranquility
description:
Project Ventari's Tablet into the world. The tablet will heal allies near it every few seconds.
(The tablet will disappear if you move outside the tether distance.)

name: Rapid Swipe
description: Swipe your staff at your foe.

name: Purifying Essence
description:
Legendary Centaur. Remove conditions from allies near the tablet, and heal them for a small amount per condition removed. 

If this skill is empowered, remove additional conditions from allies.

name: Riposting Shadows
description: Legendary Assassin. Dodge backward through the Mists. Remove movement-impairing conditions, and gain fury.

name: Chilling Isolation
description: Strike all nearby foes, then release a burst of mist energy that deals a second strike. The second strike deals bonus damage if it hits only one enemy.

name: Tail Stab
description: A heavy melee attack.

name: Brutal Blade
description: Slice foes, damaging them and inflicting vulnerability.

name: Warding Rift
description: Create a rift from the Mists that blocks incoming attacks. When the rift closes it blinds foes in front of you.

name: Protective Solace
description:
Legendary Centaur. Summon a protective barrier around the tablet that blocks enemy projectiles. 

If this skill is empowered, it also grants protection to allies around the tablet.

name: Renewing Wave
description: Release a burst of Mists energy that heals and removes conditions from allies. Create a healing orb for each ally that loses conditions.

name: Forceful Bash
description: Bash your foe with your staff.

name: Facet of Nature
description: Legendary Dragon. Facet. Place the Facet of Nature on yourself to grant nearby allies enhancements based on your channeled legend.

name: Envoy of Exuberance
description: Send the energy of Glint toward the target area, releasing a burst of energy that heals allies and grants boons.

name: True Nature
description: Legendary Dragon. Consume. Consume Facet of Nature to unify allies, granting them your boons. Facet of Nature will be disabled while this skill is recharging.

name: "You Are All Weaklings!"
description: Shout. Damage foes around you and gain boons. Inflict conditions on struck foes, and gain boons per foe struck. Deal additional damage and gain additional boons when striking foes within melee range.

name: Overload Water
description:
Overload. Create a surge of accumulated water magic, healing and cleansing allies. When the cast ends, heal the area and apply regeneration.
Using this skill causes the attunement to have a longer recharge.

name: Life Rend
description: Chain. Shroud. Cleave foes in front of you. This skill inherits traits from Life Blast.

name: Lesser Call of the Wild
description: Weaken nearby enemies. Grant fury, might, and swiftness to yourself and nearby allies.

name: Sand Squall
description: Apply protection to you and your allies, then increase the duration of all boons currently existing on you and your allies. Gain magnetic aura.

name: Life Slash
description: Chain. Shroud. Cleave foes in front of you again. This skill inherits traits from Life Blast.

name: Detonate
description: Detonate your mine to damage foes and remove a boon from them.

name: Reconstruction Field
description: Establish a defensive field, granting protection to allies in its area.

name: Toss Elixir X
description: Elixir. Toss your Elixir X forward. When the bottle bursts, transform enemies in the area into tuna.

name: Impact Strike
description: Physical. Strike your enemy and stun them.

name: Detonate Supply Crate Turrets
description: Detonate your supply crate turrets.

name: Signet of Humility
description:
Signet Passive: Reduces duration of incoming stuns, dazes, fears, and taunts.
Signet Active: Transform your foe into a moa bird.
(Defiant foes will have their defiant bar reduced instead.)

name: Eternal Champion
description: Exit berserk mode.

name: Rocket Boots
description: Gadget. Fly forward, damaging foes with your rocket exhaust. Cures immobilized, crippled, and chilled. Gain superspeed when this skill ends.

name: Well of Precognition
description: Well. Create a well that gives allies the ability to see the future, allowing them to block incoming attacks. When the well ends, allies within the well regain endurance.

name: Wildfire
description: Release a fiery torrent that burns enemies.

name: "Wash the Pain Away!"
description: Shout. Mists billow from you, healing allies in range and cleansing conditions.

name: Bandage Blast
description: Fire several bandages ahead of you to heal allies.

name: Heat Sync
description: Give might and fury to yourself, then spread boons you have to allies.

name: Glyph of the Tides
description: Glyph. Pulls enemies toward you.

name: Spiteful Spirit
description: Cripple nearby foes and remove their boons. Gain resolution for each foe you strike. Remove additional boons on foes below the health threshold.

name: Mimic
description:
Manipulation. The next utility skill you use has significantly reduced recharge, and Mimic's recharge is increased by the original recharge of the affected skill.
Mimic's recharge cannot be reset by other mesmer skills.

name: Utility Goggles
description: Gadget. Break out of stun, gaining resistance, clearing blindness, and removing damaging conditions.

name: Chilling Nova
description: Create a nova at the target that damages and chills nearby foes.

name: Invisible Analysis
description: Analyze a stealthed foe, applying vulnerability.

name: Sundering Leap
description: Rage. Leap to a location, dealing damage and inflicting conditions on all foes in the area. Extends the duration of berserk mode if it hits.

name: Overload Earth
description:
Overload. Ride your stored earth magic around, granting protection to other allies you move over and crippling enemies, then deliver a final immobilizing blast of power to the area, leaving behind a dust cyclone that delivers the same effects as the overload.
Using this skill causes the attunement to have a longer recharge.

name: Deflecting Shot
description: Fire a missile that knocks back enemies and blocks missiles.

name: Finishing Blow
description: Deal a downward strike on your foe. Downed enemies struck with this ability are finished.

name: Gun Flame
description: Primal Burst. Fire a fast, flaming shot that explodes on the first foe it hits, interrupting foes in the area.

name: Deja Vu
description: Phantasm. Block incoming attacks for a short duration. If this skill fully channels, summon a phantasm that slows enemies and grants protection to allies. If an attack is blocked, the phantasm is summoned immediately.

name: Bypass Coating
description: Splash a hypercoating on nearby allies, granting superspeed.

name: "Nothing Can Save You!"
description: Shout. Damage foes around you, converting their boons into vulnerability. Your next few attacks become unblockable. Deal additional damage and gain additional unblockable attacks when striking foes within melee range.

name: Skull Grinder
description: Primal Burst. Unleash a powerful skull strike that dazes your target and inflicts multiple conditions.

name: Dusk Strike
description: Chain. Cleave foes in front of you.

name: Overload Fire
description:
Overload. Unleash your flames, granting might to allies and burning enemies. Finishing the cast creates a tornado that continues to grant might and burn foes.
Using this skill causes the attunement to have a longer recharge.

name: Terrify
description: Shroud. Make foes around you flee in fear.

name: Cleansing Pulse
description: Cleanse a condition from nearby allies.

name: Med Pack Drop
description: Call down a supply drop of med packs into a target area.

name: Overload Air
description:
Overload. Use your air magic to summon a nimbus that repeatedly strikes nearby enemies. When this ability is complete, imbue your allies with electricity and create a lingering static region that strikes enemies at the same interval.
Using this skill causes the attunement to have a longer recharge.

name: Detonate Elixir X
description: Elixir. Transform. Burst the bottle, transforming enemies.

name: Purge Gyro
description: Well. Deploy a purge gyro to remove conditions from allies in the area.

name: Grasping Darkness
description: Conjure claws of darkness from the shadows to attack foes, applying a condition to them and pulling them to you. Gain quickness if you strike a foe and gain life force for each struck foe.

name: Bandage Self
description: Bandage your wounds and heal yourself.

name: Negative Bash
description: Chain. Slam your hammer into your foe to leave them vulnerable.

name: Test of Faith
description: Trap. Lay a trap that creates a ring of weapons that punishes enemies that attempt to cross their threshold. Passthrough damage is increased against disabled targets.

name: Symbol of Energy
description: Symbol. Fire a slow, arcing arrow that explodes on impact to burn targets and sear a symbol of energy into the ground.

name: Lesser Utility Goggles
description: Gadget. Gain resistance, clear blindness, and remove damaging conditions.

name: Continuum Split
description:
Destroy all your clones and create a rift in the space-time continuum. When it expires, you will revert back to your original point with your previous health, endurance, and skill recharges. Duration increases with each illusion shattered.
This skill's recharge cannot be reset by other mesmer skills.

name: Shock Shield
description: Block attacks while striking foes in front of you, gaining barrier with each enemy you hit.

name: Blaze Breaker
description: Smash your torch into the ground, creating a deadly shock wave that conditions foes.

name: Arc Divider
description: Primal Burst. Spin to create a violent shock wave that damages nearby foes.

name: Nightfall
description: Call down a growing column of shadows that damages and applies conditions to foes every pulse. The initial strike blinds foes and converts their boons into conditions. Gain life force while inside the area.

name: Well of Senility
description: Well. Creates a well that steals memories from foes, damaging and chilling them. When it expires, foes still inside the well have boons removed from them.

name: Chilling Scythe
description: Chain. Strike foes and chill them. A successful strike reduces the recharge on Gravedigger.

name: Spear of Justice
description:
Virtue. Burn foes every few attacks.
Activate: Hurl a spear of light that passes through foes. Enemies struck become tethered and receive conditions periodically.

name: Aim-Assisted Rocket
description: Fire a seeking rocket at your foe.

name: Drop Gunk
description: Drop gunk at your location to inflict a random condition.

name: Stow Mortar Kit
description: Stow the mortar kit.

name: Weakening Whirl
description: Deliver multiple strikes, weakening foes.

name: Shredder Gyro
description: Well. Deploy a shredder gyro to attack foes in the area and repeatedly use whirl finishers.

name: Scorched Earth
description: Primal Burst. Fire a burning shot into the ground that creates a trail of flaming destruction.

name: Flames of War
description: Cleanse conditions and become a mobile fire field that burns nearby foes. When the field expires, it explodes, damaging foes and burning them again.

name: Wild Blow
description: Rage. Lash out with a critical attack that knocks down your foes. Extend the duration of berserk mode if this attack hits.

name: "Flash-Freeze!"
description: Shout. Unleash a torrent of ice on enemy locations, chilling those who cannot escape. Grant frost aura to allies in range.

name: Infusing Terror
description: Shroud. Shroud yourself with dark armor that grants stability and reduces incoming damage. While the armor is active, you may reactivate this skill to inflict fear on foes around you.

name: "Feel My Wrath!"
description: Shout. Grant fury and quickness to nearby allies. The duration of the quickness you grant yourself is doubled.

name: "Rebound!"
description: Shout. Shout and infuse your allies with arcane energy. Allies who would take lethal damage while this is active ignore the deathblow and are healed instead. If the effect expires naturally, grant an aura based on your current attunement.

name: Lesser Signet of Might
description: Signet. Your attacks become unblockable.

name: Personal Battering Ram
description: Gadget. Launch a target foe with a concealed ram head. The ram explodes on contact, burning foes.

name: Cyclone
description: Blast out a cyclone that pulls enemies toward its location and grants swiftness to allies it affects.

name: Purification
description: Trap. Heal yourself and imbue your light into a trap. Enemies that trigger this trap are damaged and blinded as the light returns to you for a second heal.

name: Defense Field
description: Project a defensive dome and grant stability to allies in the area.

name: Shield of Courage
description:
Virtue. Grants aegis periodically.
Activate: Grant aegis to nearby allies and create a shield in front of you that blocks attacks. You are vulnerable from the sides and behind while this shield is active.

name: Elixir Shell
description: Elixir. Launch a mortar round that heals allies in the target area.

name: Shield of Courage
description:
Virtue. Grants aegis periodically.

description:
Virtue: Regenerates health.

Psionic. Drop a massive blade on a location, immobilizing enemies. This attack deals increased damage against controlled, downed, or defiant foes. Does bonus defiance-bar damage to defiant foes.
Controls include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

description: Releases a wave of chaotic mists, damaging and knocking back enemies in its path.

name: Solar Bolt
description: Unleashes a bolt of solar energy, burning enemies in the target area.

name: Explode
description: The solar bloom reaches critical mass, exploding and knocking back anything in the area. If the explosion hits a reactor, the reactor is destroyed.

name: Horizon Strike
description: Damages enemies with a solar blast. Followed by Crimson Dawn.

name: Horizon Strike
description: Damages enemies with a series of chaotic blasts.

name: Solar Blast
description: Overcharges Horrik's Cannon, unleashing a blast of blinding radiance that damages any foe looking at it.

name: Red Marble
description: Causes heavy damage and applies conditions.

name: Bowler Marble
description: Causes heavy damage and applies conditions.

name: Solar Fury
description: Targets all players and launches a bouncing projectile toward their location, leaving fire after each bounce.

name: Focused Anger
description: Releases a wave of chaotic mists, damaging and knocking back enemies in its path.

name: Horizon Strike
description: Damages enemies with a series of chaotic blasts.

name: Crimson Dawn
description: Blasts the platform with solar energy, damaging enemies in the area.

name: Radiant Fury
description: Blinds and burns all players, damaging allies around them.

name: Horizon Strike
description: Damages enemies with a solar blast. Followed by Crimson Dawn.

name: Rolling Chaos
description: Rolls a ball of chaotic energy across the platform, heavily damaging foes in its path.

name: Crimson Dawn
description: Blasts the platform with solar energy, damaging enemies in the area.

name: Punishing Kick
description: Releases a wave of chaotic mists, damaging and knocking back enemies in its path.

name: Spiral Strike
description: Spins around, damaging and knocking back nearby enemies, and sending out a volley of bolts.

name: Jab
description: Hits foes with a quick punch.

name: Combustion Rush
description: Rushes the target, knocking back and damaging foes.

name: Overhead Smash
description: Smashes the ground, damaging and knocking back enemies in the area.

name: Crimson Dawn
description: Blasts the platform with solar energy, damaging enemies in the area.

name: Wave of Panic
description: Ambush. Release a wave of energy that interrupts and confuses foes.

name: Steal Warmth
description: Grant vigor to allies around you and chill your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Fire Strike
description: Build elemental flames into your sword and strike your enemies.

name: Silencer
description: Burst. Briefly stun your target. If you hit a target using a skill, recover some adrenaline.

name: Awakened Soldier Swing
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Sodden Swath
description: Launch a twisting earthen vortex at your enemies.

name: Fire Bolt
description: A basic projectile attack.

name: Crushing Blow
description: A basic melee knockback.

name: Narcotic Spores
description: Spit a glob of confusing spores at a foe, inflicting confusion for a while at that location.

name: Portent of Freedom
description: Hints of freedom echo around, stabilizing and breaking stuns on you and your allies.

name: Steal Resistance
description: Grant resistance to allies around you and inflict torment on your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Rust Frenzy
description: Strike your enemies with deadly force.

name: Radiant Arc
description: Leap to your target and create an arc of light that strikes nearby foes. Gain quickness based on your heat level.

name: Natural Frenzy
description: Dual Attack. Unleash a volley of ice and earth at your enemies.

name: Bloodbane Path
description: Conjure a portal through the Mists and fire barbed arrows to strike from unexpected directions at your enemy.

name: Primordial Stance
description: Stance. Channel the prime elements at their core, dealing damage based on your current attunements. Fully attuning deals the same condition twice.

name: Chaos Vortex
description:
Ambush. Release a vortex of chaos energy that inflicts damaging conditions on foes. Allies near you gain boons. 
Clones using this attack grant their boons around you instead of themselves.

name: False Oasis
description: Deception. Create a mirage at your current location and heal over time. When the mirage expires, it spawns a mirage mirror.

name: Double Lava Axe
description: Throw two lava axes at your foe.

name: Smoke Assault
description: Conceal yourself and lash out at nearby foes. Gain might each time you damage a foe.

name: Trail of Anguish
description: Punishment. Leave a trail of sand as you travel. Grant boons to allies passing through it. Inflict burning on enemies and corrupt a boon into torment.

name: Keen Strike
description: Chain. Strike your foe and gain might. Gain additional might on critical hit.

name: Leading Swipe
description: Rake your dagger across your foe, leaving them bleeding.

name: Fire Swipe
description: Heat your sword a second time and strike your enemies for increased damage.

name: Pressure Blast
description: Dual Attack. Send out a vaporous projectile that violently explodes if it hits the ground or strikes an enemy, healing allies and damaging foes in the area. Heal yourself if you strike an enemy.

name: Hydrothermal Vent
description: Create a thermal vent around your target.

name: Death's Advance
description: Kneel. Shadowstep forward while granting yourself stealth. While standing within Sniper's Cover, shadowstep to any position within range instead.

name: Icerazor's Ire
description:
Legendary Renegade. Summon Visk Icerazor from the Mists to magically bombard your enemies with debilitating conditions.

Band Together. After using this skill, your next Legendary Renegade skill activates instantly and is enhanced. When this skill is enhanced it also inflicts chilled on enemies that it strikes.

name: Shattershot
description: Release an arrow that shatters upon striking, inflicting bleeding on nearby foes.

name: Vulture Stance
description:
Stance. While in this stance, striking a foe inflicts poison and grants you might.
This effect can occur once per interval.

name: Coolant Blast
description: Exceed. Heal yourself and chill nearby foes. If you are above the heat threshold when this skill is activated, gain Frost Aura and continue healing for a duration.

name: Launch Wall
description: Exceed. Launch your photon wall forward, causing the wall to explode when it strikes a foe, inflicting conditions on nearby enemies. When fired above the heat threshold, launch additional walls.

name: Focused Slash
description: Chain. Strike your foe. This attack has increased critical-hit damage.

name: Primal Cry
description: Beast. Tap into your primal essence and unleash a debilitating roar.

name: Kneel
description: Your base and maximum movement speed is reduced. Gain access to kneel skills, which have increased projectile velocity. You can still dodge roll while kneeling. Kneeling is canceled if you swap weapons or use Free Action.

name: Earthshaker
description: Burst. Jump to the targeted location and slam your hammer down, damaging and stunning foes.

name: Symbol of Vengeance
description: Symbol. Cleave your axe into the ground, reducing enemy movement and carving a razor-sharp symbol of vengeance.

name: Bite
description: Bite your foe for severe damage.

name: Intimidating Shout
description: Weaken and cause fear in all foes within earshot.

name: Earthen Vortex
description: Burrow into the ground, then erupt with earth-shattering force.

name: Deadly Aim
description: Kneel. Fire a shot that inflicts vulnerability on your target. Applies additional vulnerability against your marked target.

name: Worldly Impact
description: Beast. Jump up and slam the ground beneath you, severely damaging nearby foes.

name: Giant Flurry
description: Send out a series of shock waves.

name: Earthen Synergy
description: Dual Attack. Smite your enemies with the earth and sky, dealing damage from below and then stunning from above.

name: Nefarious Favor
description:
Shade. Your shades convert a condition on nearby allies into a boon.
Targets affected by this ability can only be affected once per cast.

name: Deadly Kick
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Steal Precision
description: Grant fury to allies around you and blind your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Steal Health
description: Heal allies around you and inflict bleeding on your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Steal Strength
description: Grant might to allies around you and weaken your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Mantra of Potence
description:
Mantra. Recite a hymn from the annals of Turai to quicken yourself and your allies.
The final charge of this skill is more powerful.

name: Grinding Stones
description: Dual Attack. Shred foes with a storm of stones. Take reduced damage while the storm is active.

name: Elemental Compression
description: Inflict the area around your target with the immense pressures of the earth and sea.

name: Seiche
description: Imbue your blade with water, healing yourself for each target you strike.

name: Crystal Sands
description: Deception. Draw in shards of crystal sand that confuse foes they pass through on their way to your targeted location. The shards form a Mirage Mirror upon reaching their destination.

name: Free Action
description: Kneel. Stop kneeling and move freely. If you used at least one kneel skill, gain swiftness.

name: Natural Healing
description: Meditation. Heal for a percentage of your maximum health.

name: Skull Crack
description: Burst. Stun your foe with a skull crack.

name: Reverberant Shatter
description: An explosion of crystal that knocks back and strips Crystal Shield.

name: Deactivate Photon Forge
description: Cancel Photon Forge and begin cooling after a delay. Cooling effectiveness increases over time.

name: Plasma Blast
description: Dual Attack. Launch a ball of plasma that explodes on impact at your foes.

name: Fang Grapple
description: Beast. Spits a fanged projectile to pull in its prey.

name: Shadow Flare
description: Cantrip. Throw an orb of shadow magic that damages nearby foes at your targeted location. You may reactivate this skill to swap places with the orb. Deals increased damage to your marked target.

name: Mirror Strikes
description: Inflict bleeding and torment on your target.

name: Aqua Siphon
description: Strike an enemy and draw water from them, causing them to deliver a healing burst to your allies.

name: Monsoon
description: Dual Attack. Launch a hurricane in a direction, knocking enemies back and making them vulnerable.

name: Binding Shadow
description: Cantrip. Reveal yourself if you are stealthed and remove boons from your target after a short delay. If the foe is your marked target, they are also immobilized.

name: Rain of Spikes
description: Launch spikes at all nearby foes.

name: Spectrum Shield
description: Exceed. Break stun effects and create a holographic shell that reduces incoming damage and grants stability. This skill grants more stability and lasts longer while above the heat threshold.

name: Darkrazor's Daring
description:
Legendary Renegade. Summon Kus Darkrazor to disrupt your enemies.

Band Together. After using this skill, your next Legendary Renegade skill activates instantly and is enhanced. When this skill is enhanced it also grants resistance to nearby allies.

name: Giant Stomp
description: An area melee attack.

name: Boon Crusher
description: Burst. Strike your foe and remove boons. Stunned, dazed, or knocked-down foes are immobilized.

name: Citadel Bombardment
description: Citadel Order. Open a portal through the mists of time, unleashing a storm of artillery from the united legions.

name: Unhindered Delivery
description: Final Charge.Your whispers guard your allies, stabilizing and breaking stuns on them while weakening enemies.

name: Forceful Shot
description: Burst. Fire a forceful shot.

name: Mercy
description: Cantrip. Lose all malice, instantly refresh Deadeye's Mark, and gain initiative. Gain additional initiative for each stack of malice you had prior to using this skill.

name: Stow Tome
description: Stow your tome.

name: Maul
description: Maul your foes and make them bleed.

name: Brutal Aim
description: Fire a shot that inflicts vulnerability on your target. Applies additional vulnerability when used against your marked target.

name: Devourer Retreat
description: Retreat by tunneling through the ground.

name: Restoring Reprieve
description: Gain health. Grant boons to yourself and allies in front of and around you.

name: Skirmisher's Shot
description: Fire a bullet that inflicts conditions on your target and grants you a boon.

name: Citadel Bombardment
description: Citadel Order. Open a portal through the mists of time, unleashing a storm of artillery from the united legions.

name: Kick
description: Kick your enemy.

name: Chomp
description: Bite a foe and gain health.

name: Wounding Strike
description: Burst. Strike your foe, inflicting bleeding. If you hit a foe using a skill, additional bleeding and torment are inflicted.

name: Shield of the Avenger
description: Spirit Weapon. Command the Shield of the Avenger to form a protective dome, and then shatter, flying out to weaken nearby foes.

name: Tail Swipe
description: Attack all surrounding foes with a tail swipe.

name: Orbital Command Strike
description: Call down energy from the sky to blast an area.

name: Serpent Siphon
description: Punishment. Unleash a ghostly serpent toward a targeted area. Upon arriving, the serpent will burst into sand, granting barrier and boons to nearby allies and poisoning enemies. Convert a boon from struck enemies into torment.

name: Flash Cutter—Storm
description: Fire two light blades in quick succession.

name: Plasmic Strike
description: Quickly heat the area around your enemy, melting defenses.

name: Mantra of Solace
description:
Mantra. Prepare to heal yourself and grant boons to allies. 
The final charge of this skill is more powerful.

name: Screech
description: Damage and Daze enemies with a powerful screech.

name: Whirling Strike
description: Burst. Strike all foes around you, stunning them.

name: Tome of Resolve
description:
Virtue: Regenerate health.
Activate: Draw forth an enchanted tome that recounts the trials undergone by the people of Vabbi.

name: Serpent Stab
description: Slash across your foe, poisoning them.

name: Scorchrazor
description: Unleash a fiery edge to ignite and knock down your enemies.

name: Sevenshot
description: Conjure a focused volley of arrows to harass your foes.

name: Dark Water
description: Blind foes near your target with a dark cloud.

name: Prismatic Singularity
description: Collapse a ring of holograms to pull foes into a single point. The ring explodes when it fully collapses. Radius and pull distance increased while above the heat threshold.

name: Legendary Renegade Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary charr renegade, Kalla Scorchrazor.

name: Slash
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Peck
description: Damage your foe with a forceful peck.

name: Wing Buffet
description: Launch your foe backward with mighty wing beats.

name: Imminent Threat
description: Meditation. Taunt nearby foes, gaining adrenaline and barrier for each affected foe.

name: Death's Retreat
description: Shadowstep away from your target and lose conditions. Poisons foes at your starting location.

name: Overwhelming Celerity
description: Final Charge. Inspire allies before and beside you, greatly enhancing their speed and strength.

name: Prime Light Beam
description: Exceed. Charge up and fire an explosive beam of light in front of you. When activated above the heat threshold, this attack leaves behind a burning holographic field.

name: Kill Shot
description: Burst. Fire a powerful shot. Deal increased damage to enemies that are affected by crowd control or below the health threshold.

name: Quickening Screech
description: Grant swiftness to nearby allies and remove movement-impairing conditions from them.

name: Blade Burst
description: Fire holographic blades at foes within range. Damage increased while over the heat threshold.

name: Blinding Roar
description: Beast. Release a powerful roar that blinds nearby foes.

name: Fiery Frost
description: Dual Attack. Launch a fire-and-ice bolt while evading and removing movement-impairing conditions.

name: Reformed Mirage Mirror
description: Your shattered illusion reforms into a mirror. Touching the mirror shatters it, granting mirage cloak to you and weakening foes.

name: Crystalline Impact
description: An explosion of crystal that applies knockdown and strips Crystal Shield.

name: Tome of Courage
description:
Virtue: Gain aegis periodically. 
Activate: Conjure a mystic tome containing stories about the heroes of Istan.

name: Twin Strike
description: Dual Attack. Quickly strike enemies in front of you with the extreme nature of fire and water.

name: Manifest Sand Shade
description: Shade. Manifest a sand shade using some of your life force. Using a shade ability strikes enemies near you and your shades.

name: Ether Barrage
description: Ambush. Launch a barrage of chaos orbs at your foe, inflicting confusion and torment. Condition duration halved for clones.

name: Pile Driver
description: Dual Attack. After a short channel, launch a hyper-fast boulder that decimates foes in its path.

name: Steam Surge
description: Dual Attack. Slide to an area, blasting foes with steam while healing nearby allies.

name: Ghastly Breach
description: Punishment. Breach into the realm of torment for a brief time, granting might to allies and slowing enemies. Convert a boon on enemies into torment each pulse.

name: Echo of Truth
description: Recount a truth to enemies in front of and around you, inflicting them with conditions.

name: Tome of Courage
description:
Virtue: Gain aegis periodically. 
Activate: Conjure a mystic tome containing stories about the heroes of Istan.

name: Ashen Blast
description: Dual Attack. Blind your foes with burning ashes.

name: Lesser Signet of Stone
description: Signet. You and your pet take no damage from attacks. You and your pet are still susceptible to conditions and control effects.

name: Bright Slash—Storm
description: Launch another arc of light at your target.

name: Holographic Shockwave
description: Create a deadly holographic shockwave that launches foes upward. This attack always deals a critical hit.

name: Battering Slash
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Lunge
description: A lunging melee attack.

name: Arcing Slice
description: Burst. Deliver a circular attack to foes around you, and gain fury. Deal more damage to foes with low health.

name: Protection
description: Apply protection to yourself.

name: Precise Cut
description: Chain. Strike your foe. This attack deals increased critical damage.

name: Dismiss Lieutenant Soulcleave
description: Order Ofela Soulcleave to leave the field.

name: Charging Bite
description: Charge your foe, striking multiple times and inflicting bleeding.

name: Combustive Shot
description: Burst. Ignite the target area, burning nearby foes.

name: Worldly Impact
description: Beast. Draw in and release a blast of your energy, dealing hefty damage to nearby foes.

name: Citadel Bombardment
description: Citadel Order. Open a portal through the mists of time, unleashing a storm of artillery from the united legions.

name: Laser Disk
description: Exceed. Create rotating laser blades to damage nearby foes. This skill has increased duration when activated while above the heat threshold.

name: Mirage Advance
description: Deception. Shadowstep and unleash an attack that blinds and dazes your target and nearby foes. You may reactivate this skill to return to your original position.

name: Steal Time
description: Grant quickness to allies around you and slow your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Opening Passage
description: Recite a cleansing word, purifying allies of conditions and helping them recover.

name: Shearing Edge
description: Dual Attack. Form a frozen blade and spin it toward your enemies.

name: Brutal Charge
description: Leap at your foe and knock them down.

name: Takedown
description: Cripple your target with a powerful strike.

name: Lesser Stone Resonance
description: Stance. Enter an earthen state, gaining barrier periodically over the course of the stance.

name: Sand Swell
description: Punishment. Plunge into the ground, creating a portal through Tyria for allied use. Grant allies using this passage a health barrier. Convert a boon on nearby enemies into torment.

name: Flame Surge
description: Final Charge. Unleash a powerful wave of flame.

name: Desiccate
description: Punishment. Draw vital energy from your foes to gain life force and grant boons to nearby allies. Gain additional life force per target struck. Convert a boon on affected enemies to torment.

name: Engage Photon Forge
description: Activate your Photon Forge, gaining access to new skills. Generate heat while Photon Forge is active. Take damage if you overheat. Disables use of kits for a short duration.

name: Beastmode
description: Meld with your pet.

name: Razorclaw's Rage
description:
Legendary Renegade. Summon Centurion Jas Razorclaw from the Mists to strike nearby enemies and enhance the attacks of your allies.

Band Together. After using this skill, your next Legendary Renegade skill activates instantly and is enhanced. When this skill is enhanced it also inflicts torment on enemies that it strikes.

name: Fracturing Strike
description: Dual Attack. Call a meteor from the sky that crashes to the ground, creating an eruption of magma.

name: Rejuvenating Respite
description: Final Charge. Gain significant health. Grant boons to yourself and allies in front of and around you.

name: Savannah Strike
description: Beast. Shadowstep to your target and strike them. Grant nearby allies swiftness.

name: Holo Leap
description: Create a holographic launch pad and leap to your foe. The pad remains behind for a short duration, granting increased movement speed to allies who touch it.

name: Potent Haste
description: Inspire allies before and beside you, enhancing their speed and strength.

name: Leave Beastmode
description: Separate from your pet.

name: Defy Pain
description: You receive no damage from incoming attacks. You remain susceptible to conditions and controlling effects.

name: Sand through Glass
description: Deception. Evade backward and gain Mirage Cloak.

name: Tail Lash
description: Push back a foe with your tail.

name: Pyro Vortex
description: Dual Attack. Strike enemies in an arc in front of you, creating burning vortexes on enemies you hit.

name: Crystalline Strike
description: Attack enemies with a second vicious attack.

name: Break Enchantments
description: Meditation. Strike foes around you and remove their boons. Deal more damage to foes that lose a boon.

name: Bite
description: Bite your foe to recover health.

name: Sand Flare
description: Punishment. Gain barrier. Convert a boon on nearby enemies into torment.

name: Flash Spark
description: Release a blinding burst of light from your holographic emitter. While above the heat threshold, gain light aura.

name: Healing Cloud
description: Release a cloud of mist to regenerate you and your allies.

name: Breaking Wave
description: Strike your enemies and unleash a wave that heals allies.

name: Blade Renewal
description: Psionic. Channel to gain distortion and stock up to the maximum number of blades.

name: Mantra of Liberation
description:
Mantra. Echo remnants of an ancient pamphlet from Vabbi that urged Elonians to freedom. Grant stability and resolution to allies while breaking stun.
The final charge of this skill is more powerful.

name: Steal Durability
description: Grant protection to allies around you and inflict vulnerability on your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Prelude Lash
description: Beast. Pull foes toward you and bind them briefly.

name: Deadeye's Mark
description:
Mark a target, causing your initiative attacks to generate malice when they hit or critically hit your mark. Shadowstep to your target if you are wielding a dagger, sword, spear, or staff in your main hand. Lose malice when the mark ends or when this skill is recast on a new target.
Malice is only gained once per skill use.

name: Crystal Fling
description: A basic projectile attack.

name: Sand Cascade
description:
Shade. Sand rises up near your shades to shield nearby allies.
Targets affected by this ability can only be affected once per cast.

name: Tar Font
description: Create a tar pool that damages, cripples, and slows enemies.

name: Sun Edge
description: Strike your foe and inflict vulnerability. This attack deals more damage based on your heat level.

name: Fleeting Stability
description: Burst. Bash your foe with your shield and stun them.

name: Magebane Tether
description: Tether yourself to your target. If they move beyond the range threshold, pull them to you. Grants might and reveals your target every second.

name: Double Arc
description: Rip your blade through your foe twice, inflicting heavy bleeding. Your pet's next two strikes inflict poison.

name: Frenzied Attack
description: Attack with a pecking frenzy and make your foe vulnerable.

name: Bow of Truth
description: Spirit Weapon. Command the Bow of Truth to barrage a location with healing arrows.

name: Eviscerate
description: Burst. Leap at your foe with a devastating attack.

name: Plasma Beam
description: Dual Attack. Fire a superheated jet of plasma at your foe.

name: Crystal Slash
description: Strike your opponent with your serrated blade.

name: Vent Exhaust
description: Damage nearby foes and apply conditions to them. Lose heat. This attack activates Heat Therapy if you have not overheated.

name: Head Toss
description: Beast. Toss your foe into the air.

name: Weave Self
description: Stance. Temporarily reduce the recharge time of attunements while gaining bonuses for attuning to new elements. Successfully attuning to all elements ends this stance and grants Perfect Weave.

name: Searing Slash
description: Heat your sword a final time and use the full power of your flames to sear enemies and ignite them.

name: Poison Gas
description: Spit a ball of venom that covers an area with a poisonous cloud.

name: Photosynthesize
description: Restore health, gain regeneration, and remove conditions.

name: Crippling Leap
description: Leap at your foe and cripple them.

name: Photon Wall
description: Exceed. A defensive barrier appears in front of you that blocks you and your allies from incoming attacks. Reactivate Exceed to fire the barrier at foes as an attack. This skill grants projectile reflection if you are above the heat threshold.

name: Sight beyond Sight
description: Meditation. Reveal nearby foes and make your next attack a critical hit. Remove blindness and nondamaging conditions.

name: Axes of Symmetry
description: You and all your axe clones shadowstep to a random location around your target and strike, applying confusion. This attack breaks enemy targeting, and your illusions change focus to the targeted foe.

name: Pyroclastic Blast
description: Dual Attack. Launch a molten rock that devastates an area.

name: Steal Defenses
description: Grant aegis to allies around you and poison your marked target. Gain stealth if malice is at or above the threshold.

name: Call Lightning
description: Calls lightning to a small area.

name: Quantum Strike
description: Strike your foe, charging them with static and causing lightning to strike repeatedly for a short period of time.

name: Frenzied Peck
description: A series of melee attacks.

name: Searing Slash
description: Unleash your searing axe in an overhand slash, following it up with a magical edge.

name: Cauterize
description: Use a laser to burn off conditions and set yourself on fire for each condition removed. Removes additional conditions if above the heat threshold.

name: Double Tap
description: Fire two bullets that grant might if they hit your target.

name: Overheat
description: Reaching the heat maximum results in a self-damaging explosion. Photon Forge is disabled until all heat is lost. Other tool belt skill cooldowns are increased.

name: Spiritcrush
description: Create a debilitating zone by firing a volley of flaming arrows at an area.

name: Wastrel's Ruin
description: Strike your target and remove boons. Damage and boon removal are increased against foes not using skills or those that are defiant.

name: Voice of Truth
description: Final Charge. Reveal a harsh truth to enemies before and beside you, devastating them with conditions.

name: Heroic Command
description: Citadel Order. Refresh the duration of your Kalla's Fervor and grant nearby allies might for every stack.

name: Mantra of Truth
description:
Mantra. Prepare the tenets of truth to debilitate your foes.
The final charge of this skill is more powerful.

name: Malicious Death's Judgment
description: Stealth Attack. Reveal yourself and fire a powerful shot at your target that pierces but deals less damage to untargeted foes. If this attack targets and hits your mark, it consumes all malice and deals increased damage for each malice consumed.

name: Entangling Web
description: Shoot a web, immobilizing your foe.

name: Refraction Cutter
description: Strike at foes in front of you and launch a blade of light at your target. Launch extra blades based on your heat level. Each blade inflicts conditions.

name: Full Counter
description: Burst. Absorb the next attack against you and counterattack all foes around you. Foes struck by the counter attack are interrupted.

name: Aquatic Stance
description: Stance. Flow like water, gaining endurance. While this stance is active, restore some endurance when you dodge.

name: Lesser Quickening Zephyr
description: Survival. You and your pet gain quickness and superspeed.

name: Split Surge
description: Ambush. Shoot a beam at a targeted foe, and secondary beams at foes near your target.

name: Clarified Conclusion
description: Final Charge. Recite the concluding passage, converting corruption into enhancements for your allies and aiding them in recovery.

name: Light Strike—Storm
description: Launch an arc of light at your foe.

name: Deadly Delivery
description: Strike deeply into your foe, inflicting multiple conditions.

name: Oppressive Collapse
description: Corrupt the ground under your target; if they remain within the area, they will be knocked down. Grant might to allies near your target based on how many conditions they have.

name: Needle Shot
description: A basic projectile attack.

name: Imaginary Axes
description: Ambush. Release phantasmal axes that seek out the nearest target after a short delay.

name: Fear
description: Make your foe flee in fear.

name: Tome of Justice
description:
Virtue: Burn foes every few attacks.
Activate: Pull forth a magical tome on the dangers of the blazing heat in Kourna.

name: Crippling Anguish
description: Launch a projectile that inflicts conditions.

name: Holoforge Overheated
description: Unable to reactivate until cooled.

name: Dissonance
description: Burst. Release a conical wave of sound that blows away boons on targets it hits. Stuns foes using skills.

name: Riptide
description: Use the element of water to propel yourself backward and regenerate, leaving a healing area at your location.

name: Garish Pillar
description:
Shade. Induce fear in enemies around your sand shades.
Targets affected by this ability can only be affected once per cast.

name: Cauterizing Strike
description: Stab your foe with full force, dealing bonus damage against burning enemies.
