name: Deception
description: Clone. Create a downed clone of yourself to attack your target.

name: Flying Cutter
description: Send a blade of energy at your target. Hitting the same target multiple times invokes a flurry of blades on your target.

name: Vile Blast
description: Fire a dart that shatters on impact, releasing noxious liquid that stuns, weakens, and poisons foes in the area. Gain life force for each target struck.

name: Weeping Shots
description: Pierce your enemies with a series of corrosive bullets, inflicting torment and vulnerability. Gain life force for the first target hit by each bullet.

name: Elixir of Bliss
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of bliss into an elixir, gaining resolution and converting conditions on yourself into life force, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, corrupting a boon on targets into a condition. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and corrupt an additional boon on targets.

name: Vicious Shot
description: Fire a tormenting bullet that bounces between nearby foes.

name: Roiling Light
description: Physical. Break stun and dodge backward, blinding foes and gaining resistance. Then, gain access to Quick Retribution.

name: Twin Blade Restoration
description: Psionic. Heal yourself, lose conditions, and throw two blades at your target. If the first blade hits, you gain aegis. If the second blade hits, you gain vigor.

name: Executioner's Calling
description: Strike your foe with rending force. Follow up this attack with a dual strike that deals increased damage against foes you struck with the first.

name: Willbender Flames
description:
Leave a trail of flame in your wake that damage enemies.

Activating this skill destroys other active Willbender Flames effects.

name: Elixir of Risk
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of risk into an elixir, gaining might and fury, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting weakness on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Crashing Courage
description: Virtue. Shadowstep a short distance while gaining boons and emanating Willbender Flames from your location. Gain courage.

name: Voracious Arc
description:
Leap to your destination, evading through the air. Daze enemies near your impact point.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and torment struck foes.

name: Exit Harbinger Shroud
description: Leave Harbinger Shroud and return to your normal form.

name: Heel Crack
description: Physical. Perform a quick heel strike that stuns your target.

name: Willbender Flames
description:
Create a ring of flame that damages enemies.

Activating this skill destroys other active Willbender Flames effects.

name: Rain of Swords
description: Psionic. Create a storm of blades that attacks a large area, damaging and applying vulnerability to targets.

name: Crashing Courage
description:
Virtue. Shadowstep a short distance while gaining boons and emanating Willbender Flames from your location. Gain Courage.

Removes other active Virtue effects.</c

name: Bladecall
description: Throw a fan of daggers that return to you. If your target is in range, the returning daggers will lock on to that target. Create a clone if this attack hits at least one target.

name: Heaven's Palm
description: Physical. Evade attacks, then shadowstep and slam the ground, knocking down your targeted foe, finishing them if there are no other enemy players nearby. Foes that aren't targeted are knocked back instead.

name: Vital Draw
description: Twist the souls of nearby enemies, suspending them in the air while you siphon their life force. Gain life force for each target struck.

name: Whirling Light
description: Physical. Lunge forward and perform a whirlwind kick, weakening and burning any foes left in your wake.

name: Harbinger Shroud
description:
Enter Harbinger Shroud, granting powerful offensive skills but leaving you vulnerable to attack.
As you remain in Harbinger Shroud, you accumulate blight over time.
Blight decreases your maximum health.

name: Blade Leap
description: Leap to your target and summon a clone if you hit. Can be recast to return to your starting point.

name: Psychic Force
description: Psionic. Channel energy into your blades to damage nearby enemies and make your next bladesong unblockable.

name: Bladesong Harmony
description: Bladesong. Fire all stocked blades at your target.

name: Crashing Courage
description:
Virtue. Shadowstep a short distance while gaining boons and emanating Willbender Flames from your location. Gain Courage.

Removes other active Virtue effects.</c

name: Bladeturn Requiem
description: Bladesong.Send your blades spinning around you to hit nearby foes. Spinning blade duration scales with number of blades consumed.

name: Bladesong Dissonance
description: Bladesong. Combine all your blades into one large blade that dazes targets based on the number of blades consumed.

name: Flowing Resolve
description: Virtue. Remove conditions and gain Flowing Resolve. Rush forward and evade attacks while leaving Willbender Flames in your wake.

name: Unstable Bladestorm
description: Create a telekinetic storm of daggers that damages foes. With each interval, the bladestorm will fire blades at nearby enemies.

name: Flash Combo
description: Physical. Shadowstep to your target and strike at them multiple times. If the skill completes without being interrupted, gain access to Repose.

name: Tainted Bolts
description: Fire quick bolts of dark energy that explode on impact, inflicting torment to enemies in the area.

name: Bladesong Sorrow
description: Bladesong. Fire all stocked blades, inflicting your target with conditions.

name: Bladesong Harmony
description: Bladesong. Fire all stocked blades at your target.

name: Willbender Flames
description:
Manifest flames that damage enemies on an interval.

Activating this ability destroys other active Willbender Flames effects.

name: Dark Barrage
description: Fire six bolts of tormenting energy that fan out from you, piercing all enemies in their path.

name: Reversal of Fortune
description: Physical. Guard yourself with light, negating the next incoming strike and healing you instead, even if the strike would have been lethal. If an effect causes damage that would be lethal, that damage will be negated and you will be healed instead. If no attacks or lethal damage are negated, you will be healed for the lowest set amount.

name: Flowing Resolve
description:
Virtue. Remove conditions and gain Flowing Resolve. Rush forward and evade attacks while leaving Willbender Flames in your wake.

Removes other active Virtue effects.

name: Elixir of Ignorance
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of ignorance into an elixir, gaining resistance and protection and breaking stuns, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting blindness on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Crashing Courage
description: Virtue. Shadowstep a short distance while gaining boons and emanating Willbender Flames from your location. Gain courage.

name: Advancing Strike
description: Quickly dash toward your foe and then shadowstep to deliver a debilitating attack that immobilizes your enemies.

name: Elixir of Ambition
description:
Elixir. Infuse your boundless ambition into an elixir, gaining every possible boon, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting all damaging conditions on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Cascading Corruption
description: Damage and torment nearby enemies.

name: Elixir of Anguish
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of anguish into an elixir, gaining swiftness and quickness, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting cripple on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Elixir of Promise
description:
Elixir. Infuse an elixir with the promise of good health, healing yourself and gaining regeneration, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, poisoning foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double damage and condition duration.

name: Rushing Justice
description: Virtue. Rush toward your target and gain Justice, delivering a strike and emanating Willbender Flames.

name: Repose
description: Shadowstep to Flash Combo's starting point, healing and removing conditions.

name: Devouring Cut
description:
Channel twisted energy to launch yourself at your foe, damaging nearby enemies on impact.



If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and torment struck foes.

name: Returning Edge
description: Shadowstep back to your previous location, crippling foes as you retreat.

name: Quick Retribution
description: Physical. Lunge forward and unleash a disorienting strike at your foe, dazing them.

name: Selfless Spirit
description: Legendary Alliance. Heal allies in an area.

name: Stonestrike
description: Arc your hammer, creating a ring of jagged rock to damage your enemies.

name: Urn of Saint Viktor
description: Legendary Alliance. Become the Urn of Saint Viktor, taking continuous damage while healing nearby allies. You take reduced damage while in this state, but you cannot be healed.

name: Mist Slash
description: Swing your greatsword again, inflicting vulnerability.

name: Saint's Shield
description: Drop from above, granting barrier and healing to allies in the affected area.

name: Mist Unleashed
description: Hurl forces from the Mists in front of you, rendering foes vulnerable.

name: Death Drop
description: Drop from above, delivering a massive strike on the focused area.

name: Water Rush
description: Chain. Slam your foe with a rush of water.

name: Gunstinger
description: Quickly step forward to strike your foe while reloading your gun. Restores ammo to skill 5.

name: Shattering Ice
description: Augment. Your successful attacks will trigger an additional strike on nearby enemies that applies chill. If this is cast within range of your Water Sphere, the duration is increased. This effect can occur once per interval.

name: Battle Dance
description: Legendary Alliance. Evade backward, granting boons to allies.

name: Call of the Alliance
description: Gain endurance and strike enemies around you, gaining bonus endurance for each enemy struck.

name: Shock Blast
description: Fire a blast of lightning that explodes when it reaches its destination, stunning nearby foes.

name: Selfish Spirit
description: Legendary Alliance. Channel your rage into the nearby area, healing and empowering yourself for each enemy struck.

name: Deploy Jade Sphere
description: Summon your jade sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies in its radius based on its element.

name: Elemental Celerity
description: Augment. Reduce the recharge of weapon skills of your current attunement. If this is activated in range of your sphere, gain a boon based on its element.

name: Alliance Tactics
description: Swap your Legendary Alliance Stance skills.

name: Drop Urn of Saint Viktor
description: Slam your Urn into the ground, ending the ability. Grant boons and heals allies based on your health threshold.

name: Unsheathe Gunsaber
description: Unsheathe your gunsaber to gain new skills. Changes to your weapon recharge rate affect this skill.

name: Wind Slam
description: Slam your foe with a gust of wind.

name: Legendary Alliance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary champions Archemorus and Saint Viktor.

name: Arcing Mists
description: Cleave your foes, inflicting vulnerability and chilling them.

name: Energy Meld
description: Gain endurance.

name: Flame Wheel
description: Summon a projectile of fire that circles around you, damaging foes. While this projectile is active, it grants you increased outgoing damage. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Ground Pound
description: Smash your hammer into the ground to bleed and immobilize your enemies.

name: Tree Song
description: Legendary Alliance. Grant regeneration and cleanse conditions from allies in the targeted area, healing them for each condition removed. Gain endurance for each affected ally, and gain additional endurance for each condition removed.

name: Awakening
description: Legendary Alliance. Break stun on nearby allies and grant protection.

name: Dragon's Roar
description: Fire all the barrels in your hand cannon to deal damage to foes in front of you. This skill consumes all your ammo when fired and pushes you back slightly based on the amount of ammo expended.

name: Dragon Trigger
description:
Prepare to use Dragon Slash. While channeling, you drain flow. Each interval increases the charge level of Dragon Slash.
This skill is canceled if you dodge or are interrupted.

name: Electric Fence
description: Armament. Throw a device that leaves behind a wall of energy, blocking projectiles and crippling foes that pass through it. Foes that are already crippled become immobilized.

name: Triple Sear
description: Sear a path to burn your enemies.

name: Hurricane of Pain
description: Manifest a powerful cyclone at the target location, periodically damaging enemies.

name: Deploy Jade Sphere
description: Summon your jade sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies in its radius based on its element.

name: Fortified Earth
description: Augment. Block attacks. Gain barrier if the channel completes successfully. If this is cast within range of your Earth Sphere, the recharge time is reduced.

name: Soothing Water
description: Augment. Regenerate health and cleanse conditions over time. If this is cast in range of your Water Sphere, the recharge time is reduced.

name: True Strike
description: Strike your foes with empowered energy. Deals increased damage based on attacks blocked by Imperial Guard.

name: Nomad's Advance
description: Legendary Alliance. Lunge forward, damaging foes and gaining might for each target struck.

name: Icy Coil
description: Summon a projectile of ice that circles around you, damaging foes. While this projectile is active, you take reduced damage from conditions. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Deploy Jade Sphere
description: Summon your jade sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies in its radius based on its element.

name: Water Sphere
description: Throw your sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies within range based on your active attunement.

name: Scavenger Burst
description: Legendary Alliance. Unleash your rage at foes in the area, gaining boons and endurance for each foe struck.

name: Air Sphere
description: Throw your sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies within range based on your active attunement.

name: Cleansing Typhoon
description: Cleanse conditions from yourself, then strike nearby foes. Cleanse an additional condition for each target struck.

name: Unseen Sword
description: After a delay, deliver a circular attack to foes around you. Increases flow rate if it hits.

name: Imperial Impact
description: Drop from above, delivering a powerful attack to enemies while granting boons to allies.

name: Sheathe Gunsaber
description: Put your gunsaber away and return to your normal weapon set. Changes to your weapon recharge rate affect this skill.

name: Chilling Crack
description: Crack the ground to chill your foes.

name: Stream Strike
description: Chain. Strike your foe with a watery blow.

name: Grand Finale
description: Redirect any active circular projectiles toward your target.

name: Reaver's Rage
description: Legendary Alliance. Break stun and attack nearby enemies, gaining stability for each target struck.

name: Earth Sphere
description: Throw your sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies within range based on your active attunement.

name: Surging Flames
description: Sweep your hammer forward to send flames rushing at your enemies.

name: Crescent Wind
description: Summon a projectile of air that circles around you, damaging foes. While this projectile is active, your chance to critically strike is increased. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Legendary Alliance Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary champions Archemorus and Saint Viktor.

name: Phantom's Onslaught
description: Rush toward your opponent, cleaving the area.

name: Tactical Reload
description: Armament. Reload ammo on all of your bladesworn skills. Your next Dragon Trigger generates more charges per interval.

name: Molten End
description: Slam your hammer into the ground, damaging nearby enemies. If this strikes a burning enemy, gain offensive boons.

name: Mist Swing
description: Swing at enemies with your greatsword.

name: Imperial Guard
description: Block incoming attacks for a prolonged duration, and ready a counterattack that deals increased damage based on the attacks blocked.

name: Singeing Strike
description: Singe your foes by unleashing a burst of flame from your hammer.

name: Eternity's Requiem
description:
Whirl your greatsword, opening holes in the Mists that deal damage.

Damage is reduced per target each time they are struck by this skill.

name: Deploy Jade Sphere
description: Summon your jade sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies in its radius based on its element.

name: Tree Song
description: Legendary Alliance. Grant regeneration and cleanse conditions from allies in the targeted area, healing them for each condition removed. Gain endurance for each affected ally, and gain additional endurance for each condition removed.

name: Spear of Archemorus
description: Legendary Alliance. Call upon the spirit of Archemorus to hurl his spear at your foe, dealing significant damage.

name: Wind Storm
description: Release a burst of air to knock down your enemies and gain superspeed.

name: Crashing Font
description: Leap at your target and strike nearby foes while healing yourself. Healing is increased if a foe is struck.

name: Fire Sphere
description: Throw your sphere, creating a combo field and granting boons to allies within range based on your active attunement.

name: Rain of Blows
description: Strike your foes repeatedly. Enemies hit by all strikes become chilled.

name: Dragonspike Mine
description: Armament. Evade backward while triggering an explosion that inflicts conditions on foes. This skill recharges Dragon Trigger.

name: Scavenger Burst
description: Legendary Alliance. Unleash your rage at foes in the area, gaining boons and endurance for each foe struck.

name: Relentless Fire
description: Augment. Your attacks and conditions deal increased damage, and your attacks are unblockable. If this is cast within range of your Fire Sphere, the duration is increased.

name: Flow Stabilizer
description: Armament. Increase flow rate and gain fury. If you already have fury, gain additional flow.

name: Flow
description: Flow is gained at a constant rate while in combat and decays quickly when combat ends. Attacking will not generate flow, and flow cannot be used for core warrior burst skills. Skills and traits that generate adrenaline will have their adrenaline gain converted to flow.

name: Rocky Loop
description: Summon a projectile of earth that circles around you, damaging foes. While this projectile is active, you take reduced damage from strikes. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Whirling Stones
description: Encase your hammer with earthen spikes to deliver a powerful blow.

name: Combat Stimulant
description: Armament. Heal yourself and enter Stim State. When Stim State expires, you are healed again. Using this skill while in Stim State grants boons.

name: Invigorating Air
description: Augment. Gain increased endurance regeneration and superspeed. If this is cast within range of your Air Sphere, the recharge time is reduced.

name: Immutable Stone
description: Block the next incoming attack. If you block an attack, gain barrier and an aura based on your current attunement.

name: Rectifier Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Heal yourself and your mech every second.
Signet Active: Heal yourself and your mech.

name: Crash Down
description:
Summon your jade mech at the target area. Foes in the area are damaged. The recharge time of this skill is based on how damaged your mech is.

Right-click to rename your mech.

name: Vicious Pike
description: Unleashed Ambush.Spin and strike foes repeatedly. The final attack creates a spore under targets it strikes.

name: Shadow Bolt
description: Fire a projectile that hinders foes and helps allies.

name: Siphon
description: Steal.

name: Savage Shock Wave
description: Smash the ground, creating three expanding shock waves that apply conditions.

name: Overbearing Smash
description: Quickly strike the ground, dazing nearby enemies. If this strikes an enemy, follow up with a leaping strike that dazes enemies again. If you strike an enemy that is using a skill, gain barrier.

name: Mace Smash
description: Smash your target with a heavy blow from your mace, inflicting confusion.

name: Recall Mech
description:
Recall your mech for repairs. The cooldown of Crash Down is determined by the amount of damage your mech has taken.

Right-click to rename your mech.

name: Enveloping Haze
description:
Summon a swirling spore cloud around your pet, destroying projectiles and chilling disabled or defiant enemies.
Disables include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

name: Overclock Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Reduces recharge of other signets.
Signet Active: Order your mech to fire its ultimate weapon, the jade buster cannon. If your mech is not present, instead your mech is summoned, even if Crash Down is on cooldown.

name: Grasping Shadows
description: Unleash darkness on your target's location, inflicting conditions on foes. Cleanse conditions from yourself while healing and cleansing your tethered ally based on targets struck.

name: Shift Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Increases movement speed. Boons you gain are copied to your mech.
Signet Active: You and your mech shadowstep to the target location. Remove conditions on you and your mech.

name: Superconducting Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Increases condition damage dealt.
Signet Active: Creates a damaging field around you that applies conditions to nearby foes. If your mech is active, the field instead radiates from and follows the mech.

name: Hammer Strike
description: Chain. Strike your foe.

name: Jade Mortar
description: Mech Command. Launch a powerful mortar attack at the target.

name: Endless Night
description: Dual Wield. Fire a beam that hinders foes and helps allies.

name: Sundering Volley
description: Unleashed Ambush. Throw multiple axes at nearby enemies, inflicting conditions.

name: Nature's Binding
description: Cantrip. Surround nearby foes with a cage of nature they cannot escape. Enemies that were not struck are unaffected by active cages.

name: Unleashed Savage Shock Wave
description:
Smash the ground, creating three shock waves that deal damage. Deal increased damage to disabled enemies, defiant enemies, and enemies with conditions.
Disables include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

name: Triple Bolt
description: Fire three missiles that hinder foes and help allies.

name: Barrier Burst
description:
Mech Command. Pulse a barrier and boons to all nearby allies.

The mech does not count against the target count for this skill.

name: Unleash Ranger
description: Unleash the raw power of your primal bond with nature and your pet, enhancing your offensive power.

name: Triple Threat
description: Fire three missiles that hinder foes and help allies.

name: Enter Shadow Shroud
description: Ally Target: Enter shadow shroud and tether a targeted or previously siphoned ally, granting them barrier. If no target is selected, one will be chosen randomly in the indicated radius.

name: Exploding Spores
description: Cantrip. Create a ring of spores around yourself that explodes after a short duration. Enemies hit by all spores are knocked down.

name: Eternal Night
description: Strike at foes in front of you with your shadow magic, inflicting conditions. Nearby allies and your tethered ally gain health for each enemy struck.

name: Forest's Fortification
description: Cantrip. Surround yourself with elements of nature, gaining defensive boons and damage reduction. Striking an enemy while this fortification is active reduces the cooldown of this ability.

name: Grasping Shadows
description: Unleash darkness in a targeted area, inflicting conditions on foes and cleansing allies. Cleanse conditions from yourself while healing and cleansing your tethered ally, based on targets struck.

name: Energizing Slam
description: Leap forward and smash the ground, inflicting conditions on foes while granting barrier and boons to allies.

name: Mace Blast
description: Smash your target with a final heavy strike, inflicting additional confusion.

name: Double Bolt
description: Fire two projectiles that hinder foes and help allies.

name: Rocket Punch
description: Your mech launches an explosive fist that detonates on hit, dealing defiance damage to enemies with active defiance bars. This skill is only used when you activate Skill 3 on your weapon.

name: Mace Strike
description: Strike your target.

name: Spark Revolver
description: Mech Command. Fire a rapid volley of jade energy bolts from both arms, piercing through all enemies.

name: Unnatural Traversal
description: Cantrip. Teleport to your target, making nearby enemies vulnerable. If an enemy is struck, this skill's recharge is reduced.

name: Unleashed Overbearing Smash
description: Quickly strike the ground, blinding nearby enemies. If this strikes an enemy, follow up with a leaping strike that removes boons.

name: Unleashed Thump
description: Leap forward and slam the ground with your hammer, gaining boons for each target struck.

name: Venomous Outburst
description:
Your pet teleports to your target and lashes out, poisoning enemies and applying vulnerability to disabled or defiant enemies.
Disables include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

name: Mech Support: Depth Charges
description: Request a barrage from your mech on the target foe.

name: Dawn's Repose
description: Leap to the targeted area, inflicting fear on foes at your ending point. Grant barrier to your tethered ally and nearby allies based on targets struck. Heal your tethered ally based on targets struck.

name: Hammer Slam
description: Chain. Strike your foe again.

name: Multishot
description: Unleashed Ambush. Fire arrows at your target and other enemies near your target. Striking an enemy reduces the recharge of other longbow skills.

name: Dawn's Repose
description: Dash in the direction you are facing, applying fear to foes at your end point. Grant barrier to your tethered ally and yourself based on the targets struck. Heal your tethered ally based on targets struck.

name: Well of Silence
description: Well. Shadowstep to the target area and lay down a well that removes conditions from allies. Gain shadow force for each condition removed. The first strike of the well dazes foes.

name: Rocket Fist Prototype
description: Launch a fist that explodes on the first target hit, damaging and stunning nearby enemies.

name: Sky Circus
description: Mech Command. Your mech jets into the air and fires a missile at each nearby foe before crashing down and dealing additional damage to anything caught underfoot.

name: Mind Shock
description: After a short channel, unleash a blast of compressed magic that stuns enemies. Nearby allies and your tethered ally gain stability. Heal your tethered ally based on each enemy you hit.

name: Exit Shadow Shroud
description: Exit your shadow shroud, breaking the tether between you and your ally.

name: Force Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Increases strike damage dealt.
Signet Active: Knock foes away from yourself and away from your mech.

name: Twilight Combo
description: Dual Wield. Fire a slow-moving projectile, then fire a quick shot that accelerates the first.

name: Mutate Conditions
description: Cantrip. Convert all your conditions into vulnerability.

name: Rending Vines
description:
Your pet strikes nearby enemies with vines, removing boons. Disabled or defiant enemies are also slowed.
Disables include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

name: Barrier Signet
description:
Signet Passive: Incoming strike and condition damage is reduced.
Signet Active: Create a projectile-blocking dome around yourself. You and allies inside the dome gain barrier every second. If your mech is active, the dome is centered on it and is larger. 

The mech does not count against the target count for this skill.

name: Measured Shot
description: Dual Wield. Shadowstep and fire a shot that hinders foes and helps allies.

name: Shadowfall
description: Well. Shadowstep to your target location and drop a well that continuously pulls foes to its center, increasing intensity with each hit.

name: Well of Sorrow
description: Well. Shadowstep to your target location and create a well that inflicts foes with conditions.

name: Well of Gloom
description: Well. Shadowstep to your target location and drop a well that cripples foes and heals allies.

name: Crisis Zone
description:
Mech Command. Your mech removes conditions, breaks stuns, and grants boons to itself and nearby allies.

The mech does not count against the target count for this skill.

name: Well of Tears
description: Well. Shadowstep to the target location and drop a well that repeatedly strikes foes.

name: Jagged Fan
description: Unleashed Ambush. Fire a piercing spread of harpoons that inflicts conditions on enemies.

name: Shadowsquall
description: Stealth Attack. Unleash a barrage from the shadows toward your target.

name: Perilous Gift
description: Cantrip. While active, you take no damage from incoming attacks or conditions. When the cantrip ends, heal based on a percentage of your missing health.

name: Well of Bounty
description: Well. Shadowstep to a targeted point and create a well that grants boons to allies.

name: Toxic Shot
description: Unleashed Ambush. Fire three arrows that explode on impact, inflicting poison on enemies in the area. Inflict additional conditions on enemies who are already poisoned.

name: Thump
description: Leap forward and slam the ground with your hammer, knocking down nearby enemies.

name: Rolling Smash
description: Mech Command. Slam at the target with both cutters, inflicting severe bleeding to enemies in the area.

name: Unleashed Wild Swing
description:
Strike nearby enemies, inflicting damage. Deals increased damage to disabled or defiant enemies.
Disables include stun, daze, knockback, pull, knockdown, sink, float, launch, taunt, and fear.

name: Deft Strike
description: Unleashed Ambush. Leap forward and strike the ground, creating a spore under each enemy struck.

name: Heavy Smash
description: Smash the ground and damage nearby foes.

name: Unleash Pet
description: Unleash your pet to draw on the raw power of its bond with nature, granting it new abilities.

name: Core Reactor Shot

name: Elixir of Ignorance
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of ignorance into an elixir, gaining resistance and breaking stuns, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting blindness on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Rifle Burst Grenade
description: Fire an explosive grenade from your rifle.

name: Elixir of Promise
description:
Elixir. Infuse an elixir with the promise of good health, healing yourself and gaining regeneration, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, poisoning foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double damage and condition duration.

name: Overcharged Cartridges
description: Armament. Your explosion attacks deal more damage and inflict burning. Using this skill while you already have Overcharged Cartridges activated causes you to supercharge your cartridges, increasing its effectiveness and refreshing its duration.

name: Elixir of Ambition
description:
Elixir. Infuse your boundless ambition into an elixir, gaining every possible boon, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting all damaging conditions on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Elixir of Risk
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of risk into an elixir, gaining might and fury, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting weakness on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Elixir of Anguish
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of anguish into an elixir, gaining swiftness and quickness, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, inflicting cripple on foes. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and condition duration.

name: Elixir of Bliss
description:
Elixir. Infuse the magical essence of bliss into an elixir, gaining resolution and converting conditions on yourself into life force, and then toss the elixir at the targeted area, corrupting a boon on targets into a condition. If you are in the splash area of the elixir, gain Blight.

If you are at or above the Blight threshold when you activate this skill, consume that amount of Blight to double the damage and corrupt an additional boon on targets.

name: Bladesong Distortion

name: Tri-Bolt
description: Prototype Indigo targets three enemies with lightning orbs, which follow their targets then strike an area after a short delay. Every other time this ability is used, one of the three targets will also be targeted by Tribocharge.

name: Volatile Static
description: The Cobalt Knight unleashes an electrified wind that pushes opponents away and shocks them with increasing intensity the farther targets are from the assault knight.

name: Dual Horizon

Targets hit by the ring take high damage, receive a random effect, and are knocked in a random direction.

name: Noxious Vapor Blade

name: Volatile Static
description: Prototype Indigo unleashes chaining static arcs that hit three enemies each. Longer arcs deal increased damage. Struck targets become grounded for a few seconds, protecting them from additional arcs.

This attack creates Boiling Aether at the target's location just before teleportation.

description:
