Activate: Draw forth an enchanted tome that recounts the trials undergone by the people of Vabbi.

name: Tome of Courage
description:
Virtue: Gain aegis periodically. 
Activate: Conjure a mystic tome containing stories about the heroes of Istan.

name: Renewed Focus
description: Meditation. Focus, making yourself invulnerable and recharging your virtues.

name: "Feel My Wrath!"
description: Shout. Grant fury and quickness to nearby allies. The duration of the quickness you grant yourself is doubled.

name: Signet of Courage
description:
Signet Passive: Periodically heal allies in an area around you while in combat.
Signet Active: Channel healing and boons in a large area around you, concluding with a large heal if this skill is not interrupted.

name: Dragon's Maw
description: Trap. Lay a trap that pulls enemies and creates a barrier that holds them in.

name: Slash
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Engulfing Darkness
description: Corrupted energy coats the ground.

name: Engulfing Darkness
description: Corrupted energy coats the ground.

name: Mark of Anguish
description: A teleporting attack.

name: Energy Torrent
description: Raw magical energy courses through you.

name: Engulfing Darkness
description: Corrupted energy coats the ground.

name: Ambush
description: A teleporting attack.

name: Engulfing Darkness
description: Corrupted energy coats the ground.

name: Dual Orbits: Fire and Earth
description: Dual Attack. Summon projectiles of fire and earth that circle around you, striking enemies they pass through. While the fire projectile is active, it grants you increased outgoing damage. While the earth projectile is active, you take reduced damage from strikes. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Wild Swing
description: Strike nearby enemies, inflicting cripple. Gain barrier for each target struck. Barrier is reduced for each target struck beyond the first.

name: Solar Brilliance
description: Unleashed Ambush. Enchant yourself with solar energy, healing nearby allies and damaging nearby enemies over time.

name: Malicious Shadowsquall
description: Stealth Attack. From the shadows, unleash a barrage toward your target. If this attack hits your mark, it consumes all malice and increases the duration of poison it applies.

name: Solar Brilliance
description: Unleashed Ambush. Enchant yourself with solar energy, healing nearby allies and damaging nearby enemies over time.

name: Lesser "Guard!"
description: Command. Order your pet to guard nearby allies; your pet takes damage on behalf of those allies. Gain might when your pet receives damage.

name: Dual Orbits: Fire and Water
description: Dual Attack. Summon projectiles of fire and ice that circle around you, striking enemies they pass through. While the fire projectile is active, it grants you increased outgoing damage. While the ice projectile is active, you take reduced damage from conditions. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Pounce
description: Deliver a leaping strike that deals more damage to disabled, defiant, or movement-impaired foes. Gain vigor if an enemy is struck.

name: Dual Orbits: Water and Air
description: Dual Attack. Summon projectiles of ice and air that circle around you, striking enemies they pass through. While the ice projectile is active, you take reduced damage from conditions. While the air projectile is active, your chance to critically strike is increased. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Thump
description: Leap forward and slam the ground with your hammer, knocking down nearby enemies.

name: Neurotoxin Burst
description: Unleashed Ambush. Shadowstep behind your target and unleash a burst of toxic spores.

name: Dread Visage
description: The Corrupted Luxon channels supernatural terror through his gaze. Look away!

name: Water Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a water spirit at a target location and heal yourself and your pet. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Breaching Strike
description: Burst. Strike your target and remove boons. Deal more damage if your target has no boons.

name: Dual Orbits: Air and Earth
description: Dual Attack. Summon projectiles of air and earth that circle around you, striking enemies they pass through. While the air projectile is active, your chance to critically strike is increased. While the earth projectile is active, you take reduced damage from strikes. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Malicious Hook Strike
description: Stealth Attack. Attack your foes from stealth, knocking enemies down. If this attack hits your mark, it consumes all malice and grants you quickness.

name: Overbearing Smash
description: Quickly strike the ground, dazing nearby enemies. If this strikes an enemy, follow up with a leaping strike that dazes enemies again. If you strike an enemy that is using a skill, gain barrier.

name: Slicing Maelstrom
description: Primal Burst. Slice nearby enemies, removing boons and gaining adrenaline per boon removed. Deal more damage if your target has no boons.

name: Breaching Strike
description: Burst. Strike your target and remove boons. Deal more damage if your target has no boons.

name: Spirit of Nature
description: Spirit. Summon a spirit at a target point and convert conditions on allies into boons. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Life Siphon
description: Bleed yourself, then siphon health from your foe. Damage increases if your foe is bleeding.

name: Bladecall
description: Throw a fan of daggers that return to you. Summon a clone if this attack hits at least one target.

name: Death's Judgment
description: Stealth Attack. Reveal yourself and fire a powerful shot at your target that pierces but deals less damage to untargeted foes.

name: Savage Shock Wave
description: Smash the ground, creating three expanding shock waves that apply conditions.

name: Dual Orbits: Fire and Air
description: Dual Attack. Summon projectiles of fire and air that circle around you, striking enemies they pass through. While the fire projectile is active, it grants you increased outgoing damage. While the air projectile is active, your chance to critically strike is increased. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: Lingering Thoughts
description: Spin forward and strike multiple times, inflicting conditions. Summon a clone if you hit at least one target.

name: Sun Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a sun spirit at a target location and apply blindness to nearby enemies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Storm Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a storm spirit at a target location and apply vulnerability to nearby enemies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Frightening Speed
description: In a blur of flashing blades, Kanaxai dashes from target to target, striking everything in his path, pausing briefly to perform a deadly spin. Does increased damage to secondary targets.

name: Stone Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a stone spirit at a target location and apply aegis to nearby allies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Frost Spirit
description: Spirit. Summon a frost spirit at a target location and apply resistance to nearby allies. The spirit will slam the ground and then shake, granting boons to nearby allies.

name: Axes of Symmetry
description: Shadowstep to a random location around your target and strike, applying confusion. Apply extra stacks of confusion per active clone. This attack breaks enemy targeting, and your illusions change focus to the targeted foe.

name: Phantom Razor
description: Ambush. Slice your foe with a flurry of blades. Each blade inflicts different conditions.

name: Breaching Strike
description: Burst. Strike your target and remove boons. Deal more damage if your target has no boons.

name: Dual Orbits: Water and Earth
description: Dual Attack. Summon projectiles of ice and earth that circle around you, striking enemies they pass through. While the ice projectile is active, you take reduced damage from conditions. While the earth projectile is active, you take reduced damage from strikes. Summoning a circular projectile refreshes the duration of all other circular projectiles.

name: World Cleaver
description: Kanaxai infuses his axe with energy from each consumed Aspect and releases it with a powerful downward chop. The more Aspects Kanaxai successfully consumes, the greater the devastation.

name: Breaching Strike
description: Burst. Strike your target and remove boons. Deal more damage if your target has no boons.

name: Shooting Stars
description: Focus on a single enemy and fire the force of the stars at them. Damage is distributed among all targets struck by this attack.

name: Radiant Arc
description: Leap to your target and create an arc of light that strikes nearby foes. Gain quickness.

name: Sun Ripper
description: Strike your foe again and inflict vulnerability.

name: Charging Constellation
description: Dagda fires a constellation at targets in sequential order. This constellation explodes on impact, dealing significant damage and applying extreme vulnerability to targets in an area. Targets with extreme vulnerability take significant damage from this attack.

name: Missed Stroke
description: Paint stroke is sloppy.

name: Shared Destruction
description: Targets take 60% of their health in damage, split between any nearby allies.

name: Shared Destruction
description: Targets take 60% of their health in damage, split between any nearby allies.

name: Sun Edge
description: Strike your foe and inflict vulnerability.

name: Soul Feast
description: Dagda's anxieties manifest into entities that spread instabilities. Being struck by this too many times will cause you to enter a blind frenzy.

name: Gleam Saber
description: Unleash a burst of stored energy with your sword and recharge your other sword skills.

name: Relic of Dwayna
description: Reduces duration of applied regeneration to instantly heal the target.

name: Ley-Line Vortex
description: Spin around, creating a vortex of ley-line energy around you that strikes and inflicts conditions on enemies.

name: Relic of Dwayna
description: Reduces duration of applied regeneration to instantly heal the target.

name: Dimension Breach
description: Beast.  Dive between dimensions, resurfacing at your foe's location and knocking them into the air.

name: Meteor Crash
description: Deadly attack focused on a single player. Multiple allies can take damage from this attack in order to prevent instant death.

name: Demonic Fever
description: Weaves dangerous elemental energies to heavily damage nearby foes.

name: Demonic Blast
description: Fires a wave of diffractive energy, damaging foes in its path.

name: World Cleaver
description: Kanaxai infuses his axe with energy from each consumed Aspect and releases it with a powerful downward chop. The more Aspects Kanaxai successfully consumes, the greater the devastation.

name: Refraction Cutter
description: Strike at foes in front of you and launch two blades of light at your target. Each blade inflicts conditions.

name: Disrupt Attunement
description: Break your attempt to attune to the element.

name: Lunge
description: Lunge forward, crippling opponents in the path.

name: Electrocute
description: Zap enemies in the target area with electric beams.

name: Spit Goop
description: Spit goop toward your target, crippling enemies.

name: Corrupted Ground
description: Leaves pools of corruption that damage and corrupt boons. Pools grow when Somber stands in them, and shrink when he's outside of them.

name: Fire Breath
description: Creates areas of blazing fire.

name: Ley Energy Pulse
description: Beast. Create a pulse of ley energy around your target, dazing nearby enemies.

name: Path of Gluttony
description: Sacrifice health to dash again. Corrupt boons on enemies struck.

name: Dimensional Aperture
description: Collapse your singularity, creating a single-use portal that will teleport the user to your current location. Increase the cooldown of Singularity Shot.

name: Aerial Agility
description: Dash again.

name: Lesser Litany of Wrath
description: Meditation. Heal yourself. For a brief time, heal yourself based on a percentage of damage dealt to enemies.

name: Path of Gluttony
description: Dash forward, releasing dark energy on nearby targets. Damage enemies hit and heal per target hit with reduced healing beyond the first. This skill can be reactivated to dash again.

name: Effervescence
description: Ambush. Spray invigorating magic, damaging enemies and healing allies.

name: Helmet Breaker
description: Leap at your target with an overhead strike that dazes them.

name: Hungering Maelstrom
description: Create a dark maelstrom that deals damage, inflicts vulnerability, and steals health. Reactivate this skill to inflict additional damage and conditions on all targets hit by the maelstrom.

name: Blossoming Aura
description: Envelop target friend or foe with energy from the Mists. The energy explodes outward after a short delay or when manually detonated, granting barrier to nearby allies. The amount of barrier granted increases over time. If targeting an enemy, the aura also deals damage over time, and it does additional damage when the aura explodes based on how long the aura lasts.

name: Jurisdiction
description: Charge up a ball of blue flame and launch it at your enemies. Enemies it hits are burned and stunned.

name: Otherworldly Attraction
description: Release the tether, shadowstepping toward your tethered ally and granting barrier to allies in the surrounding area.

name: Raging Ricochet
description:
Conjure a bullet that bounces to nearby enemies. Gain might for each target struck.

If you have a fire bullet, consume it to gain additional might. If not, create a fire bullet.

name: Malicious Cunning Salvo
description: Stealth Attack. Throw an axe that explodes when it hits a target, crippling nearby enemies. Gain initiative if you strike an enemy. Consumes all malice when striking your mark to inflict poison with a duration equal to the consumed malice.

name: Wild Strikes
description: Repeatedly slam the ground, damaging nearby enemies. The final slam does increased damage, dazes enemies, and grants Nature's Strength.

name: Boulder Blast
description:
Launch a large boulder that bleeds and immobilizes your foe.

If you have an earth bullet, consume it to gain barrier when striking an enemy. If not, create an earth bullet.

name: Aerial Agility
description:
Dash then fire a quick shot. If the shot hits, you can dash again for a short time.

If you have an air bullet, consume it to remove inhibiting conditions at the start of the dash. If not, create an air bullet.

name: Enervation Echo
description: Chain. Fire another wide piercing projectile from your blade.

name: Venomous Volley
description: Throw a fan of poisonous axes that leaves spinning axes on the ground.

name: Spinning Axe
description: Throw an axe that bleeds enemies and leaves a spinning axe on the ground.

name: Aerial Agility
description:
Dash then fire a quick shot. If the shot hits, you can dash again for a short time.

If you have an air bullet, consume it to remove inhibiting conditions at the start of the dash. If not, create an air bullet.

name: Deactivate Otherworldly Bond
description: Disable the tether.

name: Line Breaker
description: Charge to the target location. When you arrive, heal nearby allies and grant them boons while debilitating nearby enemies.

name: Frostfire Flurry
description:
Dual Attack. Fire multiple bullets of fire and ice, inflicting conditions.

If you have a fire bullet, consume it to gain fire aura. If you have an ice bullet, consume it to cause the ice shots to inflict additional conditions.

name: Harrowing Storm
description: Teleport behind your target and drag any spinning axes back at your target. Returning axes also inflict torment, and enemies struck by a number of axes will be immobilized.

name: Path of Gluttony
description: Sacrifice health to dash again. Corrupt boons on enemies struck.

name: Essence of Liquid Wrath
description:
Fire a volley of arrows equipped with a payload that spreads magical flames across the ground on impact, granting boons to allies on the initial detonation and leaving a fire field.

Chain Reaction. The next short-bow skill in the radius will grant an additional boon to allies.

name: Gorge
description: Sacrifice health to dash again. Corrupt boons on enemies struck.

name: Arc Detonator
description: Fire an arrow equipped with an electric module that discharges when striking your target, shocking them and two nearby enemies with an electric blast.

name: Rampart Splitter
description: Primal Burst. Slam your staff on the ground, sending a shock wave forward that damages and immobilizes enemies while inspiring nearby allies, healing and granting regeneration to them.

name: Otherworldly Attraction
description: Release the tether, pulling the tethered enemy toward you and applying vulnerability to them.

name: Essence of Living Shadows
description:
Fire an arrow equipped with a device that spreads shadow magic across the ground on impact, healing and removing conditions from allies with the initial detonation, and healing allies with each pulse afterward.

Chain Reaction. The next short-bow skill in the radius will remove additional conditions from allies.

name: Ravenous Wave
description: Send a wave of necrotic energy cascading toward your target. Gain life force if you hit an enemy. Reactivate this skill to inflict additional damage on all targets hit by the wave.

name: Cultivate
description:
Swing an uppercut at your target, crippling them and granting vigor to nearby allies. Gain Nature's Strength if you hit an enemy. 
This skill cannot activate Force of Nature.

name: Essence of Borrowed Time
description:
Fire a row of arrows equipped with a device that envelops an area with chronal magic on impact, stunning enemies and applying superspeed to allies.

Chain Reaction. The next short-bow skill in the radius will daze enemies hit.

name: Defiant Roar
description: Unleash a defiant roar, healing nearby allies and granting them resolution.

name: Friendly Fire
description: Shoot an illusionary bullet that heals nearby allies on impact.

name: Piercing Pebble
description: Bleed your foe with sharp stone.

name: Recall Axes
description: Pull spinning axes to your target. Axes deal increased strike damage, and enemies struck by a number of axes will be immobilized.

name: Journey
description: Clone. Shoot a bullet through a portal. It reappears above the target location and explodes, damaging enemies and healing allies. Create a clone if you hit an enemy or ally.

name: Purblinding Plasma
description:
Dual Attack. Fire a ball of plasma that explodes when it hits, striking enemies behind the target.

If you have a fire bullet, consume it to create an area of fire beneath the initial target. If you have an air bullet, consume it to reduce the cooldown of this skill.

name: Thistleguard
description: Envelop yourself in thorns, striking nearby enemies and gaining stability for a brief duration. Gain additional bonuses and Nature's Strength if you strike an enemy.

name: Electric Exposure
description: Electrify your enemy, making them vulnerable.

name: Elemental Explosion
description: Shoot all of the elemental bullets. Gain an aura based on your current attunement.

name: Satiate
description: Sacrifice health to inflict additional damage on all targets hit by the wave, dealing additional damage to targets below the health threshold.

name: Hail of Justice
description: Shoot a volley of rapid-fire piercing shots that inflict bleeding and cripple.

name: Path to Victory
description: Burst. Carve a path to victory, dealing damage to enemies in front of you while healing and granting regeneration to nearby allies.

name: Consume
description: Sacrifice health to drain the strength of your enemies, inflicting weakness while granting might to yourself for each target affected.

name: Scorching Shot
description: Burn your foe with a blazing bullet.

name: Acerbic Cut
description: Slash at enemies again with Mists energy. Grant boons to allies after striking an enemy.

name: Path to Victory
description: Burst. Carve a path to victory, dealing damage to enemies in front of you while healing and granting regeneration to nearby allies.

name: Serene Slash
description: Condense Mists energy into a solid form to strike enemies in front of you.

name: Frozen Fusillade
description:
Fire a shot that freezes the ground underneath it, creating an area that speeds up allies while slowing enemy movement.

If you have an ice bullet, consume it to cause the frozen ground to shatter when it expires. If not, create an ice bullet.

name: Searing Salvo
description:
Fire a shot that explodes into fragments of fire when it hits the ground.

If you have a fire bullet, consume it to gain a fire aura. If not, create a fire bullet.

name: Motivating Whirl
description: Whirl around, damaging enemies and granting barrier to allies if an enemy is struck.

name: Path to Victory
description: Burst. Carve a path to victory, dealing damage to enemies in front of you while healing and granting regeneration to nearby allies.

name: Otherworldly Bond
description: Form a tether through the Mists to a target ally or enemy. The strength of the tether increases over time. You can only be tethered to one target at a time, and the link is severed if you are too far away from your target or when you swap weapons.

name: Flowing Finesse
description:
Dual Attack. Evade backward and grant yourself boons.

If you have an ice bullet, consume it to gain frost aura. If you have an air bullet, consume it to gain superspeed.

name: Oaken Cudgel
description: Imbue your mace with verdant energy and then leap to your target. Stun enemies, grant nearby allies protection, and heal your pet. Gain Nature's Strength if you hit an enemy.

name: Orchestrated Assault
description: Pull spinning axes to your target. Axes deal increased strike damage, and enemies struck by a number of axes will be immobilized.

name: Dazing Discharge
description:
Fire a shot that dazes your foe and leaves them vulnerable. 

If you have an air bullet, consume it to reduce the cooldown of your next pistol skill. If not, create an air bullet.

name: Spinning Axe
description: Throw an axe that bleeds enemies and leaves a spinning axe on the ground.

name: Peacekeeper
description: Fire a beam of searing light that damages and burns all enemies in its path.

name: Path of Gluttony
description: Sacrifice health to dash again. Corrupt boons on enemies struck.

name: Enervation Blade
description: Chain. Fire a wide piercing projectile from your blade. Heal if a target is struck. Healing is reduced for each target beyond the first.

name: Symbol of Ignition
description: Symbol. Create a symbol that ignites when you strike an enemy inside it or shoot a projectile into it, damaging and burning enemies inside it. If the symbol is ignited by a projectile, it enchants that projectile to burn its target.

name: Molten Meteor
description:
Dual Attack. Bombard your foe with a meteor that inflicts multiple conditions.

If you have a fire bullet, consume it to cause the shot to explode when it strikes an enemy, damaging other foes in the blast. If you have an earth bullet, consume it to inflict additional bleeding.

name: Devouring Visage
description: Fire an orb of death magic that explodes on impact, inflicting fear on enemies. Gain life force for each target struck. Reactivate this skill to drain the strength of all enemies struck by the explosion.

name: Flourish
description: Strike the earth, damaging nearby enemies and healing nearby allies. The ground flourishes in response, repeating stronger effects after a delay. Gain Nature's Strength if the initial strike hits an enemy.

name: Reverse Strike
description: Chain. A follow-up reverse-handed staff strike.

name: Valiant Leap
description: Leap to the targeted location, empowering allies and damaging enemies. Gain adrenaline if you affect another ally.

name: Inspiring Imagery
description: Throw an inspiring beacon to a target location. The beacon will explode after a short duration, granting boons to nearby allies. The beacon can be detonated early to heal allies and damage enemies.

name: Phantasmal Sharpshooter
description: Phantasm. Create a phantasm that shoots a bullet at your target, stunning them.

name: Singularity Shot
description: Shoot a bullet at a target location that explodes upon arrival, granting resistance and barrier to allies. A singularity lingers at the impact point.

name: Enervating Earth
description:
Dual Attack. Fire a quick shot that debilitates your target. 

If you have an air bullet, consume it to also inflict daze. If you have an earth bullet, consume it to also inflict bleeding on your target.

name: Balanced Strike
description: Chain. A balanced staff strike.

name: Snap Pull
description: Quickly snap your staff to pull enemies in and make them vulnerable.

name: Frigid Flurry
description:
Fire a volley of icy bullets that inflict bleeding.

If you have an ice bullet, consume it to heal for each strike. If not, create an ice bullet.

name: Path to Victory
description: Burst. Carve a path to victory, dealing damage to enemies in front of you while healing and granting regeneration to nearby allies.

name: Through the Heart
description: Fire a piercing shot that inflicts bleeding.

name: Shattering Stone
description:
Fire a shot that shatters into multiple shards.

If you have an earth bullet, consume it to enhance your next few attacks to inflict bleeding. If not, create an earth bullet.

name: Soothing Splash
description: Shoot a bullet of water. Heal for each unique condition on the enemy.

name: Cunning Salvo
description: Stealth Attack. Throw an axe that explodes when it hits a target, crippling nearby enemies. Gain initiative if you strike an enemy.

name: Burgeon
description: Chain. Slam your target.

name: Inspiring Whirl
description: Whirl your staff, damaging nearby enemies and inspiring allies.

name: Deathly Enervation
description: Chain. Fire an even wider piercing projectile that inflicts chill.

name: Essence of Animated Sand
description:
Fire an arrow equipped with a payload that explodes enchanted sand on impact, granting barrier and might to allies.

Chain Reaction. The next short-bow skill in the radius will grant additional might to allies.

name: Energy Meld
description: Gain endurance.

name: Echoing Erosion
description:
Dual Attack. Bleed your foe with ice and stone.

If you have an ice bullet, consume it to heal yourself. If you have an earth bullet, consume it to grant yourself barrier.

name: Gormandize
description: Sacrifice health to inflict additional damage and conditions on all targets hit by the maelstrom.

name: Abstraction
description: Detonate your beacon, debilitating enemies and bolstering allies.

name: Rampant Growth
description:
Unleashed Ambush. Strike the ground with your mace, creating a cascade of verdant growth that immobilizes targets struck and heals nearby allies. Gain Nature's Strength if you hit an enemy.
This skill cannot activate Force of Nature.

name: Germinate
description: Chain. Strike with your mace.

name: Path to Victory
description: Burst. Carve a path to victory, dealing damage to enemies in front of you while healing and granting regeneration to nearby allies.

name: Function Gyro
description:
Create a lightning field at your location, then summon gyros to finish foes and revive allies within the field.
Interrupted gyros are destroyed.

name: Zealot's Flame
description: Set yourself alight, periodically burning up to three nearby foes. The final pulse applies additional burning.

name: Detonate Blossoming Aura
description: Detonate your Blossoming Aura manually.

name: Function Gyro
description:
Create a lightning field at the specified point, then summon gyros to finish foes and revive allies within the field.
Interrupted gyros are destroyed.

name: Icerazor's Ire
description: Legendary Renegade. Summon Visk Icerazor from the Mists to magically bombard your enemies with debilitating conditions.

name: Razorclaw's Rage
description: Legendary Renegade. Summon Centurion Jas Razorclaw from the Mists to strike nearby enemies and enhance the attacks of your allies.

name: Darkrazor's Daring
description:
Legendary Renegade. Summon Kus Darkrazor to disrupt your enemies.

Band Together. After using this skill, your next Legendary Renegade skill activates instantly and is enhanced. When this skill is enhanced it also grants resistance to nearby allies.

name: Carnivore
description: Steal health from a disabled foe.

name: Breakrazor's Bastion
description: Legendary Renegade. Summon Era Breakrazor to heal your allies while shielding them from condition damage.

name: Frightening Speed
description: In a blur of flashing blades, Kanaxai dashes from target to target, striking everything in his path, pausing briefly to perform a deadly spin. Does increased damage to secondary targets.

name: Tormenting Visions
description: Send distressing thoughts to your enemy to torment them.

name: Vialgos's Toxin Pool
description: Caustic projectiles erupt from Vialgos, covering the ground and forming a pool of rot. Pools of rot will cause stacking damage over time.

name: Annihilate
description: Deimos slams its fists, creating a massive shockwave.

name: Rapid Decay
description: Deimos decomposes the ground beneath a target. For each target hit, the affected area rapidly increases in size.

name: Panopticon
description: Beast. Fire malignant magic at nearby enemies, corrupting boons on enemies it hits.

name: Staring Void
description: Blast demonic energy in front of you, inflicting conditions on enemies it hits.

name: Entangling Asp
description:
Follow Up. Poison your foe with a sweeping strike. Movement-impaired foes are immobilized.
Striking an enemy with a follow-up attack enables finisher attacks.

name: Maiming Spear
description: Throw your spear at a targeted location, damaging and inflicting conditions on opponents in the area and causing an aftershock after a short delay. The aftershock deals more damage to the opponent closest to the epicenter.

name: Etching: Haboob
description: Etch a spell into the ground that unleashes a devastating dust storm. Using a number of other skills within this etching completes the spell, unlocking its full potential.

name: Shattering Assault
description: Finisher. Strike foes in front of you and remove boons from them, then enter stealth. Remove additional boons from weakened foes.

name: Earthen Spear
description: Hurl a heavy earthen spear that cripples your foe.

name: Shale Storm
description: Dual Attack. Create a brief storm of whirling rocks that destroy incoming projectiles. Reduce the recharge of your primary attunement. Your next strike will deal additional damage to enemies around your target and inflict conditions.

name: Stone Strike
description: Toss a light spear of stone to bleed your foe.

name: Harrier's Toss
description: Burst. Jump up and throw a spear at your targeted location, dealing damage in an area. Damage dealt is increased with adrenaline level, and the opponent closest to the epicenter takes additional damage.

name: Owl's Flight
description: Stealth Attack. Reveal yourself and throw your spear. The spear is wider and unblockable, and it pierces.

name: Fiery Impact
description: Dual Attack. Gain stability. Reduce the recharge of your primary attunement. Your next strike will deal additional damage to enemies around your target and inflict conditions.

name: Etching: Derecho
description: Etch a spell into the ground that summons an intense windstorm. Using a number of other skills within this etching completes the spell, unlocking its full potential.

name: Frostfire Ward
description: Dual Attack. Gain fire and frost aura. Reduce the recharge of your primary attunement. Your next strike will deal additional damage to enemies around your target and remove conditions from you.

name: Bee's Sting
description: Ranged.Throw your spear.

name: Drake's Swipe
description: Chain. Swing your spear. If your enemy is far away, use Bee's Sting instead.

name: Malicious Ashen Assault
description: Stealth Attack. Attack foes in front of you with a series of strikes, inflicting damaging conditions. The final strike makes them vulnerable. If this skill follows a Finisher skill, it grants initiative. Consumes all malice when striking your mark to inflict torment and increase the damage dealt.

name: Distracting Throw
description: Throw a spear that inflicts conditions on your target. If this strikes a movement-impaired foe, it also inflicts daze. If this skill follows a Finisher skill, it counts as a lead attack and grants a bonus to outgoing damage for a duration.

name: Falcon's Stoop
description: Fling your spear at your enemy, dealing heavy damage. Damage is increased against immobilized, disabled, or defiant foes.

name: Abyssal Fire
description: Ranged. Hurl your weapon at your foe. If you are in close range, swing your weapon at them instead. Striking a foe reduces the cooldown of Abyssal Raze once per skill use.

name: Ravager's Abandon
description: Unleashed Ambush. Release a wave of corruption in front of you, damaging enemies and spawning spores under targets struck.

name: Lesser Haboob
description: Unleash a devastating dust storm that damages and debilitates enemies.

name: Abyssal Blitz
description: Dash in a direction and slightly recharge Abyssal Raze while leaving portals in your wake that detonate when foes walk over them.

name: Helio Rush
description:
Charge forward with your spear, striking enemies and healing allies you pass through. Upon striking an enemy, your next spear attack is illuminated.
 
Illuminated. Allies you pass through are healed for more and gain boons. Enemies you strike take bonus damage and are inflicted with conditions.

  Allies at full health are not affected by this skill.

name: Puncturing Jab
description: Stab your foe, inflicting bleeding. Inflict vulnerability if your target is focused.

name: Phantasmal Lancer
description: Dash at your foe, removing boons from them. Leave a phantasm at your initial location that will launch a spear at your target, dealing heavy damage and crippling targets. If your phantasm strikes a crippled target, immobilize them instead. If you have Clarity, summon an additional phantasm.

name: Abyssal Blot
description: Unleash gravitational Mist forces on your targeted area that initially pulls foes toward the center. Abyssal Raze's cooldown is reduced for each target you attempt to pull.

name: Mental Collapse
description: Teleport to your target and release a cascade of psychic energy, damaging nearby enemies. Refresh your Mind the Gap skill. The initial impact stuns foes struck if you have Clarity.

name: Mighty Throw
description: Throw a spear at your enemy that shatters on contact, scattering shards that damage enemies around the initial target.

name: Disrupting Throw
description: Throw a spear that pierces foes in a line, immobilizing them. The first enemy struck by this skill is additionally dazed.

name: Restorative Spear
description: Throw a spear of water at your foe that heals you when it strikes.

name: Ripple
description: Evade attacks and remove conditions from yourself. Your next spear skill recharges faster.

name: Abyssal Force
description: Hurl your spear toward your foes, inflicting area damage and conditions on targets struck. Striking at least one foe causes Abyssal Raze to receive a large recharge reduction.

name: Devastator
description: Traverse the area and unleash lighting around you, directly targeting focused foes a number of times.

name: Roiling Skies
description: Charge the earth with electricity, launching focused foes and stunning others.

name: Gleaming Disc
description:
Spin around, striking enemies around you. After a short delay, a shock wave of light bursts forth from your position, damaging enemies and granting might to allies. Your next spear attack is illuminated when striking an enemy with the initial spin. 

Illuminated. The shock wave additionally deals more damage and inflicts conditions on enemies and grants boons to allies.

name: Etching: Jökulhlaup
description: Etch a spell into the ground that invokes a glacial flood. Using a number of other skills within this etching completes the spell, unlocking its full potential.

name: Unsuspecting Strike
description:
Lead Attack. Leap at your foe and inflict conditions. Inflict additional stacks against foes above the health threshold.
Striking an enemy with a lead attack enables follow-up attacks.

name: Meteor
description: Conjure a meteor at the target location, damaging enemies. Enemies at the center of the impact take increased damage.

name: Shadow Veil
description: Block the next incoming attack. If you block an attack, heal yourself. If this skill follows a Finisher skill, it blocks additional attacks.

name: Spearmarshal's Support
description: Mark a single target; after a short delay, bombard the area with spears that deal more damage to the marked target and continue to track their location.

name: Spider's Web
description: Stealth Attack. Throw out a net, damaging and immobilizing enemies on impact. Foes in the net are crippled. Your pet becomes excited for the hunt, gaining superspeed.

name: Lesser Volcano
description:
Create a violent eruption that damages foes.
Damage is reduced on subsequent hits against the same foe.

name: Twister
description: Conjure a twister at the target location, making foes vulnerable. Foes in the center of the twister are lifted into the air.

name: Amplifying Slice
description: Strike your foe, refreshing your focus and bleeding your target. Inflict vulnerability if your target is focused.

name: Lightning Rod
description: Prime your lightning rod to deal damage to nearby enemies. Focused enemies receive extra punishment. Gain charges for your Electric Artillery skill.

name: Ashen Assault
description: Stealth Attack. Attack foes in front of you with a series of strikes, inflicting damaging conditions. The final strike makes them vulnerable. If this skill follows a Finisher skill, it grants initiative.

name: Harrier's Toss
description: Burst. Jump up and throw a spear at your targeted location, dealing damage in an area. Damage dealt is increased with adrenaline level, and the opponent closest to the epicenter takes additional damage.

name: Extirpate
description: Perform a wide swing that removes boons from foes. Gain soul shards and might for each target struck.

name: Panther's Prowl
description: Conceal yourself in the brush, gaining stealth. Gain Hunter's Prowess, allowing you to use a Stealth Attack even if revealed.

name: Spear Swipe
description: Jump up and evade attacks, then swipe forward, sending a wave of air in front of you that pushes you backward, knocks enemies back, and reflects projectiles. The first enemy struck is launched instead of knocked back. Evading an attack reduces the cooldown of this skill.

name: Fissure
description: Create a fissure at the target location, crippling foes. Foes at the center of the fissure take increased damage and are weakened.

name: Dark Slash
description: Chain. Slash your foes with your spear.

name: Addle
description: Daze your target and gain life force and soul shards. If your target is using a skill, the daze duration is extended and you gain additional life force and soul shards. If you have a number of soul shards above the threshold when you activate this skill, your target is also immobilized.

name: Harrier's Toss
description: Burst. Jump up and throw a spear at your targeted location, dealing damage in an area. The opponent closest to the epicenter takes additional damage.

name: Abyssal Strike
description: Melee. Hurl your weapon at your foe. If you are in close range, swing your weapon at them instead. Striking a foe reduces the cooldown of Abyssal Raze once per skill use.

name: Haboob
description: Unleash a devastating dust storm that damages and debilitates enemies.

name: Harden
description: Gain barrier. Your next spear skill inflicts daze.

name: Warclaw's Engage
description: Leap to a target location, damaging nearby enemies. Deal more damage to foes below the health threshold.

name: Harrier's Toss
description: Burst. Jump up and throw a spear at your targeted location, dealing damage in an area. Damage dealt is increased with adrenaline level, and the opponent closest to the epicenter takes additional damage.

name: Wolf's Onslaught
description: Stealth Attack. Slash enemies in front of you, then follow up with a powerful blow.

name: Energize
description: Gain superspeed. Your next spear skill always critically strikes.

name: Deadly Slice
description: Chain. Slice foes in front of you with your spear.

name: Mantis Sting
description:
Lead Attack. Cripple your foe with a quick strike.
Striking an enemy with a lead attack enables follow-up attacks.

name: Harrier's Toss
description: Burst. Jump up and throw a spear at your targeted location, dealing damage in an area. Damage dealt is increased with adrenaline level, and the opponent closest to the epicenter takes additional damage.

name: Volcano
description:
Create a violent eruption that damages foes.
Damage is reduced on subsequent hits against the same foe.

name: Sinister Stab
description: Chain. Stab foes and chill them. Gain a soul shard if you strike a foe.

name: Elutriate
description: Dual Attack. Remove a damaging and a nondamaging condition from yourself. Reduce the recharge of your primary attunement. Your next strike will deal additional damage to enemies around your target and inflict conditions.

name: Etching: Volcano
description: Etch a spell into the ground that creates a violent eruption. Using a number of other skills within this etching completes the spell, unlocking its full potential.

name: Daybreaking Slash
description: Swing your spear, sending out a wave of light in front of you that damages enemies and heals allies.

name: Abyssal Raze
description: Attack foes in the target area, inflicting them with conditions. Gain stacks of Crushing Abyss for each target struck, up to the maximum.

name: Lesser Derecho
description: Summon an intense windstorm that damages and dazes foes.

name: Ice Beam
description: Chill enemies with a beam of ice.

name: Soothing Burst
description: Dual Attack. Heal yourself. Reduce the recharge of your primary attunement. Your next strike will deal additional damage to enemies around your target and heal you.

name: Vampiric Slash
description:
Follow Up. Strike your foes and siphon health from them. Siphon additional health from vulnerable foes.
Striking an enemy with a follow-up attack enables finisher attacks.

name: Focused Devastation
description: Repeatedly strike your foe, inflicting conditions.

name: Psystrike
description: Rend your foe with an upward swing. Gain might per target struck.

name: Fractured Glass
description: Ambush. Pierce targets in front of you in a flurry of blows, leaving them vulnerable.

name: Perforate
description: Attack foes in front of you with a series of strikes, consuming any active soul shards. Deal additional damage against foes below the health threshold.

name: Falling Spider
description: Finisher. Strike nearby enemies, inflicting multiple conditions. Deal more damage and inflict additional conditions against controlled and immobilized foes.

name: Blazing Barrage
description: Unleash a volley of blazing spears, damaging foes in the area.

name: Cheetah's Strike
description: Chain. Heave your spear, gaining swiftness if you strike an enemy. If your enemy is far away, use Bee's Sting instead.

name: Flame Spear
description: Throw a spear of flame at your foe.

name: Fulgor
description: Create a storm of lightning that inflicts damage over time to affected foes.

name: Derecho
description: Summon an intense windstorm that damages and dazes foes.

name: Mind the Gap
description: Swing your spear in a circle, dealing increased damage to foes in the outer edge. Striking with the outer edge will always deal a critical hit. Create a clone and gain Clarity if you hit an enemy. If you are empowered, gain might.

name: Solar Storm
description:
Throw a spear above the targeted point. The spear explodes, raining shards that damage enemies and remove conditions from allies. Your next spear attack is illuminated if you are within range of your own shards. 

Illuminated. More shards are produced. Removing conditions from allies also heals them. 
Damage is reduced per target each time they are struck by this skill.

name: Mind Pierce
description: Deliver a finishing thrust, breaking your opponent's mind and inflicting weakness.

name: Wild Throw
description: Primal Burst. Throw several piercing spears that inflict vulnerability in quick succession.

name: Galvanize
description: Dual Attack. Gain might and superspeed. Reduce the recharge of your primary attunement. Your next strike will deal additional damage to enemies around your target.

name: Lesser Jökulhlaup
description: Invoke a glacial flood that damages enemies. Heal for each target struck.

name: Isolate
description:
Throw a spear at your target. If it strikes a foe, it inflicts conditions and you may reactivate to teleport to that foe. 
This skill recharges when exiting death shroud.

name: Soul Shards
description: Siphon life from targets struck by Perforate. Damage is increased against enemies below the health threshold, and healing is increased while you are below the health threshold.

name: Rending Strike
description: Swing your spear, inflicting bleeding. Inflict vulnerability if your target is focused.

name: Mongoose's Frenzy
description: Swipe at enemies in front of you, cleaving them.

name: Wyvern's Lash
description: Chain. Strike with your spear, crippling your foe. If your enemy is far away, use Bee's Sting instead.

name: Distress
description: Teleport to the foe marked by Isolate, recharge Perforate, and gain soul shards. Gain additional soul shards if there are no other enemies nearby.

name: Conduit Surge
description: Leap toward your target, unleashing intense energy on the area if you strike them. Your primary target becomes the focus of your other skills. If a focused target dies, this skill is refreshed.

name: Lightning Javelin
description: Launch a spear of lightning that makes your foe vulnerable.

name: Symbol of Luminance
description:
Places the Symbol of Luminance on the ground, knocking back enemies on initial cast. While active, the symbol grants boons to allies and inflicts conditions on enemies. While standing within the symbol, your spear attacks are automatically illuminated and do not consume the illuminated effect when used. Resistance granted by this skill can only be granted once per interval.

Illuminated. While the symbol is active, all other spear skills are illuminated, even if you move out of range of the symbol.

name: Seethe
description: Gain boons. Your next spear skill deals increased damage.

name: Jökulhlaup
description: Invoke a glacial flood that damages enemies. Heal for each target struck.

name: Electric Artillery
description: Hurl your charged rod at a foe, immobilizing them. Foes take increased burning duration and vulnerability stacks based on your lightning rod's charge.

name: Barbed Spear
description: Swing your spear. If your enemy is far away, throw your spear instead.

name: Undertow
description: Conjure a whirlpool at the target location, pulling enemies in. Enemies at the center of the whirlpool are slowed.

name: Blitz Mines
description: Drop mines behind you as you dodge.

name: Predator's Ambush
description: Stealth Attack. Leap to a target location, dazing enemies. Deal increased damage to foes below the health threshold.

name: Imaginary Inversion
description: Cleanse conditions and evade while preparing a strong attack. If you successfully evade, heal yourself. Healing is improved if you have Clarity.

name: Psycut
description: Slash your spear in front of yourself. Gain might per target struck.

name: Missed Stroke
description: Paint stroke is sloppy.

name: Overcharged Conduit Blast
description: Scarlet slams her fists into the ground, releasing a wave of energy that applies torment to her enemies.

name: Battle Maul
description: Pounce on foes.

name: Haunting Echo
description: Lextalion's mere presence causes a wave of spectral energy to wash over the area every 3 seconds.

name: Bop
description: Smack your foe to knock them down.

name: Stone Sweep
description: Sweeping attack.

name: Wicked Swipe
description: Swipes the air, dealing damage at close range.

name: Stone Sweep
description: Sweeping attack.

name: Rallying Roar
description: Beast. Let out a noble roar, granting superspeed to nearby allies.

name: Spectral Impact
description: Smashes the ground, dealing impact damage to foes in front and underneath.

name: Chorus of Thunder
description:
Decima calls out to the storm, which responds with a thundering chorus. This consumes all stacks of Peal of Discord and Peal of Harmony.

Each stack of Peal of Discord lets Decima target the closest untargeted player with Chorus of Thunder.

Each stack of Peal of Harmony lets Decima target an uncharged conduit near the farthest player.

Thunderbolts deal increased damage to secondary targets in their area.

name: Seismic Crash
description:
Decima slams down, causing the immediate vicinity to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding away. Dodge rolling will end the slide prematurely. Deals increased damge to close targets.

Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Fluxlance Fusillade
description:
Decima fires several fluxlance beams at enemies in sequence. Conduits struck by a beam gain charge, but block the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Propel
description: Ura launches herself at the furthest target, dealing a high amount of damage when she lands.

name: Rain of Spores
description: The Greerling targets 3 players, preferring the farthest away, and then fires a torrent of exploding spores along a line that moves towards the initial position of the target. The spores explode on impact, inflicting damage, poison, and confusion.

name: Fulgent Aura
description: Charged conduits emit a dangerous aura of Arcane Flux that damages nearby enemies. The aura increases in size as the conduit gains more Charge.

name: Fulgent Fence
description: Decima periodically links two conduits together with a tether of arcane flux. Enemies entering the beam are damaged and pushed out. Enemies that are shoved into the beam by Decima's attacks are ejected at high speed.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Chorus of Thunder
description:
Decima calls out to the storm, which responds with a thundering chorus. This consumes all stacks of Peal of Discord and Peal of Harmony.

Each stack of Peal of Discord lets Decima target the closest untargeted player with Chorus of Thunder.

Each stack of Peal of Harmony lets Decima target an uncharged conduit near the farthest player.

Thunderbolts deal increased damage to secondary targets in their area.

name: Stomp the Growth
description: Greer stomps 3 times in quick succession. The first two stomps hit all targets in a circle around the impact point, dealing damage, inflicting poison, and applying vulnerability. The third stomp creates a wave of corruption.

name: Steam Prison
description: Creates a steam prison that prevents escape and reflects projectiles.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Focused Fluxlance
description:
Decima targets a conduit with a focused fluxlance attack. The beam charges the targeted conduit unless the indicated number of players stand in the beam to absorb it. 

Does not trigger extra damage from Harmonic Sensitivity.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Discordant Thunder
description:
Decima calls out to the storm, and the storm responds with a thundering chorus.

A number of players closest to Decima are targeted with bolts of Discordant Thunder. If a bolt's area of effect strikes a conduit, it gains some charge.

name: Mainshock
description: Decima slams an orb of arcane flux into the ground, causing a cascade of ruptures to form around her. The ground heaves with enough force to shatter bones and cripple her enemies.

name: Cage of Decay
description: Rot cages create several outward-rippling cascades of rot walls around a zone of noxious blight. The last set of rot walls stay in place for the duration of the noxious blight, damaging, bleeding, and knocking back foes and blocking projectiles that hit them.

name: Flux Nova
description:
Decima gathers a colossal amount of arcane flux into an unstable orb. After several seconds, she detonates this orb to obliterate her enemies.

If Decima reaches full charge while channeling this skill, it ends early, and the damage becomes unsurvivable.

name: Seeds of Decay
description: The shattered fragments of Greer's armor rain down on the arena. Smaller pieces explode on impact, but larger fragments transform into titanspawn, ready to help Greer in the fight.

name: Harmonic Sensitivity
description: Taking damage from a fluxlance attack while under the effects of Harmonic Sensitivity causes extra damage.

name: Fulminate
description:
Just before Decima unleashes Flux Nova, she also fulminates all conduits. 

Conduits with 3 charges damage all enemies, apply exposed, and grant Decima 5 stacks of Peal of Harmony and Peal of Discord.

Conduits with 1 or 2 charges damage all enemies.

name: Foreshock
description: Decima performs a series of stomp attacks to pulverize her puny opponents.

name: Sweep the Mold
description: Greer sweeps his claw in a 60-degree cone, damaging, bleeding, poisoning, and knocking back targets. This attack sets up Rake the Rot, the next attack in the chain.

name: Sparking Aura
description: Conduits with charge periodically release dancing sparks that move toward Decima. Sparks lose some health and stop moving temporarily when enough players are standing in their aura. If a dancing spark reaches Decima, it is absorbed and grants her some charge.

name: Noxious Blight
description: Noxious blights form persistent pools of corruption on the ground. Foes in a noxious blight take continuous damage, and their boons will be corrupted while they remain in the noxious blight.

name: Foreshock
description: Decima performs a series of stomp attacks to pulverize her puny opponents.

name: Noxious Blight
description: Noxious blights form persistent pools of corruption on the ground. Foes in a noxious blight take continuous damage, and their boons will be corrupted while they remain in the noxious blight.

name: Enfeebling Miasma
description: Greer exhales lingering clouds of poisonous gas that travel outward to form 3 roughly conical areas. The gas clouds stay in place for several seconds, poisoning foes inside them.

name: Propel
description: Ura launches herself at the furthest target, dealing a high amount of damage when she lands.

name: Decimation
description: As Decima gains Charge, her fluxlance attacks deal extra damage.

name: Wave of Corruption
description: An expanding circular shockwave thats spreads outward. Players hit by the wave of corruption take damage, gain vulnerability, are knocked down, and have a number of their boons corrupted. This attack cannot be blocked, but players can avoid the effects by jumping over it.

name: Seismic Crash
description: When Decima leaps, anything she lands on gets squashed like a bug.

name: Thrumming Presence
description:
Decima's aura makes your bones resonate with arcane flux. Each time she gains charge, the sensation becomes more painful.

Makes enemies more vulnerable to Decima's fluxlance beams.

name: Flux Nova
description:
Upon reaching maximum charge, Decima gathers all her arcane flux into an unstable orb. After a few seconds, she detonates it to obliterate her enemies.

This version of Flux Nova can trigger any time Decima reaches maximum charge.

name: Blob of Blight
description: Reeg targets up to 3 foes, preferring the most distant combatants. He slams his fist down, creating a damaging sphere that will then fire a blob of blight that follows the targeted enemy for 12 seconds, firing multiple smaller projectiles as it moves. If it hits a targeted foe, it will also create a stationary blob of blight that fires projectiles for several seconds.

name: Foreshock
description: Decima performs a series of stomp attacks to pulverize her puny opponents.

name: Harmonious Thunder
description:
Decima calls out to the storm, and the storm responds with a thundering chorus.

Decima targets a number of conduits with bolts of Harmonious Thunder, granting them each some charge.

name: Sparking Aura
description: Conduits with charge periodically release dancing sparks that move toward Decima. Sparks lose some health and stop moving temporarily when enough players are standing in their aura. If a dancing spark reaches Decima, it is absorbed and grants her some charge.

name: Fracture Armor
description: Decima's armor fractures, leaving her vulnerable to her own Flux Nova attack. When Flux Nova detonates, Decima will become stunned and exposed.

name: Decimation
description: As Decima gains Charge, her fluxlance attacks deal extra damage.

description: Greer creates a fan of 5 cascades, starting at the edges of a 180-degree arc and moving toward the center. Rippling thorn barriers travel along these lines, damaging and knocking back anything struck by them. When the barriers reach the end of their track, they create a circular rot cage of barriers surrounding a zone of noxious blight.

name: Earthrend
description: Decima causes a large ring-shaped area of ground to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding toward Decima. Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Fluxlance
description:
Decima fires a single fluxlance beam at an enemy. A conduit struck by the beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

description: When Decima leaps, anything she lands on gets squashed like a bug.

name: Sulfuric Froth
description: Inflicts Sulfuric Acid

If the indicated number of players are within the circle when time runs out, the rot eruption is stabilized and only does damage. If a player is within more than one stacking circle, they are instantly killed. If there are not enough players within the circle, a rot eruption occurs and the Greerling gains 2 empowered stacks.

Conduits with 1 or 2 charges damage all enemies.

name: Invulnerable Barrier
description: Greer encircles himself in a barrier, protecting himself from further harm while his Greerlings attack his foes. Players entering the barrier will be knocked back.

name: Empowering Blast
description: Fires a projectile of corrupted life energy at Greer. If it hits Greer, it grants him 2 empowered stacks. If it hits a player, it will knock them back and continue on. If it is blocked by a player, the projectile is destroyed.

name: Fulminate
description: Conduits that already have 3 charges when hit by fluxlance or thunder attack damage all enemies in the encounter, apply exposed, and grant Decima 5 stacks of Peal of Harmony and Peal of Discord.

name: Toxic Geyser
description: Applies poison and Sulfuric Acid, and grants protection and might to Ura.

name: Seeds of Decay
description: The shattered fragments of Greer's armor rain down on the arena. Smaller pieces explode on impact, but larger fragments transform into titanspawn, ready to help Greer in the fight.

description: Greer targets up to 3 foes, preferring the most distant combatants. He slams his fist down, creating a damaging sphere that will then fire a blob of blight that follows the targeted enemy for 12 seconds, firing multiple smaller projectiles as it moves. If it hits a targeted foe, it will also create a stationary blob of blight that fires projectiles for several seconds.

name: Fluxlance Fusillade
description:
Decima fires several fluxlance beams at enemies in sequence. Conduits struck by a beam gain charge, but block the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Noxious Blight
description: Noxious blights form persistent pools of corruption on the ground. Foes in a noxious blight take continuous damage, and their boons will be corrupted while they remain in the noxious blight.

name: Fulgent Aura
description: Charged conduits emit a dangerous aura of Arcane Flux that damages nearby enemies. The aura increases in size as the conduit gains more Charge.

name: Ripples of Rot
description: Greer leaps into the air towards a targeted player. When Greer lands, targets directly under him will be knocked back. He then fires cascades of rot walls that ripple outward, inflicting damage, knockback, and bleeding on anyone hit by them. The final rot wall stays in place, blocking player projectiles that hit them.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Toxic Geyser
description: Applies poison and Sulfuric Acid, and grants protection and might to Ura.

name: Empowering Blast
description: Fires a projectile of corrupted life energy at Greer. If it hits Greer, it grants him 2 empowered stacks. If it hits a player, it will knock them back and continue on. If it is blocked by a player, the projectile is destroyed.

name: Fluxlance
description:
Decima fires a single fluxlance beam at an enemy. A conduit struck by the beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Earthrend
description: Decima causes a large ring-shaped area of ground to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding toward Decima. Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Mainshock
description: Decima slams an orb of arcane flux into the ground, causing a cascade of ruptures to form around her. The ground heaves with enough force to shatter bones and cripple her enemies.

name: Eruption of Rot
description: Greer places a stacking indicator on several players. If the indicated number of players are within the circle when time runs out, the rot eruption is stabilized and only does damage. If a player is within more than one stacking circle, they are instantly killed. If there are not enough players within the circle, a rot eruption occurs and the Greerling gains 2 empowered stacks.

name: Mainshock
description: Decima slams an orb of arcane flux into the ground, causing a cascade of ruptures to form around her. The ground heaves with enough force to shatter bones and cripple her enemies.

name: Thrumming Presence
description:
Decima's aura makes your bones resonate with arcane flux. Each time she gains charge, the sensation becomes more painful.

Makes enemies more vulnerable to Decima's fluxlance beams.

name: Rake the Rot
description: Greer sweeps his claw in a 60-degree cone, damaging, crippling, poisoning, and knocking back targets. This attack sets up Stomp the Mould, the final attack in the chain.

name: Earthrend
description: When Decima leaps, anything she lands on gets squashed like a bug.

name: Eruption Vent
description: Ura causes a sulfuric geyser to erupt at target's location after several seconds, creating a shockwave and leaving behind a geyser that inflicts poison and Sulfuric Acid on enemies and benefits allies.

name: Fulminate
description: Conduits that already have 3 charges when hit by fluxlance or thunder attack damage all enemies in the encounter, apply exposed, and grant Decima 5 stacks of Peal of Harmony and Peal of Discord.

name: Sweep the Mold
description: The Greerling sweeps its claw in a 60-degree cone, damaging, bleeding, poisoning, and knocking back targets. This attack sets up Rake the Rot, the next attack in the chain.

name: Fulgent Aura
description: Charged conduits emit a dangerous aura of Arcane Flux that damages nearby enemies. The aura increases in size as the conduit gains more Charge.

name: Foreshock
description: Decima performs a series of stomp attacks to pulverize her puny opponents.

name: Acid Spray
description: Inflicts Sulfuric Acid

name: Stomp the Growth
description: Greer stomps 3 times in quick succession. The first two stomps hit all targets in a circle around the impact point, dealing damage, inflicting poison, and applying vulnerability. The third stomp creates a wave of corruption.

name: Discordant Thunder
description:
Decima calls out to the storm, and the storm responds with a thundering chorus.

A number of players closest to Decima are targeted with bolts of Discordant Thunder. If a bolt's area of effect strikes a conduit, it gains some charge.

name: Rot Eruption
description: Rot walls burst up from the ground, knocking players back and creating a noxious blight at the eruption point. Players hit by a rot eruption take damage and gain poison, bleeding, and a stack of infectious rot.

name: Pressure Blast
description: Causes an eruption that imprisons the target and nearby enemies. Can be dispelled using a bloodstone shard.

name: Scattering Sporeblast
description: The Greerling rapidly fires exploding spores in a cone in front of it. Players in this cone will be directly targeted by the spores.

name: Sparking Aura
description: Conduits with charge periodically release dancing sparks that move toward Decima. Sparks lose some health and stop moving temporarily when enough players are standing in their aura. If the dancing spark reaches Decima, it is absorbed and grants her some charge.

name: Earthrend
description: When Decima leaps, anything she lands on gets squashed like a bug.

name: Rake the Rot
description: The Greerling sweeps its claw in a 60-degree cone, damaging, crippling, poisoning, and knocking back targets. This attack sets up Stomp the Mould, the final attack in the chain.

name: Rot the World
description: Greer rains explosive spores down on the battlefield as he musters his power. This leaves him vulnerable, opening his defiance bar. If players do not break him, he will spawn rot cages under the feet of every player in the raid, as well as extra ones, choking the battlefield. Breaking him will interrupt the attack.

name: Enfeebling Miasma
description: Reeg exhales lingering clouds of poisonous gas that travel outward to form 3 roughly conical areas. The gas clouds stay in place for several seconds, poisoning foes inside them.

name: Rain of Spores
description: Greer targets 3 players, preferring the farthest away, and then fires a torrent of exploding spores along a line that moves towards the initial position of the target. The spores explode on impact, inflicting damage, poison, and confusion.

name: Fulgent Fence
description: Decima periodically links two conduits together with a tether of arcane flux. Enemies entering the beam are damaged and pushed out. Enemies that are shoved into the beam by Decima's attacks are ejected at high speed.

name: Blob of Blight
description: If one of Greer's blobs of blight hits a targeted player, it explodes and places a stationary blob of blight that will continue to fire projectiles for several seconds.

name: Mainshock
description: Decima slams an orb of arcane flux into the ground, causing a cascade of ruptures to form around her. The ground heaves with enough force to shatter bones and cripple her enemies.

It then fires cascades of rot walls that ripple outward, inflicting damage, knockback, and bleeding on anyone they hit. The final rot wall stays in place, blocking player projectiles that hit them.

name: Seeds of Decay
description: The shattered fragments of Greer's armor rain down on the arena. Smaller pieces explode on impact, but larger fragments transform into titanspawn, ready to help Greer in the fight.

name: Seismic Crash
description:
Decima slams down, causing the immediate vicinity to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding away. Dodge rolling will end the slide prematurely. Deals increased damge to close targets.

Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Chorus of Thunder
description:
Decima calls out to the storm, which responds with a thundering chorus. This consumes all stacks of Peal of Discord and Peal of Harmony.

Each stack of Peal of Discord lets Decima target the closest untargeted player with Chorus of Thunder.

Each stack of Peal of Harmony lets Decima target an uncharged conduit near the farthest player.

Thunderbolts deal increased damage to secondary targets in their area.

description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Flux Nova
description:
Decima gathers a colossal amount of arcane flux into an unstable orb. After several seconds, she detonates this orb to obliterate her enemies.

If Decima reaches full charge while channeling this skill, it ends early, and the damage becomes unsurvivable.

name: Seismoelectricity
description:
Transcendent Boulder leaps into the air and slams its fists down, damaging and knocking down nearby enemies. Additionally, six boon-stripping arcs of electricity are released that spread out before returning to their source.

The arcs can only strike enemies touching the ground.
