Upon reaching maximum charge, Decima gathers all her arcane flux into an unstable orb. After a few seconds, she detonates it to obliterate her enemies.

This version of Flux Nova can trigger any time Decima reaches maximum charge.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Cage of Decay
description: Greer creates a fan of 5 cascades, starting at the edges of a 180-degree arc and moving toward the center. Rippling thorn barriers travel along these arcs, damaging and knocking back anything struck by them. When the barriers reach the end of their track, they create a circular rot cage surrounding a zone of noxious blight. Players caught in the rot cage gain a stack of Plague Rot.

name: Charged Ground
description: A persistent electrical field that increases in damage over time appears under any player hit by Sparkwave. Upon reaching maximum damage, it also dazes and applies vulnerability.

name: Enfeebling Miasma
description: Reeg exhales lingering clouds of poisonous gas that travel outward to form 3 conical areas. The gas clouds stay in place for several seconds, poisoning foes inside them. Victims affected by the gas who have 20 stacks of poison have those stacks turned into 1 stack of Plague Rot.

name: Toxic Geyser
description: Applies poison and Sulfuric Acid, and grants protection and might to Ura.

name: Sweep the Mold
description: The Greerling sweeps its claw in a 60-degree cone, damaging, bleeding, poisoning, and knocking back targets. This attack sets up Rake the Rot, the next attack in the chain.

name: Rain of Spores
description: The Greerling targets 3 players, preferring the farthest away, and then fires a torrent of exploding spores along a line that moves towards the initial position of the target. The spores explode on impact, inflicting damage, poison, and confusion.

name: Fluxlance Fusillade
description:
Decima fires several fluxlance beams at enemies in sequence. Conduits struck by a beam gain charge, but block the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Earthrend
description: Decima causes a large ring-shaped area of ground to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding toward Decima. Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Seismic Crash
description:
Decima slams down, causing the immediate vicinity to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding away. Dodge rolling will end the slide prematurely. Deals increased damge to close targets.

Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Noxious Blight
description: Noxious blights form persistent pools of corruption on the ground. Foes in a noxious blight take continuous damage, and their boons will be corrupted while they remain in the noxious blight.

name: Sweep the Mold
description: Greer sweeps his claw in a 60-degree cone, damaging, bleeding, poisoning, and knocking back targets. This attack sets up Rake the Rot, the next attack in the chain.

name: Decimation
description: As Decima gains Charge, her fluxlance attacks deal extra damage.

name: Invulnerable Barrier
description: Greer encircles himself in a barrier, protecting himself from further harm while his Greerlings attack his foes. Players entering the barrier will be knocked back.

name: Seismic Reposition
description:
Decima leaps to a new location then crashes down violently. The immediate vicinity erupts with jagged rocks and pyrite. Enemies struck by the attack are pushed away. Dodge rolling will end the slide prematurely. Deals increased damage to close targets.

Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Fulminate
description:
Just before Decima unleashes Flux Nova, she also fulminates all conduits. 

Conduits with 3 charges damage all enemies, apply exposed, and grant Decima 5 stacks of Peal of Harmony and Peal of Discord.

Conduits with 1 or 2 charges damage all enemies.

name: Enfeebling Miasma
description: Reeg exhales lingering clouds of poisonous gas that travel outward to form 3 roughly conical areas. The gas clouds stay in place for several seconds, poisoning foes inside them.

name: Sparking Aura
description: Conduits with charge periodically release dancing sparks that move toward Decima. Sparks lose some health and stop moving temporarily when enough players are standing in their aura. If a dancing spark reaches Decima, it is absorbed and grants her some charge.

name: Rain of Spores
description: Greer targets 3 players, preferring the farthest away, and then fires a torrent of exploding spores along a line that moves towards the initial position of the target. The spores explode on impact, inflicting damage, poison, and confusion.

name: Fluxlance Salvo
description:
Decima fires a salvo of fluxlance beams simultaneously. A conduit struck by a beam gains Charge, but blocks the beam's path, allowing targets to take cover if needed.

Makes enemies vulnerable to dancing sparks.

name: Fulgent Aura
description: Charged conduits emit a dangerous aura of Arcane Flux that damages nearby enemies. The aura increases in size as the conduit gains more Charge.

name: Flux Nova
description:
Decima gathers a colossal amount of arcane flux into an unstable orb. After several seconds, she detonates this orb to obliterate her enemies.

If Decima reaches full charge while channeling this skill, it ends early, and the damage becomes unsurvivable.

name: Blob of Blight
description: Reeg targets up to 3 foes, preferring the most distant combatants. He slams his fist down, creating a damaging sphere that will then fire a blob of blight that follows the targeted enemy for 12 seconds, firing multiple smaller projectiles as it moves. If it hits a targeted foe, it will also create a stationary blob of blight that fires projectiles for several seconds.

name: Sparking Aura
description: Conduits with charge periodically release dancing sparks that move toward Decima. Sparks lose some health and stop moving temporarily when enough players are standing in their aura. If the dancing spark reaches Decima, it is absorbed and grants her some charge.

name: Foreshock
description: Decima performs a series of stomp attacks to pulverize her puny opponents.

name: Glacial Midnight
description:
The whispering shadow assails all enemies with waves of supernatural cold and darkness. Each pulse of damage also grants it one stack of Empowered.

If the whispering shadow has 5 or more stacks of Empowered, all enemies are chilled and blinded.

If the whisperinng shadow has 10 stacks of Empowered, all enemies are also afflicted with vulnerability.

name: Glacial Midnight
description:
The whispering shadow assails all enemies with waves of supernatural cold and darkness. Each pulse of damage also grants it one stack of Empowered.

If the whispering shadow has 5 or more stacks of Empowered, all enemies are chilled and blinded.

If the whisperinng shadow has 10 stacks of Empowered, all enemies are also afflicted with vulnerability.

name: Freezing Fan
description: The whispering shadow flash-freezes a large swath of terrain in front of itself, damaging everything in the area.

name: Acid Spray
description: Inflicts Sulfuric Acid

name: Vitreous Spike
description:
A large spike of ice erupts from the ground, launching targets into the air. 

This can be used to avoid Terrestrial Cryoflash, but it may knock targets into aerial hazards.

name: Falling Ice
description: A small piece of debris has fallen from the ceiling of the cave.

name: Pressure Blast
description: Causes an eruption that imprisons the target and nearby enemies.

name: Steam Prison
description: Creates a steam prison that reflects projectiles.

name: Freezing Fan
description: The whispering shadow flash-freezes a large swath of terrain in front of itself, damaging everything in the area.

name: Toxic Geyser
description: Applies poison and Sulfuric Acid, and grants protection and might to Ura.

name: Falling Ice
description: A small piece of debris has fallen from the ceiling of the cave.

name: Eruption Vent
description: Ura causes a sulfuric geyser to erupt at target's location after several seconds, creating a shockwave and leaving behind a geyser that inflicts poison and Sulfuric Acid on enemies and benefits allies.

name: Gorefrost
description:
Piercing spears of ice damage all enemies in their path. Targets damaged by Gorefrost may be interrupted, dazed, or stunned depending on the fractal tier.

All icicles fire at the same target in an inward-facing circular sequence that tracks the target. As health drops, more projectiles are fired.

name: Wicked Swipe
description: Swipes the air, dealing damage at close range.

name: Return
description: Ura creates a whirlpool, sucking in players and teleporting them to the center of her arena.

name: Frozen Teeth
description: The whispering shadow creates multiple fissures in the ground that erupt with razor-sharp blades of ice. As health drops, more fissures are created.

name: Vitreous Spike
description:
A large spike of ice erupts from the ground, launching targets into the air. 

This can be used to avoid Terrestrial Cryoflash, but it may knock targets into aerial hazards.

name: Vitreous Spike
description:
A large spike of ice erupts from the ground, launching targets into the air. 

This can be used to avoid Terrestrial Cryoflash, but it may knock targets into aerial hazards.

name: Propel
description: Ura launches herself at the furthest target, dealing a high amount of damage when she lands.

name: Sulfuric Froth
description: Inflicts Sulfuric Acid

name: Earthrend
description: When Decima leaps, anything she lands on gets squashed like a bug.

name: Vitreous Spike
description:
A large spike of ice erupts from the ground, launching targets into the air. 

This can be used to avoid Terrestrial Cryoflash, but it may knock targets into aerial hazards.

name: Guttering Light
description:
The whispering shadow becomes vulnerable to defiance damage and repeatedly targets enemies who carry life-fire. While channeling, Guttering Light damages all enemies in the life-fire's radius. Upon completion, life-fire is removed from the target and the whispering shadow gains a stack of Inevitable Darkness.

If no players have life-fire, the whispering shadow instead uses Glacial Midnight.

name: Lofted Cryoflash
description: Upon completing Frozen Teeth, the whispering shadow releases an icy explosion that severely damages and chills all enemies in the air.

name: Falling Ice
description: A small piece of debris has fallen from the ceiling of the cave.

name: Terrestrial Cryoflash
description: Upon completing Frozen Teeth, the whispering shadow releases an icy explosion that severely damages and chills all enemies near the ground.

name: Freezing Vortex
description: The whispering shadow summons multiple freezing vortices that spiral outward. As they move, they create vitreous spikes in their wake.

name: Seismic Crash
description:
Decima slams down, causing the immediate vicinity to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding away. Dodge rolling will end the slide prematurely. Deals increased damge to close targets.

Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Earthrend
description: Decima causes a large ring-shaped area of ground to erupt with jagged rocks and pyrite. The tremendous force sends enemies sliding toward Decima. Enemies that impact a conduit will take extra damage and ricochet in another direction.

name: Wintry Orb
description: The whispering shadow summons an orb of bitter cold that absorbs warmth from nearby enemies. Damage inflicted is spread among all players in the area.

name: Stoke the Flames
description: Overcharge your flamethrower with a fuel injection, releasing a burst of flames around you as you grant yourself boons.

name: Replenishing Despair
description: Siphon health from nearby enemies when you gain a dark aura. Siphon healing is reduced for each target struck beyond the first.

name: Flashbang
description: Throw an explosive at the target area, dazing and blinding enemies on impact. Remove stealth and reveal enemies in a larger area around the impact.

name: Unyielding Impact
description: Slam the ground, creating a powerful impact that inflicts conditions on foes in the area.

name: Lesser Chilblains
description: Mark. Inscribe a mark that inflicts chill and poison on foes when triggered.

name: Hailstorm
description: The whispering shadow summons a hailstorm of exploding ice shards that rain down on several opponents. Each attack deals increased damage to secondary targets.

name: Magnetic Bomb
description: Set a timed charge that pulls nearby foes.

name: Guttering Light
description:
The whispering shadow becomes vulnerable to defiance damage and repeatedly targets enemies who carry life-fire. While channeling, Guttering Light damages all enemies in the life-fire's radius. Upon completion, life-fire is removed from the target and the whispering shadow gains a stack of Inevitable Darkness.

If no players have life-fire, the whispering shadow instead uses Glacial Midnight.

name: Forged Surfer Dash
description:
Offensive Artifact. Dash to the targeted location while dropping bombs along your path that detonate after a short period of time, dealing damage and burning enemies. More bombs are dropped the farther you travel. 

For a short time after using this skill, you continue to drop additional bombs at your location.

name: Lively Lute
description:
Instrument. Perform with your lute, sending out damaging sound waves toward an enemy and healing tones toward allies.
The lute will then consume all notes to continue playing in the background. The lute's duration is extended for each note consumed.

name: "We Will Never Yield!"
description:
Command. Your allies' health cannot be reduced below zero for a short period of time. After this effect ends, grant barrier proportionate to their missing health. Certain boss skills may bypass the effect of this skill.
Echo. Grant superspeed to nearby allies after a set interval or after you use a burst skill.

name: Otter's Compassion
description: Meditation. Remove conditions from nearby allies while granting them boons and increasing their incoming healing for a duration. If water is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun for nearby allies.

name: Glaring Burst
description: Create a burst of energy, the effect of which changes based on the radiant weapon you have equipped.

name: Air Attunement
description: Attune to air, gaining heavy damage and control abilities.

name: Metal Legion Guitar
description:
Offensive Artifact. Rock out with your guitar, damaging and applying conditions to opponents around you, then slam the ground with the guitar, damaging and stunning opponents in the area. 

For a short time after using this skill, your first weapon skill is replaced with your stealth attack, even when not stealthed.

name: Hare's Agility
description: Meditation. Gain endurance and swiftness. Your next few strikes create an arc of chain lightning. If air is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun and grants blur.

name: Conflagration
description: Familiar. Summon the fox to attack your target, inflicting burning and then spreading burning on that foe to nearby enemies.

name: Metal Legion Guitar
description:
Offensive Artifact. Rock out with your guitar, damaging and applying conditions to opponents around you, then slam the ground with the guitar, damaging and stunning opponents in the area. 

For a short time after using this skill, your first weapon skill is replaced with your stealth attack, even when not stealthed.

name: Exalted Hammer
description:
Defensive Artifact. Leap to the targeted area and slam down with an enchanted exalted hammer, damaging enemies while healing and granting boons to allies in the area.

For a short time after using this skill, activating any weapon skill that costs initiative creates an additional healing burst at your location.

name: Innervate Preservation
description: Channel power to your Spirit of Preservation, granting defensive boons to nearby allies.

name: Summon Spirits
description: Shroud. You and any active spirits shadowstep to the target area. Any spirits that aren't currently using their initial skill will immediately use an additional skill.

name: Legendary Entity Stance
description: Invoke the power of the legendary entity of the Mists, Razah.

name: Tale of the Honorable Rogue
description: Tale. Quote the escapades of Dougal Keane, causing nearby allies to become extraordinarily nimble with a burst of speed.

name: Symbiotic Shielding
description: Gain barrier and magnetic aura.

name: Exit Radiant Forge
description: Leave Radiant Forge.

name: Lightning Blitz
description: Familiar. Summon the hare to shadowstep to and attack enemies around your target for critical damage. For each unique enemy struck, your next strike creates an arc of chain lightning.

name: Whirlwind
description: Squall. Launch yourself forward with powerful gust of wind.

name: Resolute Stance
description: Stance. Enter a stance that heals when you remove conditions from yourself, then heal nearby allies and remove conditions from them.

name: Forged Surfer Dash
description:
Offensive Artifact. Dash to the targeted location while dropping bombs along your path that detonate after a short period of time, dealing damage and burning enemies. More bombs are dropped the farther you travel. 

For a short time after using this skill, you continue to drop additional bombs at your location.

name: Rejuvenate
description: Meditation. Heal yourself and charge your familiar skill.

name: Evolve
description: Evolve.

name: Innervate Preservation
description: Channel power to your Spirit of Preservation, granting defensive boons to nearby allies.

name: Evolve
description: Evolve.

name: Hawkeye
description: Release a hail of arrows toward your target and enemies nearby them.

name: Holo-Dancer Decoy
description:
Defensive Artifact. Summon a holo-dancer decoy that taunts enemies and grants boons to nearby allies. It self-destructs if it is not destroyed, dealing damage to enemies in a large area and granting additional boons to allies.

For a short time after using this skill, the next utility skill you use has reduced cooldown.

name: Seismic Impact
description: Familiar. Summon the toad at your location. The toad leaps up and slams the ground, knocking down enemies and creating a rocky barrier that enemies can't cross. Allies in the area gain protection.

name: Preservation
description: Shroud. Spirit. Grant boons to nearby allies, then summon a spirit of preservation. Preservation will unleash a burst of energy, healing and removing conditions from nearby allies.

name: Daring Advance
description: Stance. Leap to an area, tethering nearby enemies and empowering allies. Tethered enemies are revealed and take additional damage from your attacks and are stunned if they move beyond the range threshold.

name: Syncopate
description: Deafening Drum releases an additional quick wave after a delay.

name: Tale of the Second Scion
description: Tale. Deliver the story of Aurene and the dragon cycle, rejuvenating nearby allies and increasing their incoming healing.

name: Exalted Hammer
description:
Defensive Artifact. Leap to the targeted area and slam down with an enchanted exalted hammer, damaging enemies while healing and granting boons to allies in the area.

For a short time after using this skill, activating any weapon skill that costs initiative creates an additional healing burst at your location.

name: Fire Attunement
description: Attune to fire, gaining heavy damage and burning abilities.

name: Seismic Impact
description: Familiar. Summon the toad at your location. The toad leaps up and slams the ground, knocking down enemies and creating a rocky barrier that enemies can't cross. Allies in the area gain protection.

name: Luminous Staff
description: Slam your radiant staff into the ground, granting boons to allies and creating a symbol.

name: Fox's Fury
description: Meditation. Grant boons to nearby allies, then inflict burning on your target based on the amount of might you have. If fire is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun, grants additional boons, and strikes enemies around your target.

name: Pelt
description: Fire a volley of arrows into the air, damaging enemies when they land.

name: Innervate Wanderlust
description: Channel power to your Spirit of Wanderlust, inflicting fear on nearby enemies.

name: Zephyrite Sun Crystal
description:
Defensive Artifact. Dash toward your target, damaging and inflicting conditions on enemies and removing conditions from allies around you when you reach your destination. You evade attacks as long as you are still traveling.

For a short time after using this skill, whenever you use a weapon skill that costs initiative, remove conditions from yourself.

name: Mitotic State
description: Stance. Your slime stimulates your cells to regenerate, healing you rapidly over time. The healing is increased while you have barrier.

name: Nightmare Weapon
description: Weapon spell. Your strikes steal life from enemies and inflict vulnerability. Grant fewer stacks of this to nearby allies.

name: Wanderlust
description: Shroud. Spirit. Create a powerful blast that damages enemies in the area, then summon a Spirit of Wanderlust at that location. Wanderlust knocks down enemies and creates a lingering area that deals damage and inflicts conditions.

name: Canach-Coin Toss
description: This skill has backfired and cannot be used again until fully recharged.

name: Flustering Flute
description:
Instrument. Play an enchanting tune with the flute, confusing enemies in front of you. Enemies in the center of the music will be dazed.
The flute will then consume all notes to continue playing in the background. The flute's duration is extended for each note consumed.

name: Weapon of Warding
description: Weapon spell. Block attacks. Gain protection when the last stack is removed. Grant fewer stacks of this to nearby allies.

name: "We Shall Return!"
description:
Command.  Heal yourself and allies in an area around you. 
Echo.  Heals again and removes conditions on allies after a set interval or after you use a burst skill.

name: Mistral
description: Squall. Summon a current of chilling northern air. Projectiles that pass through the current become frozen, chilling and dealing additional damage to enemies.

name: Innervate Wanderlust
description: Channel power to your Spirit of Wanderlust, inflicting fear on nearby enemies.

name: "Never Surrender!"
description:
Command. Break stun while granting boons to nearby allies. The cooldown of this skill is increased if used to break a stun.
Echo. Grant additional boons to nearby allies after a set interval or after you use a burst skill.

name: Chant of Recuperation
description:
Burst. Chant. Grants barrier to allies in an area around you. 

Refrain. After activation, continually pulses healing to allies while removing motivation stacks every interval. This effect lasts until you run out of motivation stacks or another chant is activated. Gain increased effects depending on motivation stacks:

name: Emergency Jade Shield
description: This skill has backfired and cannot be used again until fully recharged.

name: Summon Cyclone Bow
description: Conjure a powerful bow of wind that consumes arrows and generates Wind Force.

name: Locked
description: Select a skill using the arrow above.

name: Defensive Protocol: Cleanse
description: Morph. Convert damaging conditions to barrier and nondamaging conditions to protection.

name: Holo-Dancer Decoy
description:
Defensive Artifact. Summon a holo-dancer decoy that taunts enemies and grants boons to nearby allies. It self-destructs if it is not destroyed, dealing damage to enemies in a large area and granting additional boons to allies.

For a short time after using this skill, the next utility skill you use has reduced cooldown.

name: Beguiling Haze
description:
Send an unblockable fragment of Razah toward the targeted area. When the fragment reaches its target, shadowstep to its position, dealing damage to enemies in the area. If it hits, you can use this skill up to two more times with no energy cost or casting time.

Resonance. If Legendary Assassin Stance is equipped, this skill deals additional damage and removes boons if only one enemy was struck by this attack.

name: Offensive Protocol: Obliterate
description: Morph. Create a giant blade to maim your enemy. This attack destroys the barrier of enemies hit.

name: Quarry's Peril
description: Fire a volley of arrows into the air, immobilizing enemies when they land.

name: Buoyant Deluge
description: Familiar. Summon the otter to throw a massive ball of water at the target location. When the ball lands, it heals allies in the area and removes conditions from them while stunning enemies.

name: Effulgent Stance
description: Stance. Grant barrier and light aura to nearby allies, then enter a stance that charges up a burst of light when striking or struck by enemies. The burst of light dazes enemies if fully charged.

name: Offensive Protocol: Pierce
description: Morph. Thrust forward with a spike, piercing the defense of your foe.

name: Chak Shield
description:
Defensive Artifact. Place an electrified shield at your position that blocks projectiles, dealing damage to enemies and granting barrier to allies within it.

For a short time after using this skill, your weapon skills that cost initiative refund initiative.

name: Elemental Procession
description: Meditation. Summon all four familiars to use their empowered skills.

name: Shrike
description: Conjured arrows strike your target.

name: Tale of the Soulkeeper
description: Tale. Rouse allies with the legend of Almorra Soulkeeper, granting offensive boons.

name: Anguish
description: Shroud. Spirit. Mark an enemy to take more damage from your summoned creatures, then summon a spirit of anguish. Anguish fires a barrage of projectiles that deal increased damage against crowd-controlled enemies and for each condition on those enemies.

name: Antivenom Draught: Backfired
description: This skill has backfired and cannot be used again until fully recharged.

name: Zephyrite Sun Crystal
description:
Defensive Artifact. Dash toward your target, damaging and inflicting conditions on enemies and removing conditions from allies around you when you reach your destination. You evade attacks as long as you are still traveling.

For a short time after using this skill, whenever you use a weapon skill that costs initiative, remove conditions from yourself.

name: Summon Kryptis Turret
description:
Offensive Artifact. Summons a Kryptis turret at your targeted location and fires at the closest foe in range.

For a short time after using this skill, you deal increased damage to enemies that were struck by the turret.

name: Wuthering Wind
description: Damage nearby enemies with a gust of wind.

name: Liquid State
description: Stance. Quickly melt down into a puddle, evading all incoming attacks.

name: Unstable Skritt Bomb
description:
Backfire. The bomb explodes in your hands, damaging you and damaging and knocking down enemies around you. 

For a short time after using this skill, you take increased strike and condition damage.

name: Shining Spin
description: Strike nearby foes with your radiant hammer, dealing increased damage against foes that are disabled.

name: Beguiling Haze
description:
Send an unblockable fragment of Razah toward the targeted area. When the fragment reaches its target, shadowstep to its position, dealing damage to enemies in the area. If it hits, you can use this skill up to two more times with no energy cost or casting time.

Resonance. If Legendary Assassin Stance is equipped, this skill deals additional damage and removes boons if only one enemy was struck by this attack.

name: Gleaming Blade
description: Leap to the target and slash, inflicting cripple and vulnerability.

name: Offensive Protocol: Demolish
description: Morph. Spin around a hunk of metal, then finish with a forward smash.

name: Crescendo
description:
Strike up the band and unleash a wave of sonic magic. Instruments playing in the background contribute to the amplitude, increasing the strength of the wave.
This skill's recharge cannot be reset by other mesmer skills.

name: Exit Ritualist's Shroud
description: Leave Ritualist's Shroud and return to your normal form.

name: "Brace Yourselves!"
description:
Command. Apply barrier to yourself and allies around you. 
Echo.  Apply barrier again to allies after a set interval or after you use a burst skill.

name: Buoyant Deluge
description: Familiar. Summon the otter to throw a massive ball of water at the target location. When the ball lands, it heals allies in the area and removes conditions from them while stunning enemies.

name: Xinrae's Weapon
description: Weapon spell. When you take damage over a percentage of your maximum health, heal for the difference, then steal life from that foe. Grant fewer stacks of this to nearby allies and break them out of stuns.

name: Glaring Burst
description: Create a burst of energy, the effect of which changes based on the radiant weapon you have equipped.

name: Defensive Protocol: Protect
description: Morph. Briefly block incoming attacks.

name: Harmonious Harp
description:
Instrument. Gain distortion and strum the harp, continuously healing nearby allies.
The harp will then consume all notes to continue playing in the background. The harp's duration is extended for each note consumed.

name: Wanderlust
description: Shroud. Spirit. Create a powerful blast that damages enemies in the area, then summon a Spirit of Wanderlust at that location. Wanderlust knocks down enemies and creates a lingering area that deals damage and inflicts conditions.

name: Reshuffle
description: Redraw any artifacts you currently have in your skill slots.

name: Twin Moon Sweep
description:
Spawn a Fragment of Razah at your targeted location. Both you and the fragment attack with a scythe, damaging and inflicting conditions on foes at your locations. Gain might for each enemy struck.

Resonance. This skill gains bonus effects depending on the legend equipped in the other slot.

name: Tale of the August Queen
description: Tale. Retell how Queen Jennah protected her city in their time of need, granting allies distortion and chaos aura.

name: Splinter Weapon
description: Weapon spell. Your strikes will trigger an additional strike on nearby enemies. Allies receive fewer stacks of this.

name: Brilliant Slam
description: Slam your foes with your shield, dazing them. Deal bonus defiance-bar damage to defiant foes.

name: Perfect Storm
description: Squall. Release a massive tornado, launching enemies it strikes as it travels. When the tornado reaches its destination, it will persist for a period, dealing damage to enemies inside of it.

name: Glaring Burst
description: Create a burst of energy, the effect of which changes based on the radiant weapon you have equipped.

name: Water Attunement
description: Attune to water, gaining superior support and healing abilities.

name: Flux State
description: Stance. Your slime rapidly spins around you, creating a magnetic field. Pull in nearby enemies as a metallic storm swirls around you.

name: Twin Moon Sweep
description:
Spawn a Fragment of Razah at your targeted location. Both you and the fragment attack with a scythe, damaging and inflicting conditions on foes at your locations. Gain might for each enemy struck.

Resonance. This skill gains bonus effects depending on the legend equipped in the other slot.

name: Innervate Anguish
description: Channel power to your Spirit of Anguish, damaging nearby enemies and granting might to nearby allies.

name: Fleeting Zephyr
description: Jump back, releasing a blast of wind that destroys incoming projectiles.

name: Gaseous State
description: Stance. Sublimate, breaking stun from yourself. Remove movement-impairing conditions and prevent their reapplication.

name: Weapon of Remedy
description: Weapon spell. Periodically remove conditions, healing for each condition removed. Grant this to nearby allies for a reduced duration.

name: Hare's Agility
description: Meditation. Gain endurance and swiftness. Your next few strikes create an arc of chain lightning. If air is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun and grants blur.

name: "Find Their Weakness!"
description:
Command. Strike enemies around your target, inflicting vulnerability and spreading vulnerability from your original target to nearby enemies.
Echo. Apply might to allies and gain adrenaline based on the number of enemies struck after a set interval or after you use a burst skill.

name: Shielding Hands
description:
Channel revitalizing energy that heals you with every pulse. While channeling, you take reduced strike and condition damage.

Resonance. If Legendary Centaur Stance is equipped, you additionally heal allies around you during channeling, and you take reduced strike and condition damage for a short amount of time after channeling completes.

name: Innervate Anguish
description: Channel power to your Spirit of Anguish, damaging nearby enemies and granting might to nearby allies.

name: Glaring Burst
description: Create a burst of energy, the effect of which changes based on the radiant weapon you have equipped.

name: Essence Blast
description: Shroud. Fire a blast of energy that is more powerful for each active spirit. Active spirits will prioritize attacking the last enemy targeted by this skill if they are in range.

name: Tale of the Tortured Mastermind
description: Tale. Recall the cruelty of Scarlet Briar as you revile your target with a battery of insults, damaging their ego.

name: Solid State
description: Stance. Leap into the air as you command your body to compact, stunning enemies upon landing. Gain stability and increase your outgoing stun durations for a duration.

name: Enter Radiant Forge
description: Enter Radiant Forge. The recharge time of this skill is reduced for each unused radiant weapon in shroud.

name: Conflagration
description: Familiar. Summon the fox to attack your target, inflicting burning and then spreading burning on that foe to nearby enemies.

name: Harmonious Harp
description:
Instrument. Gain distortion and strum the harp, continuously healing nearby allies.
The harp will then consume all notes to continue playing in the background. The harp's duration is extended for each note consumed.

name: Piercing Stance
description: Stance. Enter a stance that causes you to deal more damage, then strike nearby enemies to daze them.

name: Deafening Drum
description:
Instrument. Slam the drum to release a percussive shock wave, disabling enemies. The strength of the disable increases the closer an enemy is.
The drum will then consume all notes to continue playing in the background. The drum's duration is extended for each note consumed.

name: Earth Attunement
description: Attune to earth, gaining superior damage over time and defensive abilities.

name: Lightning Blitz
description: Familiar. Summon the hare to shadowstep to and attack enemies around your target for critical damage. For each unique enemy struck, your next strike creates an arc of chain lightning.

name: Stone Summit Cannon
description: This skill has backfired and cannot be used again until fully recharged.

name: Elemental Procession
description: Meditation. Summon all four familiars to use their empowered skills.

name: Offensive Protocol: Shred
description: Morph. Launch cutting disks at your enemies, piercing enemies in their path. Enemies struck are crippled; if an enemy is struck by all three disks, they are immobilized.

name: Locked
description: Select a skill using the arrow above.

name: "On Your Knees!"
description:
Command. Damage and apply conditions to enemies around you.
Echo. Damage and immobilize enemies after a set interval or after you use a burst skill.

name: Restorative Glow
description: Heal and remove conditions from nearby allies, then redirect a percentage of their incoming strike damage to you. Damage redirection will end if you fall below 50% health.

name: Beguiling Haze
description:
Send an unblockable fragment of Razah toward the targeted area. When the fragment reaches its target, shadowstep to its position, dealing damage to enemies in the area. If it hits, you can use this skill up to two more times with no energy cost or casting time.

Resonance. If Legendary Assassin Stance is equipped, this skill deals additional damage and removes boons if only one enemy was struck by this attack.

name: Chant of Freedom
description:
Burst. Chant. Breaks stun from allies in an area around you. 

Refrain. When activated, continually applies swiftness to allies while removing motivation stacks every interval. This effect lasts until you run out of motivation stacks or another chant is activated. Gains increased effects depending on motivation stacks:

name: Beguiling Haze
description:
Send an unblockable fragment of Razah toward the targeted area. When the fragment reaches its target, shadowstep to its position, dealing damage to enemies in the area. If it hits, you can use this skill up to two more times with no energy cost or casting time.

Resonance. If Legendary Assassin Stance is equipped, this skill deals additional damage and removes boons if only one enemy was struck by this attack.

name: Defensive Protocol: Thorns
description: Morph. Grow protective spikes, damaging nearby enemies. For a short duration, the spikes react when you are struck, damaging nearby enemies again.

name: Sovereign of Light
description: Your light aura detonates, damaging nearby foes and healing nearby allies.

name: Supersonic Arrow
description: Supercharge an arrow with wind magic, and then launch it at incredible speed.

name: Tale of the Valiant Marshal
description: Tale. Orate the heroism of Trahearne, calling nearby allies to action. Break their stuns and brace them for battle.

name: Keen Shot
description: Shoot a wind arrow.

name: Otter's Compassion
description: Meditation. Remove conditions from nearby allies while granting them boons and increasing their incoming healing for a duration. If water is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun for nearby allies.

name: Summon Spirits
description: Shroud. You and any active spirits shadowstep to the target area. Any spirits that aren't currently using their initial skill will immediately use an additional skill.

name: Summon Kryptis Turret
description:
Offensive Artifact. Summons a Kryptis turret at your targeted location and fires at the closest foe in range.

For a short time after using this skill, you deal increased damage to enemies that were struck by the turret.

name: Radiant Bulwark
description: Block attacks. Grants aegis to nearby allies on activation.

name: Daring Advance
description: Stance. Leap to an area, tethering nearby enemies and empowering allies. Tethered enemies are revealed and take additional damage from your attacks and are stunned if they move beyond the range threshold.

name: Plasmatic State
description: Stance. Superheat your body and lash out, damaging and burning enemies struck. Your outgoing strike and condition damage is increased for a duration.

name: Wind Shear
description: Squall. Wind swells around you, knocking back nearby enemies and reflecting incoming projectiles.

name: Dismiss Cyclone Bow
description: Dispel your Cyclone Bow, losing all Wind Force.

name: Ritualist's Shroud
description: Assume the form of a ritualist and gain new skills, turning your life force into health.

name: Hex-Eater Vortex
description:
Remove conditions on yourself, then fire projectiles that inflict conditions at random enemies within your radius, based on the number of conditions removed. 

Resonance. If Legendary Demon Stance is equipped, the maximum number of projectiles is always fired regardless of conditions removed, and all projectiles are fired at the closest enemy instead.

name: Toad's Fortitude
description: Meditation. Block incoming attacks, then strike nearby enemies with shattering rocks. Grant protection to nearby allies if this skill completes successfully. If earth is your specialized element, this skill grants resistance to allies and breaks stun.

name: Resilient Weapon
description: Weapon spell. Take reduced damage from strikes and periodically heal. Effectiveness increased while below 50% health. Grant this to nearby allies for a reduced duration.

name: Piercing Gales
description: Squall. Conjure a barrage of wind to cut through your target. Deal increased damage against vulnerable foes. The wind flies faster when you have swiftness or superspeed.

name: Stab
description: A basic melee attack.

name: Pelt
description: Fire a volley of arrows into the air, damaging enemies when they land.

name: Soothing Breeze
description: Squall. Call upon a gentle wind to heal and grant superspeed to you and your pet.

name: Mistburn Mortar
description:
Offensive Artifact. Shoot an orb that explodes upon impact with the ground, creating a corrupted area that deals damage and applies conditions to enemies. 

For a short time after using this skill, your strikes additionally inflict burning on enemies.

name: Fox's Fury
description: Meditation. Grant boons to nearby allies, then inflict burning on your target based on the amount of might you have. If fire is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun, grants additional boons, and strikes enemies around your target.

name: Mistburn Mortar
description:
Offensive Artifact. Shoot an orb that explodes upon impact with the ground, creating a corrupted area that deals damage and applies conditions to enemies. 

For a short time after using this skill, your strikes additionally inflict burning on enemies.

name: Gladiator's Defense
description:
Break out of stun, damaging and weakening enemies close to you. Gain boons if this skill strikes at least one enemy. Remove additional energy if this skill was used to break a stun. 

Resonance. If Legendary Dwarf Stance is equipped, the additional energy cost for breaking stuns is reduced, and the boons are also granted to allies in a radius around you.

name: Valorous Stance
description: Stance. Enter a stance that causes you to heal allies when you grant them boons, then grant boons to nearby allies.

name: Lively Lute
description:
Instrument. Perform with your lute, sending out damaging sound waves toward an enemy and healing tones toward allies.
The lute will then consume all notes to continue playing in the background. The lute's duration is extended for each note consumed.

name: Bluster
description: Release a rapid volley of arrows.

name: Toad's Fortitude
description: Meditation. Block incoming attacks, then strike nearby enemies with shattering rocks. Grant protection to nearby allies if this skill completes successfully. If earth is your specialized element, this skill grants resistance to allies and breaks stun.

name: Stalwart Stance
description: Stance. Break stun for nearby allies and enter a defensive stance, taking reduced damage.

name: Quarry's Peril
description: Fire a volley of arrows into the air, immobilizing enemies when they land.

name: Dazzling Hammer
description: Smash the ground with your radiant hammer, dazing nearby foes and granting boons to nearby allies. Gain light aura if this skill finishes a combo.

name: Chant of Action
description:
Burst. Chant. Applies boons to allies in an area around you.

Refrain. After activation, continually applies boons to allies while removing motivation every interval. This effect lasts until you run out of motivation stacks or another chant is activated. Gain increased effects depending on motivation stacks:

name: Buoyant Deluge
description: Familiar. Summon the otter to throw a massive ball of water at the target location. When the ball lands, it heals allies in the area and removes conditions from them while stunning enemies.

name: Inquest Portal Device: Backfired
description: This skill has backfired and cannot be used again until fully recharged.

name: Lucent Thrust
description: Stab your foe with your radiant sword and launch a ray of light that bounces between foes.

name: Cosmic Wisdom
description: Tap into your connection with the Mists, empowering your legends for a short period of time.

name: Electric Enchantment
description: Meditation. Gain endurance and swiftness. Your next few strikes create an arc of chain lightning. If air is your specialized element, this skill breaks stun and grants blur.

name: Locked
description: Select a skill using the arrow above.

name: Skritt Swipe
description: Summon a skritt to pilfer artifacts.

name: Unrelenting Assault
description: Mai Trin unleashes a flurry of attacks with her sword, teleporting before each strike.

name: Release Potential: Warrior
description: Leap to targeted area, damaging enemies at the target location. Gain barrier if at least one enemy was struck. Each point of affinity increases damage dealt and the barrier granted by this skill.

name: Leaping Lizard
description: Leap through the air, crippling enemies upon landing.

name: Embrace the Darkness
description: Legendary Demon. Summon the power of the legendary demon to transform into a powerful avatar. Pulse torment to nearby foes. Using skills that cost energy increases the torment applied on the next pulse.

name: Call to Anguish
description: Legendary Demon. Leap toward the targeted area and pull foes toward your landing point.

name: Zephyrite Sun Crystal
description: Break stuns and dash toward your target, damaging and burning enemies around you when you reach your destination. You evade attacks as long as you are still traveling.

name: Unyielding Impact
description: Slam the ground, creating a powerful impact that inflicts conditions on foes in the area.

name: Radiant Courage
description:
Virtue: Gain aegis periodically.
Activate: Grant aegis, resistance, and Luminary's Blessing to yourself and nearby allies. 
The next time you use Gleaming Blade, it deals increased damage and immobilizes enemies. The next time you use Radiant Bulwark, it grants barrier to nearby allies.

name: Blunderblast
description: Mai Trin overloads her pistol with energy from the Mists before releasing a devastating explosion.

name: Release Potential: Monk
description: If Ventari's Tablet has not been summoned, summon it at your location; otherwise, gain tranquility. Grant boons to allies around the tablet. Gain energy depending on the number of allies affected by this skill (excluding yourself). For each point of affinity, boon duration is increased.

name: Pain Absorption
description: Legendary Demon. Grant resistance to yourself and nearby allies. Absorb conditions from those allies, gaining resolution and additional resistance per condition.

name: Radiant Resolve
description:
Virtue: Regenerates health.
Activate: Heal yourself and nearby allies while granting light aura. The next time you use Luminous Staff, it heals allies and grants them regeneration.

name: Banish Enchantment
description: Legendary Demon. Deal damage, apply chill, and remove boons from your foe.

name: Radiant Resolve
description:
Virtue: Regenerates health.
Activate: Heal yourself and nearby allies while granting light aura. The next time you use Luminous Staff, it heals allies and grants them regeneration.

name: Release Potential: Mesmer
description: Create an eruption of despair around you, inflicting torment on enemies and dazing them. For each enemy struck, inflict torment on yourself. Each point of affinity you have increases the torment duration on enemies and reduces the torment duration on yourself.

name: Glaring Burst
description: Create a burst of energy, the effect of which changes based on the radiant weapon you have equipped.

name: Empowering Misery
description: Legendary Demon. Heal yourself. Gain might and heal more for each condition currently applied to you.

name: Glaring Burst
description: Create a burst of energy, the effect of which changes based on the radiant weapon you have equipped.

name: Call to Anguish
description: Legendary Demon. Leap toward the targeted area and pull foes toward your landing point.

name: Radiant Justice
description:
Virtue: Burn foes every few attacks.
Activate: Gain quickness. The next time you use Dazzling Hammer, it creates a delayed secondary impact.

name: Release Potential: Assassin
description: Spin around and send out three increasingly larger shockwaves that damage and inflict conditions on enemies around you. Enemies that are struck by all three waves are additionally immobilized. Damage and immobilize duration increase with each point of affinity you have.

name: Piercing Shriek
description: Beast.  Emit a cacophonous screech, dazing and tormenting nearby enemies.

name: Release Potential: Warrior
description: Leap to targeted area, damaging enemies at the target location. Gain barrier if at least one enemy was struck. Each point of affinity increases damage dealt and the barrier granted by this skill.

name: Inaccurate Sketch
description: You made a small mistake in your sketch.

name: Saurian Might
description: Smash the ground before you with primal strength.

name: Zephyrite Sun Crystal
description: Break stuns and dash toward your target, damaging and burning enemies around you when you reach your destination. You evade attacks as long as you are still traveling.

name: Perfect Storm
description: Squall. Release a massive tornado, launching enemies it strikes as it travels. When the tornado reaches its destination, it will persist for a period, dealing damage to enemies inside of it.

name: Rejuvenate
description: Meditation. Heal yourself and charge your familiar skill.

description: Meditation. Heal yourself and charge your familiar skill.

description: Meditation. Heal yourself and charge your familiar skill.

name: Mistral
description: Squall. Summon a current of chilling northern air. Projectiles that pass through the current become frozen, chilling and dealing additional damage to enemies.

name: Lesser Symbol of Blades
description: Symbol. Create a mystic symbol, damaging foes and granting boons to allies.

name: Lesser Signet of the Locust
description: Signet Active: Strike and remove boons from nearby foes. Heal for each foe you strike and for each boon removed.

name: Time Bomb
description: Deal damage to nearby enemies with a temporal explosion.

name: Lesser "Sic 'Em!"
description: Command. Your pet rushes at your foe, dealing increased damage.

name: Tantrum
description: Kela releases massive waves of damage until subdued.

name: Ambush
description: Kela ambushes nearby foes, killing them. Consuming a crocodilian razortooth will cause her to lose Relentless Speed.

name: Rend Asunder
description: Kela grasps her target and any nearby foes and throws them, rending their defenses.

name: Lightning Strike
description: Stun your foe.

name: Tantrum

name: Stomp
description: Deals a large amount of damage to enemies on the left.

name: Claw Slam
description: Attacks a frontal cone, knocking down enemies.

description: Create a tornado that knocks back foes.

name: Innocent Display
description: Beast. Splash around, healing allies and weakening enemies with your charm.

name: Tail Whip
description: Slam your foe with your tail.

name: Jet
description: Dash at your foe with a wave of water.

name: Bloodthirster
description: Burst. Sweep your blade around yourself, slicing nearby enemies. Effect increases with adrenaline level. Heal if you strike a target, healing more if they are bleeding. Healing scales off of the target struck that is bleeding the most.

name: Detonate Chaos
description: Command your chaos aura to expand and explode, granting yourself boons as you inflict conditions on enemies.

name: Bloodthirster
description: Burst. Sweep your blade around yourself, slicing nearby enemies. Effect increases with adrenaline level. Heal if you strike a target, healing more if they are bleeding. Healing scales off of the target struck that is bleeding the most.

name: Unravel
description: Stance. For a period of time, you forego your weaver training, choosing to fully attune to elements instead. Gain boons based on your primary attunement, and reduce all attunement cooldowns.

name: Flawless Execution
description: Shoot nearby enemies as you spin, slashing with your sword.

name: Rend
description: Maim your target with an immobilizing strike, then deliver a devastating blow that inflicts heavy bleeding.

name: Death's Advance
description: Kneel. Shadowstep forward while granting yourself stealth. While standing within Sniper's Cover, shadowstep to any position within range instead.
